140 <text xml:space="preserve">
. <body><div type="edition" xml:lang="kaw-Latn" >
. <div xml:id="Smaradahana_01">
. <ab xml:id="Smaradahana_01.01" type="invocation">avighnam astu</ab>
. </div>
145 <div type="canto" rend="met" met="≈ЫƒБrd≈ЂlavikrƒЂбЄНita" n="1" xml:id="Smaradahana_02">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">p≈ЂjƒБniбєЕ kavi saбєЕgraheбєЕ kal…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕan maбєЕde <app><lem type="norm">kadƒЂrghƒБyuбє£an</lem><rdg wit="#edp">kadƒЂrghyƒБyuбє£an</rdg></app></l>
. <l n="b">muбєЕgv iбєЕ padma m…Щkar pratiбє£бє≠ha siniram deniбєЕ r…Щr…ЩbniбєЕ kapƒБt</l>
. <l n="c">vƒЂjanyƒБkбє£ara lambaбєЕ endah inurƒБk…Щn riбєЕ t…Щt…ЩћДniбєЕ ya≈Ыa</l>
150 <l n="d">dh≈ЂpƒБkƒБra limut magh…ЩбєЗбє≠a<!-- textual problem? --> panaбєЕisniбєЕ бє£aбЄНpadƒБ riбєЕ s…Щkar</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">≈ЂбєЕ indah ta bhaбє≠ƒБra manmatha r…ЩбєЕ…ЩћДn sambatniбєЕ aбєЕg…ЩћДбєЕ laбєЕ…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ sƒБkбє£ƒБt makadr…Щvya luhniбєЕ aбєЕaraбєЕ saбєЕ devaniбєЕ ken lukar</l>
155 <l n="c">saбєЕ r…Щm byƒБpaka riбєЕ raras hati v…ЩkasniбєЕ kiбєЕkiбєЕ aбєЕl…Щsvak…Щn</l>
. <l n="d">saбєЕ saбєЕkan paraniбєЕ raras kita <app><lem type="norm">ba≈ЫƒБveh</lem><rdg wit="#edp">ba≈ЫƒБveh</rdg></app> rƒБga lƒБvan lulut</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">tan tuбєЕgal kahananta riбєЕ pakasutan layvan hunor iбєЕ susu</l>
160 <l n="b">saбєЕ muбєЕgv iбєЕ juraбєЕ iбєЕ karas tutuganiбєЕ lambaбєЕ gur≈ЂniбєЕ tanah</l>
. <l n="c">≈ЫrƒЂniбєЕ paбєЕg…Щlaran бє≠ikƒБ<!-- is tikƒБ intended? --> saбЄНavatƒБniбєЕ r…Щm kas…Щnvan ravi</l>
. <l n="d">riбєЕ lvah l≈Ђh am…Щgat pupur kita hane tuбєЕgakni luбєЕniбєЕ gaбЄНuбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.04" n="4">
165 <l n="a">taбєЕkil roma g…ЩluбєЕ val≈Ђ grћ•ha latƒБ de≈Ыanta yan paбєЕlare</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ muбєЕgv iбєЕ vat…ЩsiбєЕ pupuk pamasaran tiбєЕhal maliбєЕ yan liriбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">paбєЕhilyan ≈ЫavaniбєЕ бє≠ikƒБnak-anakan s≈Ђkбє£meбєЕ laruбєЕ ketaki</l>
. <l n="d">iбєЕ pamraбєЕ-mraбєЕaniбєЕ halis tik…Щl ar…Щs hyaбєЕniбєЕ pamƒБбЄНan lulut</l>
. </lg>
170 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ r…Щs rƒБga бєЕaranta riбєЕ pasir adoh l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ kiteбєЕ parvata</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ kiбєЕkiбєЕ kita riбєЕ tavaбєЕ saбєЕ aбєЕaraбєЕ nƒБhan бєЕaranteбєЕ r…Щm…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">saбєЕ <app><lem type="norm">≈ЫokƒБбєЕaluбє£eбєЕ</lem><rdg wit="#edp">≈ЫokƒБбєЕaluseбєЕ</rdg></app> taman saбєЕ alaбєЕ…ЩћД yan saбєЕhubiбєЕ sƒБgara</l>
. <l n="d">riбєЕ kumbaбєЕ maбєЕajap бєЕaranta kar…ЩбєЕ…ЩћД nƒБhan dadinta prabhu</l>
175 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">yan riбєЕ praбєЕ kita siбєЕha vƒЂrataruбєЗƒБrjƒБpa√±ji ≈Ы≈ЂreбєЕ raбєЗa</l>
. <l n="b">sƒБkбє£ƒБt rƒБga s…Щkar kiteбєЕ kavi kiduбєЕ prƒБlambaбєЕ iбєЕ rƒБt kabeh</l>
. <l n="c">tambƒБk≈ЂбєЕ kita riбєЕ tilam kita sin…ЩбєЕgah dhƒЂramantrƒБnulus</l><!--vƒЂramantry ƒБnulus?-->
180 <l n="d">≈ЫrƒЂ kƒБme≈Ыvara nƒБma lƒБgi vinuvus riбєЕ rƒБt kabeh nitya≈Ыa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">doniбєЕ mastuti kƒЂrti saбєЕ mamava rƒБt muбєЕgv iбєЕ carikniбєЕ karas</l>
. <l n="b">c≈ЂбЄНƒБmaбєЗyanira mpu dharmaja k…Щd…ЩћД marбєЗƒБбєЕga saбєЕ hyaбєЕ smara</l>
185 <l n="c">ndan d≈ЂrƒБn kava≈ЫƒБбєЕave≈Ыa va≈ЫaniбєЕ puбєЕguбєЕ ri yƒБpan tuhu</l>
. <l n="d">sotan taбєЕ kavi vƒБhu vanva ri kilatniбєЕ sƒБgarƒБбєЕde l…Щy…Щp</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">бєЕ≈ЂnƒЂ kƒБla bhaбє≠ƒБra nƒБtha magave yogƒБdi sanismrћ•ti<!-- textual problem?--></l>
190 <l n="b">бєЕkƒБneбєЕ meru vukir vi≈Ыeбє£a patapƒБn saбєЕ siddhayogƒЂ≈Ыvara</l>
. <l n="c">h…ЩћДbniбєЕ dar≈Ыana tovi duбєЕhusi pasirniбєЕ lvah gihƒБ nyƒБpar…ЩћД</l><!-- understand duбєЕhus[n]i-->
. <l n="d">hyaбєЕniбєЕ hyaбєЕ pva sirƒБtapƒБpa ta kunaбєЕ sƒБdhyan muvah denira</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.09" n="9">
195 <l n="a">sotan tƒБpan avakniraбєЕ paramatattvƒБn≈Ђti<!-- norm. --> sarvƒБgama</l>
. <l n="b">≈ЂбєЕkƒБrƒБdi ≈ЫivƒБбєЕgasandhi patatƒБniбєЕ brahma<!-- brƒБhm edp -->mantrƒБkбє£ara</l>
. <l n="c">tiбєЕkahniбєЕ da≈Ыam≈Ђrti nitya gin…Щlar p…ЩћДhniбєЕ svaravya√±jana</l>
. <l n="d">s≈Ђkбє£maj√±ƒБna vi≈Ыeбє£a rakva humiбЄН…ЩбєЕ dhyƒБyƒЂ nirƒБlambana</l>
. </lg>
200 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">enak tiбєЕkahi de<!-- textual problem? --> bhaбє≠ƒБra rum…Щg…Щp lyusniбєЕ samƒБdhƒЂ hati</l><!-- tiбєЕkah[n]i-->
. <l n="b">tan vaбєЕ mƒБtra sumiбєЕhiteбєЕ sukha<!-- norm. --> lavan krƒЂбЄНƒБdi nƒБrƒЂkrama</l>
. <l n="c">heman r≈ЂmnikaбєЕ apsarƒЂ tan iniv…ЩћД de hyaбєЕ jagatkƒБraбєЗa</l>
. <l n="d">lƒБvan r≈Ђmni manis girƒЂndraduhitƒБdevƒЂ sumant…Щn rara</l>
205 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">kƒБvit pvaбєЕ <app><lem type="norm">surasaбєЕgha</lem><rdg wit="#edp">surasaбєЕghya</rdg></app> mogha sinuk≈Ђ deniбєЕ vat…Щk rƒБkбє£asa</l>
. <l n="b">vadvƒБniбєЕ jaya nƒЂlarudraka sumƒБr s…ЩћДs…ЩћДk t…ЩkeбєЕ kahyaбєЕan</l>
. <l n="c">riбєЕ senƒБpura tƒБбєЕaran ri sukuniбєЕ hemƒБdri lambvan kidul</l>
210 <l n="d">бєЕkƒБnan<!-- бєЕkƒБnaбєЕ? бєЕkƒБneбєЕ? --> durga kuбє≠anya bhƒЂбє£aбєЗa lurah ≈ЫobhƒБrar…Щm durjaya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">yekƒБбєЕde gigu ri hyaбєЕ adbhuta kabeh riбєЕ svargalokƒБrurah</l>
. <l n="b">sakveh saбєЕ da≈Ыalokarakбє£aka mah…ЩћДm tan sah paбЄНƒБlapk…Щna</l>
215 <l n="c">saбєЕ siddharбє£i vasiбє£бє≠ha nƒБrada tum≈Ђt gandharva len apsara</l>
. <l n="d">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ≈Ыakra sirƒБdhikƒБra pinatih бєЕkƒБneбєЕ sabhƒБmaбєЗбЄНala</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">sampunyƒБn patatƒБvatƒБraniбєЕ ah…ЩћДm saбєЕ hyaбєЕ trinetrƒБvuvus</l>
220 <l n="b">sojar vƒЂra surƒБpsara<!-- surƒБpбє£ara edp --> kita kabeh ndin dƒБya dentƒБpraбєЕa</l>
. <l n="c">brahmƒБ<!-- brƒБhmƒБ edp --> viбє£бєЗu huvus kav…Щs kav…Щn…Щsan sor sƒБra tovin laga</l>
. <l n="d">tan svƒЂn…Щn бєЕhulun iбєЕ raбєЗƒБбєЕgana hanƒБmetƒБ≈ЫrayƒБбєЕdohana</l><!-- problem with hana? -->
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.14" n="14">
225 <l n="a">yadyan hyaбєЕ parame≈ЫvarƒБstu ≈ЫaraбєЗƒБ tan paбєЕg…Щg…ЩћД sa√±jata</l>
. <l n="b">ƒБpan saбєЕgraha riбєЕ samastabhuvanƒБlaбєЕg…ЩбєЕ t…ЩбЄНuh ni≈Ыcala</l><!-- ƒБpan saбєЕharaniбєЕ?-->
. <l n="c">бєЕhiбєЕ r≈ЂpƒБdivi≈Ыeбє£a pa√±caviбє£ayƒБбєЕde rƒБga vƒБhyendriya</l>
. <l n="d">tan vyƒБpƒБra manahnirerika kabeh kevalya nirgrƒБhaka</l>
. </lg>
230 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">mojar saбєЕ maбєЕaran vrћ•haspati nihan topƒБya devƒБdhipa</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ kƒБma sira prih…Щn s…ЩkuбєЕanƒБmb…Щk ra dvijan yogyana</l>
. <l n="c">kon…ЩntƒБmanaheбєЕ raras hati maran rƒБgƒЂ bhaбє≠ƒБrƒБlulut</l>
. <l n="d">paбєЕgil saбєЕ hyaбєЕ umƒБ kak≈ЂбєЕananirƒБбєЕiбєЕkiбєЕ s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ kanyakƒБ</l>
235 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.16" n="16">
. <l n="a">yapvan sampun a≈Ыukra≈Ыonita sirƒБpaбєЕgih paбЄНƒБбєЕg…ЩћДбєЕ smara</l>
. <l n="b">veh…Щn pvaбєЕ s…Щkar <app><lem wit="#edp">aбєЕlaбєЕit</lem><note>Emend iбєЕ laбєЕit? eбєЕ laбєЕit? (Zoetmulder)</note></app>
. <!--
240 Sum 29.10a abhrƒБ lvir s…Щkar iбєЕ laбєЕit braja katon pam…Щv…Щh i supit iбєЕ sahiбєЕ-sahiбєЕ
. Sum 179.3c vvant…Щn luбєЕgah ik√ҐбєЕavetan am…Щn…Щr s…Щkar ika kadi k…ЩmbaбєЕ iбєЕ laбєЕit
. BY <13.04b> sumyuk taбєЕ rudhir√Ґpar…ЩбєЕ lavan urƒБni s…Щkarira vat…Щk бєЫбє£√ЃбєЕ laбєЕit
. -->
. maбєЕiбЄНama ≈ЫrƒЂ pƒБrvatƒЂ prƒБrthanan</l>
245 <l n="c">бєЕkƒБ tƒБ veh…Щn anona vƒБhana salahr≈ЂpƒБ dvipendrƒБnana</l>
. <l n="d">rodrƒБrudranikeбєЕ upƒБya vulik…Щn pet…Щn pagantƒБk…Щna</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.17" n="17">
. <l n="a">nƒБhan sƒБra vuvus vrћ•haspati yinogyan de hyaбєЕ indrƒБбєЕal…Щm</l>
250 <l n="b">ƒБpan paбєЗбЄНita siddhavƒБkya pinatih deniбєЕ vat…Щk devatƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">tovin ≈Ыabdaka vedapƒБraga v…ЩkasniбєЕ nƒЂti riбєЕ kahyaбєЕan</l>
. <l n="d">vruh riбєЕ ≈ЫƒБstra kuбє≠ƒБramantra бєЕuniveh <app><lem>cƒБбєЗakya</lem><rdg wit="#edp">cƒБrakya</rdg></app> kƒБmandaka</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.18" n="18">
255 <l n="a">saбєЕsiptan vuvus…Щn mareбєЕ smarasabhƒБбєЕg…Щh saбєЕ vat…Щk devatƒБ</l>
. <l n="b">lumrƒБ riбєЕ gaganƒБбєЕavetan ahavan riбєЕ vi≈Ыvade≈ЫƒБrar…Щm</l>
. <l n="c">ton tekƒБбєЕ smararƒБjya kƒБdbhuta l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ nyƒБsanya deniбєЕ s…Щkar</l>
. <l n="d">hint…Щn gƒБtrani gopuranya lumarap sƒБkбє£ƒБt k…ЩбЄНapniбєЕ kilat</l>
. </lg>
260 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.19" n="19">
. <l n="a">bapranyƒБбєЕililan karaбєЕ tinaravaбєЕ lƒЂlƒБn pani√±jo tavaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ deni ruhurnya lƒБgi hinarasniбєЕ cƒБmarƒБriбєЕguбєЕan</l>
. <l n="c">s…ЩћДбєЕniбєЕ candra siniddhikƒБra ginave bvat rƒБga <app><lem type="norm">≈ЫuddhƒБputih</lem><rdg wit="#edp">suddhƒБputih</rdg></app></l>
. <!-- Sum 42.7d mavvat rƒБga vilƒБpa cihna niбєЕ ak≈ЂбєЕ alah al…Щh akirim-kirim бє≠ikƒБ
265 CK viбє£aya si tama humvat rƒБga vrћ•ddhi,
. -->
. <l n="d">tapvan marma hat…Щpnya megha minirahniбєЕ sandhyakƒБlƒБnipis</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.20" n="20">
270 <l n="a">parpƒБtniбєЕ vataбєЕan t…ЩkeбєЕ alun-alun mƒБs jƒБti norƒБs…Щlat</l>
. <l n="b">tan pendah r…Щm apiбєЗбЄНa tambaki <app><lem type="norm">gaбЄНuh</lem><rdg wit="#edp">guбЄНuh</rdg></app>nyƒБбєЕde hulapniбєЕ mulat</l>
. <l n="c">sinvamniбєЕ kayu kalpavrћ•kбє£a tinatƒБkumram vuvuбєЕnyƒБmirah</l>
. <l n="d">humbutniбєЕ suradƒБru vastrani patƒБkanyƒБбєЕ…Щp…Щr kƒБбєЕinan</l>
. </lg>
275 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.21" n="21">
. <l n="a">tanpa mvas maбєЗicandranƒЂla<!-- em. maбєЗi sendranƒЂla? --> rin…Щm…Щk sa≈ЫrƒЂ natarnyƒБkiris</l>
. <l n="b">aбєЕlƒЂlƒБ kayu pƒБrijƒБta ri tamanyƒБnraбєЕ pralambƒБvil…Щt</l>
. <l n="c">k…ЩmbaбєЕnyƒБ√±jrah anekavarбєЗa sinavuбєЕniбєЕ jaбєЕga jambat mure</l>
. <l n="d">sumrƒБk r≈Ђmni rur≈Ђnya lƒБgi pinal…ЩhniбєЕ kasturi mvaбєЕ j…Щnu</l>
280 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.22" n="22">
. <l n="a">lor vetanya gunuбєЕ-gunuбєЕ marakatƒБбєЕde k≈ЂбєЕ cinaбєЗбЄНyƒБruhur</l>
. <l n="b">vvainyƒБhniбєЕ sumirat mareбєЕ avaбєЕ-avaбєЕ saбєЕke pucaknyƒБбєЕad…Щg</l>
. <l n="c">hƒЂs-hƒЂsnyƒБniram iбєЕ tah…Щn satumuvuh бєЕkƒБne taman hyaбєЕ smara</l>
285 <l n="d">pakбє£inyƒБrja majƒЂva-jƒЂva sumahur harбє£e kukusniбєЕ ba√±u</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_02.23" n="23">
. <l n="a">tanбєЕeh yan vuvus…Щn laбєЕ…ЩћДni pak…Щk…ЩsniбєЕ kƒБmadevagrћ•ha</l>
. <l n="b">sakvehniбєЕ hyaбєЕ alah maбєЕ…ЩћД t…ЩkapikƒБбєЕ nyƒБsƒБti≈ЫobhƒБhal…Щp</l>
290 <l n="c">ƒБpan бєЕke sariniбєЕ manohara v…ЩkasniбєЕ tattva liбєЕ saбєЕ kavi</l>
. <l n="d">vvitniбєЕ ≈ЫƒБsana kƒБmatantra tin…ЩбєЕ…Щt pinrƒБkrћ•tƒБбєЕde kathƒБ</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="kƒБmamƒБlƒБ" n="2" xml:id="Smaradahana_03">
295 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">arar…Щm hyaбєЕ indra бЄНat…ЩбєЕ iбєЕ smarabhavana lavan vat…Щk rћ•бє£i</l>
. <l n="b">makaradhvajƒБkrama sumaбєЕgraha vihikan i tiбєЕhaliбєЕ tamuy</l>
. <l n="c">vruh iбєЕ arghyapƒБda saha cƒБmana hinaturak…Щn sagorava</l>
. <l n="d">da≈ЫalokapƒБla tan adoh yama baruбєЗa kuvera muбєЕgu lor</l>
300 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">mavuvus bhaбє≠ƒБra harirƒБja ri sira saбєЕ iniбє£бє≠i mƒБsiha</l>
. <l n="b">iki hetuniбєЕ бЄНat…ЩбєЕ i rƒБjya manasija har…Щp maбєЕƒБ≈Ыraya</l>
. <l n="c">gati saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ƒЂ≈Ыvara jagatpati j…Щn…Щk aбєЕiv…ЩћД tapabrata</l>
305 <l n="d">sahajƒБlupeбєЕ asuratantra tan atutur i tatvaniбєЕ smara</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">kita pƒБvakiбєЕ turida rƒБga kita pinakapƒБ≈ЫaniбєЕ dadi</l>
. <l n="b">kita sƒБra sƒБriniбєЕ asaбєЕgama suka kita s≈Ђkбє£ma riбєЕ rasa</l>
310 <l n="c">pahak≈ЂбєЕ manahnira tadhƒБraбєЗa g…Щs…ЩбєЕana riбєЕ smarƒБnala</l>
. <l n="d">panah iбєЕ raras hati hudanhudani l…Щvu sarantaniбєЕ lulut</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">na vuvus hyaбєЕ indra sumahur hyaбєЕ atanu tan ulahniбєЕ ƒБ≈Ыraya</l>
315 <l n="b">mapa dƒБyaniбєЕ hulun aveha lara turida rƒБganiбєЕ guru</l>
. <l n="c">sira devaniбєЕ sura vi≈Ыeбє£a satata niyatƒБбєЕupadrava</l>
. <l n="d">kadi <app><lem type="norm">laбєЕghanƒБ</lem><rdg wit="#edp">laбєЕghyanƒБ</rdg></app> бєЕvaбєЕ i pakon surapati ri patik ≈Ыatakratu</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.05" n="5">
320 <l n="a">mavuvus vrћ•haspati gumanti gumaбєЗagaбєЗa nƒЂti riбєЕ hati</l>
. <l n="b">upapatti denira ma≈Ыabda madhura pinarak…ЩniбєЕ hayu</l>
. <l n="c">apa saбєЕ≈Ыayanta ri pakonira surapati bhara t≈Ђtak…Щn</l>
. <l n="d">makadona pƒБnaka bhaбє≠ƒБra m…Щjahana si nƒЂlarudraka</l>
. </lg>
325 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">yadiyan k…ЩnƒБ ta kita ≈ЫƒБpatha tan arusuheбєЕ mahƒБdvija</l>
. <l n="b">ri bhaбє≠ƒБra ≈ЫaбєЕkara surendra duluraniбєЕ aminta sihnira</l>
. <l n="c">jalareka mƒБtra sakar…ЩбєЕ бЄНavuhi g…Щl…ЩбєЕirƒБn inastuti</l>
. <l n="d">umaluy ri jƒБtinira somya sumirama kiteбєЕ varƒБmrћ•ta</l>
330 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">ri huvus vrћ•haspati ma≈Ыabda kusuma≈Ыara tanpa naбєЕ≈Ыaya</l>
. <l n="b">apag…Щh ri tan v…ЩnaбєЕa saбєЕ r…Щбє£i mujarak…ЩnaбєЕ apakrama</l>
. <l n="c">tinitah tikƒБбєЕ rahayu lampahanira savat…Щk surƒБpsara</l>
335 <l n="d">mara riбєЕ mahƒБgiri tum≈Ђtak…Щna saбєЕ adhikƒБra manmatha</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.08" n="8">
. <l n="a"><app>
. <lem type="norm">surasaбєЕgha</lem>
340 <rdg wit="#edp">surasaбєЕghya</rdg>
. </app> mƒБntuk iniriбєЕnira sahaja huvus ginopitan</l>
. <l n="b">i rikƒБбєЕ pituбєЕ v…ЩбєЕi hiner ≈Ыubhadivasa ri taбєЕgaliбєЕ kapƒБt</l>
. <l n="c">makaradhvajƒБ mad…Щg adan krama tumama sire dal…Щm puri</l>
. <l n="d">madarƒБganiбєЕ hati sum…ЩћДk sama jaladhi ri p≈ЂrбєЗaniбєЕ ≈Ыa≈Ыi</l>
345 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">hana laryalaryan aбєЕuбєЕaбєЕ tavaбєЕ apayuбєЕ a≈ЫokapƒБdapa</l>
. <l n="b">gin…Щlar tikƒБ s…ЩminikƒБбєЕ kayu manis i hat…Щpnya t≈Ђt sisi</l>
. <l n="c">atilam s…Щv…ЩћДniбєЕ asanƒБr…Щja l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ alaбєЕitlaбєЕit gaбЄНuбєЕ</l>
350 <l n="d">b…ЩsariбєЕ puбЄНak jamanikanya sinuji t…Щt…ЩsiбєЕ himƒБnipis</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">i rikƒБ ta rƒБmya kahanan manasijadayitƒБбєЕaran ratih</l>
. <l n="b">alaбєЕ…ЩћД sumuбєЕk…Щm i rikƒБбєЕ sarasija ginave karaбєЕ hulu</l>
355 <l n="c">≈Ыa≈Ыira≈Ыmi sa√±caya tapihnira pakirim i vimbaniбєЕ vulan</l>
. <l n="d">tinulis riбєЕ indra≈Ыara cƒБtaka kin…ЩбЄНap i tejaniбєЕ kilat</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">tuna buddhiniбєЕ kavi tumiбєЕhal i hayunira piбєЗбЄНa sƒБgara</l>
360 <l n="b">r…Щm…ЩбєЕ aбєЕdadak sumaputiбєЕ mina ri savaбєЕikƒБбєЕ g…ЩluбєЕ lukar</l>
. <l n="c">tri valƒЂ sumiбєЕhit aбєЕaluntuha t…Щkapi paбєЕolnikƒБбєЕ tapih</l>
. <l n="d">laбє≠i tan dahat mirahikƒБmapat ivak inahƒБk…Щn aбєЕlare</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.12" n="12">
365 <l n="a">riбєЕ apan katon licina mahya sira karak…Щtan raras hati</l>
. <l n="b">kavil…Щt ri puбєЗбЄНutan areh talitalinika tan v…ЩnaбєЕ l…Щpas</l>
. <l n="c">t…ЩkapiбєЕ tapih kalusitƒБ ri t…ЩбєЕahira nusarnusar susu</l>
. <l n="d">бєЕhiбєЕ ikƒБбєЕ a≈ЫokavanavƒБsa ri g…ЩluбєЕanirƒБnusupnusup</l>
. </lg>
370 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">kadi candra taбєЕgal i halisniran am…Щn…Щrak…Щn parasparas</l>
. <l n="b">pam…Щv…ЩhnikƒБбєЕ turida len hava hunaбєЕ amikƒБra riбєЕ maбєЕ…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="c">griбєЕikƒБбєЕ tulahniбєЕ aбєЕajap ri sira l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ aluбєЕsuran lulut</l>
. <l n="d">lara k≈ЂбєЕ raras hati barƒЂbarini rarasiran tiniбєЕhalan</l>
375 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.14" n="14">
. <l n="a">tan alah ginanti kavi r≈Ђmnira siriбєЕak…ЩneбєЕ pasir vukir</l>
. <l n="b">sihuбєЕiбєЕ hyu varбєЗani sadak sidakira kadi k…ЩmbaбєЕiбєЕ tal…Щs</l>
. <l n="c">kadi n≈Ђбє£a k…Щmbar alaбєЕ…ЩћД s…Щmuni susunirƒБmucaбєЕ gaбЄНiбєЕ</l>
380 <l n="d">kilatiбєЕ tavaбєЕ karivutan paбЄНani v…ЩtisirƒБn paбєЕertali</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕiбєЕ taman savaбєЕi r≈Ђmnira kadi liriбєЕ iбєЕ laбєЕit l…ЩбєЕit</l>
. <l n="b">svaбєЕ amimba lu√±cipi halisnira sadadali m…ЩћДr hanambayaбєЕ</l>
385 <l n="c">laбє≠i бєЕeraбєЕiбєЕ tiбєЕatiбєЕƒБs…Щkar aбєЕaruбєЗa ≈Ыeбє£aniбєЕ vukir</l>
. <l n="d">kucupiбєЕ m…ЩбєЗur mara c…Щc…Щkc…Щc…Щkira kadi kuntul aбєЕlayaбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.16" n="16">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ apƒБlapanta laga siбєЕhiti hayunira piбєЗбЄНa papraбєЕan</l>
390 <l n="b">sama paбєЕkajƒБmirah ikƒБбєЕ susu sarudhira kosariбєЕ raбєЕin</l>
. <l n="c">anamar lulut g…ЩluбєЕirƒБr…Щja sasuruh ikƒБravis hir…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">kadi dƒБlaniбєЕ kumuda rosni t…ЩбєЕahira savaбєЕ galah tik…Щl</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.17" n="17">
395 <l n="a">aparan kunaбєЕ pinakam≈Ђlani hayunika tanpa siбєЕsiбєЕan</l>
. <l n="b">laбє≠i tan juruh tan avakiбєЕ gula yayan amanis t…ЩkeбєЕ mata</l>
. <l n="c">vaja tan vvahiбєЕ vuni tuhun kapihas…Щm un…ЩбєЕiбєЕ tumon sira</l>
. <l n="d">v…Щtis aбєЕrag…Щt hati nirantara tuhutuhu janmaniбєЕ puбЄНak</l>
. </lg>
400 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.18" n="18">
. <l n="a">yan al≈Ђma sinvamiбєЕ a≈Ыoka sinuluhan i tambvaбєЕiбєЕ vulan</l>
. <l n="b">liriбєЕiбєЕ vulat maliбєЕ aбєЕƒЂrak…Щn apuhara r…Щs sarƒЂ maбєЕ…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="c">ririsiбєЕ kapƒБt sahaja tanpa mijahak…Щna rƒБganiбєЕ kavi</l>
. <l n="d">kabalik dahat l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕikƒБ tan aluluta tumon i r≈Ђmnira</l>
405 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_03.19" n="19">
. <l n="a">adavƒБn patantrani manisni hayunira taбєЕeh kathƒБk…Щna</l>
. <l n="b">sira kƒБmadeva caritan pamuhunira gumanti varбєЗan…Щn</l>
. <l n="c">dumunuбєЕ ri saбєЗбЄНiбєЕi ratihnira mavarah i ≈ЫokaniбєЕ hati</l>
410 <l n="d">tama riбєЕ kumƒБrajaya≈ЫƒБstra kadi sira yan oбєЕsiliбєЕ guyu</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="rƒБgakusuma" n="3" xml:id="Smaradahana_04">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.01" n="1">
415 <l n="a">dyah saбєЕ luбєЕgahi sihku sinvami lulutku pavil…Щtani rƒБganiбєЕ hulun</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ t…ЩбєЕg…ЩћД ri tuvuhku saбєЕ s…Щmini kiбєЕkiбєЕiбєЕ alara b…Щsur k…ЩneбєЕ riris</l>
. <l n="c">aбєЕlƒЂlƒБбєЕalayƒБ laбєЕ…Щnku sinirirniбєЕ unaбєЕ anaбєЕis aбєЕgagap tavaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">puбєЕg…Щl tanpa s…Щv…ЩћД kinarya kinaraбєЕkaraбєЕ inahal i ≈ЫaktiniбєЕ vidhi</l>
. </lg>
420 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">≈Ыoka pvaбєЕ katibƒБn s…ЩkarniбєЕ asanƒБn…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ inusir i saбєЕhubiбєЕ nadƒЂ</l>
. <l n="b">duhkha pvaбєЕ rum…ЩбєЕ…ЩћД r…ЩбєЕihniбєЕ aбєЕaraбєЕ cala karag…Щt i tuбєЕtuбєЕiбєЕ kuku</l>
. <l n="c">eraбєЕ pvaбєЕ linavadlavad ri k…Щt…ЩriбєЕ pat…Щr amar…ЩбєЕi tambvaбєЕiбєЕ vulan</l>
. <l n="d">tanpemba prihatinku sakбє£aбєЗa sakeбєЕ avaбєЕavaбєЕ ibu toh tuluбєЕ бєЕhulun</l>
425 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">dyah pamvitniбєЕ ak≈ЂбєЕ tinalyan iбєЕ unaбєЕ kavil…Щt i r…Щc…ЩpiбєЕ tapih suji</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕsƒБra бєЕvaбєЕ al…Щh rinimpus i lulutku pinahat…ЩguhiбєЕ raras hati</l>
. <l n="c">mantaбєЕ matya kasiбєЕs…Щtan turida rƒБga lukaraбєЗa b…Щsur k…ЩneбєЕ lara</l>
430 <l n="d">rapvan ≈ЫƒЂghra huvƒБ laraбєЕku бЄНat…ЩбєЕeбєЕ vukir alal…Щh alantaran juraбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">paбєЕdeniбєЕ da≈ЫalokapƒБla sahajƒБmujimuji guбєЗakƒБyaniбєЕ hulun</l>
. <l n="b">paбєЕg…ЩћДбєЕ karya bhaбє≠ƒБra cakra karuhun paбєЕasihasihiraбєЕ vat…Щk rћ•бє£i</l>
435 <l n="c">sambandhanya bhaбє≠ƒБra nƒБtha j…Щn…Щk iбєЕ tapa tan atutur iбєЕ samƒБgama</l>
. <l n="d">muбєЕgv iбєЕ meru бє£aбЄНaбєЕga yoga sinamƒБhitaniran asamƒБdhi nitya≈Ыa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">ndƒБ tan lyan <app><lem wit="#edp" type="norm">hinam…Щr rum…Щ√±c…Щm</lem><rdg wit="#msL884">hinam…ЩћД rum…Щ√±c…Щma</rdg></app> raras hatiniran abhiyoga riбєЕ brata</l>
440 <l n="b">aбєЕhiбєЕ sa√±jata rƒБka rakryan inadrћ•≈Ыya rumimaбєЕa bhaбє≠ƒБra ≈ЫaбєЕkara</l>
. <l n="c">tan hyaбєЕ manmatha paбєЕhiбЄН…Щpku rari yan luputa sira linakбє£an iбєЕ hulun</l>
. <l n="d">rapvan siddha pakon ≈Ыatakratu krћ•taj√±a rumuraha tapa hyaбєЕ ƒЂ≈Ыvara</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.06" n="6">
445 <l n="a">lvƒБmb…ЩktƒБri paran kasuбєЕsuti manahta mar…ЩбєЕur…ЩбєЕu varбєЗa suбєЕkava</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕhiбєЕ gaбєЕsal v…ЩбєЕi t antyak…Щn lavasaniбєЕ hulun aparaparan mareбєЕ g…Щg…Щr</l>
. <l n="c">yadyastun t…Щka k≈ЂбєЕa rakryan ibu k…ЩћДlak…Щna ri hati hayva g…ЩћДбєЕ lara</l>
. <l n="d">tiбєЕhal riбєЕ vukir aбєЕlimuбєЕsuбєЕi limut hinaruhara t…ЩkapnikƒБбєЕ aбєЕin</l>
. </lg>
450 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">lƒБvan tan hana cƒБtakƒБбєЕlayat aniбєЕgalak…Щna l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕiбєЕ tah…Щn ragas</l>
. <l n="b">kumbaбєЕ m…ЩћДr akaraбєЕkaraбєЕ tarahudan kab…Щsurana muvah mareбєЕ gihƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">mvaбєЕ si√±jaбєЕniбєЕ inambilan tapih umantuk i pan…Щpi t…ЩkƒБбєЕdadak r…ЩбєЕu</l>
. <l n="d">induбєЕ maбєЕkana ta бєЕhulun t…Щka mamaбєЕkva ri kitarari muбєЕgaheбєЕ jin…Щm</l>
455 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">yapvan riбєЕ hinaras payodhara v…ЩkasniбєЕ amuhara raras k…ЩneбєЕ taбєЕan</l>
. <l n="b">yan riбєЕ r≈Ђm pipiniбєЕ vineh s…Щpah anuбєЕsuбєЕ i r…ЩбєЕuni halisnya tan cala</l>
. <l n="c">yan kon…ЩбєЕ vin…ЩkasniбєЕ uttama ruma√±ca hatiniбєЕ apasah бЄНat…ЩбєЕ h…Щl…Щm</l>
460 <l n="d">ndyah ndin ta бєЕvaбєЕ atiбєЕgale kita l…Щh…ЩбєЕ бєЕvaбєЕ adulura sukƒБбєЕkvacaбєЕkrama</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">yadyastun kita milva kuбєЗбЄНaбєЕa katon riv…Щgani lakuniбєЕvaбєЕ iбєЕ h…Щnu</l>
. <l n="b">d≈Ђran sƒБra kiteбєЕ havan vatu ridaбєЕ maбєЕuladalid inambah eбєЕguбєЕan</l>
465 <l n="c">s…ЩбєЕkan hƒБvan adoh juraбєЕ tr…Щbis ar…Щs panilukani ba√±unya riбєЕ suk…Щt</l>
. <l n="d">heman gƒБtranikuбєЕ v…Щtis karag…ЩtƒБnana kadi puбЄНak uбєЕgvaniбєЕ бє≠ika</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">nƒБhan sabdanirƒБmanis t…Щh…Щr aбєЕol t…ЩбєЕahira kasusup t…ЩkeбєЕ tapih</l>
470 <l n="b">saбєЕ sinvƒЂ miбєЕay aбєЕdadak tik…Щl ikƒБбєЕ halis amah…Щli kabvatan r…ЩбєЕu</l>
. <l n="c">r…Щ√±c…Щm tvasnira rukбє£a tanpa ham…ЩбєЕan r…Щm…Щk apuhara luh nirantara</l>
. <l n="d">mojar saбєЕ pinakƒБdhikƒБravanitƒБm…Щtu ratihira mogha vƒБdhaka</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.11" n="11">
475 <l n="a">sojar hyaбєЕ smaranƒБtha hayva cinalan vuvusiбєЕ adhama ≈Ыoka saбєЕ≈Ыaya</l>
. <l n="b">yan hyaбєЕ ≈ЫaбєЕkara vigrahan kadi tan antuka juga kusumeбє£u riбєЕ purƒЂ</l>
. <l n="c">ƒБpan hyaбєЕ tripurƒБntakƒБgaбєЗitam≈Ђrti tuvi sira vi≈Ыeбє£a devatƒБ</l>
. <l n="d">tovin kƒБlanirƒБsamƒБdhi humiбЄН…Щp h…ЩniбєЕi h…Щn…ЩбєЕirƒБsadƒБ smrћ•ti</l>
. </lg>
480 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">hƒБtniбєЕ maprabhu sihniбєЕ apriya lulutniбєЕ as…Щn…ЩбєЕ iki hetuniбєЕ vuvus</l>
. <l n="b">ƒБpan tan vyabhicƒБra g…ЩћДбєЕaniбєЕ upadrava kat…Щvasa de smarƒБdhipa</l>
. <l n="c">lƒБvan viбє£krћ•ta durnimitta sumaput niyata pinakad≈ЂtaniбєЕ hala</l>
. <l n="d">v…ЩћДrniбєЕ бє£aбЄНpada vibhramƒБбєЕhr…ЩбєЕ anaбєЕis humuбєЕ asurahan iбєЕ surƒБlaya</l>
485 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">riбєЕ tƒБman kum…Щ√±ar katonani s…ЩkarniбєЕ asana l…Щvu denikƒБбєЕ aбєЕin</l>
. <l n="b">puбєЕg…Щl mimba gaбЄНuбєЕnya mogha tumibƒБбєЕ hr…Щbuk i puбЄНakikƒБбєЕhudan havu</l>
. <l n="c">nistejƒБ kayu teja mant…Щn akuvuбєЕkuvuбєЕ av…Щn…Щs ikƒБбєЕ valƒЂkaбЄН…Щp</l>
490 <l n="d">tan ≈ЫobhƒБkalaбєЕan jariбєЕnika malantiбєЕan ika maбєЕavandha riбєЕ tah…Щn</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.14" n="14">
. <l n="a">saбєЕsiptan pituhun pataбєЕg…Щhi patik manasija ri l…Щb≈Ђni j…ЩћДбєЕ prabhu</l>
. <l n="b">tan saбєЕkeбєЕ vruh iбєЕ iбєЕgitƒБnahanahƒБ t…ЩmahananiбєЕ asampay iбєЕ guru</l>
495 <l n="c">tan yogya patin…Щn vuvus hyaбєЕ amarƒБdhipa sira paraba√±canenucap</l>
. <l n="d">mƒБtimƒБti kinon ri tan sav…ЩnaбєЕanya dinunuбєЕak…ЩniбєЕ kriyƒБbhaya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_04.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">dyah tan maбєЕkana cƒБra donira sacƒЂpati sumariha kƒЂrtya riбєЕ jagat</l>
500 <l n="b">p≈ЂrбєЗƒБniбєЕ sakadevatan makapurƒБsala hilaбєЕanikƒБбєЕ durƒБtmaka</l>
. <l n="c">бєЕvaбєЕ sampun hinar…Щphar…Щp tan ahal…Щp t…Щka mal…Щm…Щh i kƒБrya saбєЕ mahƒБn</l>
. <l n="d">denyan kƒБntaka yan jagaddhitanimitta saphala masiluбєЕluбєЕaбєЕ ya≈Ыa</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
505 <div type="canto" rend="met" met="vasantatilakƒБ" n="4" xml:id="Smaradahana_05">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">nƒБhan vi≈Ыeбє£a paбєЕucap kusumƒБstrapƒБбєЗi</l>
. <l n="b">devƒЂ ratih kah…Щn…ЩбєЕan v…Щkasan tumuбєЕkul</l>
. <l n="c">tvas mogha saбєЕ≈Ыaya ri pƒБtya bhaбє≠ƒБra kƒБma</l>
510 <l n="d">varбє£e kapƒБt paбЄНani luhnira saбєЕ≈ЫayƒБdr…Щs</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">saбєЕsipta sampunira ≈Ыoka mas…ЩћД masaбєЗбЄНiбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">lvir joбєЕ kuniбєЕ savava бЄНampa vuluбєЕ rumaбєЕk…Щp</l>
515 <l n="c">sƒБkбє£ƒБt kucup kag…Щr…Щhan sira somya kƒБlih</l>
. <l n="d">≈ЂrбєЗa s…Щkar taji hal…Щpnira marman uбєЕg≈Ђ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">≈ЫrƒЂ manmathƒБvuvuh ikƒБбєЕ madarƒБga riбєЕ tvas</l>
520 <l n="b">yan ton manisni mukha saбєЕ kusumƒБstraputrƒЂ</l>
. <l n="c">pa√±cendriyƒБmiбє£aya marma t…ЩkeбєЕ svacitta</l>
. <l n="d">nƒБ hetuniбєЕ mar…Щk aбєЕol manukup sakahyun</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.04" n="4">
525 <l n="a">liбєЗбЄН≈Ђ tikƒБбєЕ salah ulah kum…Щdut paranti</l>
. <l n="b">lot kƒБla d≈Ђtani tapih saбєЕ ar≈Ђm kasiбєЕkap</l>
. <l n="c">yekiбєЗ бЄНat…ЩбєЕ pralaya saбєЕ kadi p≈ЂrбєЗacandra</l>
. <l n="d">moghƒБb…Щlah kapasukan t…ЩkapiбєЕ prahasya</l>
. </lg>
530 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">aбєЕhiбєЕ pataбєЕ siki katon amah…Щl savarya</l>
. <l n="b">sampun prave≈Ыa kaharas riбєЕ anindya nƒБrƒЂ</l>
. <l n="c">saбєЕ lvir laбєЕit kakilatan tiki durbalƒБбєЕr…Щs</l>
. <l n="d">sƒБkбє£ƒБt guguh mak…Щmilan maбєЕudud kapuбєЗбЄНuбєЕ</l>
535 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">saбєЕsipta maбєЕkana vilƒБ≈Ыaniran pasaбєЗбЄНiбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">bvat kƒБmatantra vini≈Ыeбє£a kasaбєЕganiбєЕ strƒЂ</l>
. <l n="c">aбєЕhiбєЕ samƒБdhi japa mantra t…ЩkeбєЕ kamokбє£an</l>
540 <l n="d">p≈ЂjƒБбєЕkusiбєЕ j…Щn…Щk apum divarƒБtrikƒБla</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">luбєЕhƒБ tikƒБбєЕ divasakƒБla surup hyaбєЕ arka</l>
. <l n="b">meghƒБmirah kadi kalas tumulis laбєЕitnya</l>
545 <l n="c">himp…Щr jahit papatihan hul…ЩsiбєЕ sake jro</l>
. <l n="d">keбєЕis katon i v…ЩtisiбєЕ mavulaбєЕ masampir</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ni≈ЫƒБkara gumanti t…ЩkƒБбєЕrarah truh</l>
550 <l n="b">nitya pradakбє£iбєЗa gavenira sƒБrisƒБri</l>
. <l n="c">lƒЂlƒБs…Щn…ЩћД ri l…ЩbuhiбєЕ suralokan uбєЕg≈Ђ</l>
. <l n="d">maбєЕgalyaniбєЕ rћ•бє£igaбєЗƒБmrћ•ta ≈ЫƒЂtara≈Ыmi</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.09" n="9">
555 <l n="a">vidyƒБdharƒЂ kav…Щkasan smarabƒБбєЗa nitya</l>
. <l n="b">moghƒБlaбєЕ…ЩћД vijah agoбє£бє≠i paбЄНƒБmajaбєЕ lek</l>
. <l n="c">len lƒБlanƒБбєЕulihulih rarasiбєЕ vilƒБ≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="d">bvat siбєЗбЄНi deniбєЕ amuvus saha guyvaguyvan</l>
. </lg>
560 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">kƒЂrбєЗaбєЕ tabaбєЕtabaбєЕ ar≈Ђm masarik pinuбєЕpaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">vƒЂбєЗa samƒБpta vinivakбє£a hanan ginitan</l>
. <l n="c">saptasvarenik…Щt iniбєЕgita yan panr…Щtta</l>
. <l n="d">tapvƒБlaбєЕ…ЩћД sin…ЩlaбєЕan rasa pƒБna matsya</l>
565 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">len taбєЕ mareбєЕ suranadƒЂ saha ceбє≠ikƒБdyus</l>
. <l n="b">denyƒБsib≈Ђ muni humuбєЕ kaharan mrћ•daбєЕga</l>
. <l n="c">r≈ЂmniбєЕ vidƒБvaбєЕi linuбєЕsurak…Щn rak…Щtnya</l>
570 <l n="d">sumrƒБk lavan paбєЕisi k…ЩmbaбєЕ alum haneбєЕ ryak</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">t≈Ђt svarganirjhara hilƒЂ suranimnagƒБdr…Щs</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕkƒБnƒБ siluknya бЄНavuhan hana dharma≈ЫƒБla</l>
575 <l n="c">raбєЕkaбєЕ maбєЗik pinakad≈Ђri t…ЩkeбєЕ t…Щt…ЩћДnya</l>
. <l n="d">dƒБl…Щm katon bhramarapakбє£a lum…ЩбєЕ hat…Щpnya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">бЄНaбєЕ hyaбєЕ vrћ•haspati sirenadhikƒБra muбєЕg≈Ђ</l>
580 <l n="b">paбєЕliбєЕga saptar…Щбє£i kapva humuбєЕ maveda</l>
. <l n="c">mvaбєЕ ≈Ыr≈ЂtivƒБkya vinicƒБra paбЄНƒБvatƒБra</l>
. <l n="d">len gh≈ЂrбєЗitƒБc…ЩбєЕil amet halaniбєЕ pramƒБбєЗa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.14" n="14">
585 <l n="a">gaбєЕgƒБlaбєЕ…ЩћД pinakamƒБrganikƒБбєЕ ≈Ыa≈ЫƒБбєЕka</l>
. <l n="b">simpaбєЕ ri ra√±jiбєЕanikƒБбєЕabarat hilƒЂnya</l>
. <l n="c">≈ЫuddhƒБh…ЩniбєЕ linaraбєЕan tin…ЩбєЕ…ЩћДt laбєЕ…ЩћДnya</l>
. <l n="d">vinvat mare raбєЗu бЄНat…ЩбєЕ ri taman hyaбєЕ indra</l>
. </lg>
590 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">nyƒБsƒБlaбєЕ…ЩћД kal…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕan lalayan vinindu</l>
. <l n="b">ri jro grћ•hƒБr…Щja ri d≈Ђnya dud≈Ђ kramanya</l>
. <l n="c">uбєЕgvan hyaбєЕ indra rumarah tapihiбєЕ surastri</l>
. <l n="d">бєЕkƒБneбєЕ umah salah ukur paбєЕaran kasaбєЕkya</l>
595 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.16" n="16">
. <l n="a">kulvan kidulnya ginagƒБ linurah havanya</l>
. <l n="b">endah gunuбєЕnya ginave minahƒБ guhƒБnya</l>
. <l n="c">tƒЂranya caбєЗбЄНi maбєЗi bajra l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ pinatra</l>
600 <l n="d">hyaбєЕ nandaka sphaбє≠ika ≈Ыuddha pucapucaknya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.17" n="17">
. <l n="a">sasvarga siбєЕhiti hal…Щpnya paбЄНƒБpadudvan</l>
. <l n="b">riбєЕ saptaloka paбЄНa tiбєЕkah akaбєЗбЄНakaбєЗбЄНa</l>
605 <l n="c">rƒБjyƒБtatƒБlal…Щh aбєЕumbaбєЕ iбєЕ antarƒЂkбє£a</l>
. <l n="d">s…ЩћДбєЕs…ЩћДбєЕniбєЕ osadhilatƒБ kum…Щ√±ar damarnya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_05.18" n="18">
. <l n="a">luбєЕhƒБбєЕ kul…Щm krama бЄНavuh pitu saбєЕ≈ЫayƒБvƒБs</l>
610 <l n="b">hyaбєЕ ≈ЫƒЂtara≈Ыmi kapaбєЕulvan iбєЕ astapƒБr≈Ыva</l>
. <l n="c">vaitalikƒБnuliбєЕ aganti gavenya бєЕ≈Ђni</l>
. <l n="d">ceбєЕniбєЕ curiбєЕ pilipilih sajiniбєЕ jahat ken</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
615 <div type="canto" rend="met" met="giri≈Ыa" n="5" xml:id="Smaradahana_06">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">sahaja sum…ЩpaбєЕ endah s…ЩћДбєЕniбєЕ parvata humaraбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">sahidu mirah as…ЩбєЕhit kosap deniбєЕ aбєЕar…Щki</l>
. <l n="c">kadi latulatuniбєЕ mƒБs hyaбєЕ ve vahu cumaraбєЗa</l>
620 <l n="d">aruбєЗa kadi rajƒБbƒБбєЕ bvat saбєЕgrama piniturun</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">≈Ыubhadivasa riбєЕ e√±jiбєЕ prƒБpteбєЕ kƒБla pasamayan</l>
. <l n="b">sahanahananikƒБбєЕ hyaбєЕ kapvƒБdan paбЄНa tumihaбєЕ</l>
625 <l n="c">prasama par…ЩбєЕ inƒБj√±an de saбєЕ nƒБtha surapati</l>
. <l n="d">umiriбєЕa laku saбєЕ hyaбєЕ kandarpƒБmaбєЕuna ya≈Ыa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">tuvi manasija sampun ≈ЫuddhƒБmvit ri ratihira</l>
630 <l n="b">mijil abhava mah…ЩћДmh…ЩћДm tuбє£бє≠ƒБбєЕher iбєЕ alunalun</l>
. <l n="c">laras ar…Щja si kiбєЕkiбєЕ hr≈Ђ kambaбєЕ si v…Щlas ar…Щp</l>
. <l n="d">lihaбєЕanira sumaбєЗбЄНiбєЕ mvaбєЕ vadva turida lulut</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.04" n="4">
635 <l n="a">rathanira l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ endah salvirniбєЕ s…Щkar inayu</l>
. <l n="b">rinavis i s…ЩminiбєЕ jriбєЕ r…ЩбєЕganyƒБsanasalaga</l>
. <l n="c">tinaligajah ak…ЩmbaбєЕ rambutniбєЕ hata katirah</l>
. <l n="d">dhvaja makara riniбєЕgit muбєЕgv iбєЕ pƒБdapa kum…Щlab</l>
. </lg>
640 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">t…Щlas ar…Щpat ilirniбєЕ saбєЕhub varбєЗa kuda putih</l>
. <l n="b">talinira kilatiбєЕ truh sƒБkбє£ƒБt suntagi kanaka</l>
. <l n="c">pavana mirir anampar himp…Щr sƒБrathi gin…Щlar</l>
. <l n="d">palupalunira pant…Щs luбєЕgahniбєЕ gaбЄНuбєЕ umure</l>
645 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">krama lumaku siros…ЩћДn mvaбєЕ sakveh saбєЕ a≈ЫaraбєЗa</l>
. <l n="b">rћ•sigaбєЗa paбЄНa maбєЕkat len vidyƒБdhara maбєЕiriбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">tigamata sira muбєЕgah бєЕkƒБne r…ЩбєЕga gajapati</l>
650 <l n="d">pinakamukha lumampah sarvecchƒБбєЕlayaбєЕ aбєЕalor</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">smarabhavana kalalvan gaбєЕgƒБtƒЂra huvus adoh</l>
. <l n="b">as…Щmu h…ЩlaбєЕ anampar v…ЩћДrniбєЕ devar…ЩsigaбєЗa</l>
655 <l n="c">pasir ati≈Ыaya l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ gƒБtranyƒБn vahu kapar…Щk</l>
. <l n="d">kadi gunuбєЕ apalayvan ryakryaknyƒБgr…Щt aбєЕavat…ЩћД</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">karaбєЕ aбєЕuбєЕaбєЕ apa√±jaбєЕ paбєЗбЄНan joбєЕnya kadi tulis</l>
660 <l n="b">lagi pinaraparƒБniбєЕ saбєЕhub yan paбєЕariбєЕariбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">hana kadi liman adyus vuбєЕkalnyƒБбєЕgar…Щg…Щs ak…ЩћДm</l>
. <l n="d">l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ inasuhan iбєЕ ryak sarvecchƒБ maбєЕupukupuk</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.09" n="9">
665 <l n="a">hujuбєЕi karaбєЕikƒБkr…Щp suбєЕheбєЕ ≈ЫaбєЕkaniбєЕ amayaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">savaбєЕan asavayan lvah kraбєЕnyƒБharya nilamiti</l>
. <l n="c">ag…Щrag…Щr aбєЕurambat lvir luбєЕsir sin…ЩkarurƒБ</l>
. <l n="d">kadi suji sinalaбєЕsaбєЕ luбєЕgahnya mar…Щki latuh</l>
. </lg>
670 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">baбєЗava rusakan ƒБlƒБ бєЕkƒБneбєЕ n≈Ђбє£a l…Щy…Щp adoh</l>
. <l n="b">jarupihika humaбєЗбЄН…Щm r…ЩбєЕkƒБvuk huvus ananƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">layar anisih anuбєЕgul runtiбєЕ lot aбєЕavayavay</l>
. <l n="d">marahak…Щn ilaбєЕƒБniбєЕ baбєЗyƒБgƒБlara kajahat</l>
675 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">nya parahuniбєЕ ama√±ciбєЕ mandrƒБpan layat alal…Щh</l>
. <l n="b">iniбєЕ…ЩtiбєЕ…Щt iбєЕinte tanpendah balubaluhan</l>
. <l n="c">hana kadi sirarƒБkiбєЕ kentar deniбєЕ aбєЕin alon</l>
680 <l n="d">as…Щmu sadak aбєЕumbaбєЕ siбєЕsal tan hana riбєЕ g…ЩluбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">i t…ЩбєЕah udadhi l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ bƒБhitranya maбєЕajava</l>
. <l n="b">inavara t…ЩkapiбєЕ truh kahr…Щt deniбєЕ ivak ag…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
685 <l n="c">kaput…Щr i t…Щl…ЩбєЕiбєЕ vvai hetunyƒБn palabulabuh</l>
. <l n="d">hana puhavaбєЕ am≈ЂjƒБnambat hyaбєЕ maбєЕasihasih</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_06.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">avicarita laбєЕ…ЩћДniбєЕ lod sampun kahalivatan</l>
690 <l n="b">suravara paбЄНa mƒБgyƒБ ton taбєЕ meruvukir ag…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">kadi bhuvana tinumpaбєЕ lvir liбєЕgƒБn…Щs…Щki laбєЕit</l>
. <l n="d">saphala sira pak…ЩћДniбєЕ brahmƒБбєЗбЄНƒБgama tinata</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
695 <div type="canto" rend="met" met="upendravajrƒБ" n="6" xml:id="Smaradahana_07">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">бЄНat…ЩбєЕnikƒБбєЕ deva kabeh samasta</l>
. <l n="b">rikƒБбєЕ mahƒБmeru vukir vi≈Ыeбє£a</l>
. <l n="c">katon tikƒБбєЕ dar≈Ыana dar≈ЫanƒЂya</l>
700 <l n="d">sabha bhaбє≠ƒБre≈Ыvara saбєЕ kinarya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">manahnikƒБбєЕ manmatha makusara</l>
. <l n="b">ri siddhaniбєЕ prarthana saбєЕ vat…Щk hyaбєЕ</l>
705 <l n="c">manahnireбєЕ tvas kadi savalepa</l>
. <l n="d">nya mmƒБrgrganiбєЕ vighna mag…ЩћДбєЕ kapaбєЕgih</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">k…Щtug tikƒБбєЕ parvata guntur agra</l>
710 <l n="b">hudan rivutpƒБta jalapravƒБha</l>
. <l n="c">g…Щlap halisyus p…Щt…ЩбєЕ aбєЕhalimpuбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">g…Щr…Щh gum…Щnt…Щr saha bƒБyubajra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.04" n="4">
715 <l n="a">paghƒБбє£aniбєЕ vuбєЕkal avantah atri</l>
. <l n="b">dud≈ЂбєЕ salumbuбєЕ kadi simban osyan</l>
. <l n="c">inuбєЗбЄНak…Щn deniбєЕ aбєЕin pracaбєЗбЄНa</l>
. <l n="d">r…Щbah rubuh par≈Ыva pukah kayunya</l>
. </lg>
720 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">ikƒБбєЕ vat…Щk hyaбєЕ paбЄНa gh≈ЂrбєЗitƒБr…Щs</l>
. <l n="b">t…ЩkapniбєЕ utpƒБta maбєЕƒБlade≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="c">hyaбєЕ indra tan dhƒБraka ≈Ыokabuddhi</l>
. <l n="d">gajahnirerƒБvaбєЗa tanpa sƒБra</l>
725 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ ƒБrya puбє£pƒБyudha dƒЂnacitta</l>
. <l n="b">hilaбєЕ tuturniбєЕ hati tanpa jƒЂva</l>
. <l n="c">rathƒБrurah puh makaradhvajanya</l>
730 <l n="d">kadi pva mƒБjar hana durnimitta</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">prabhƒБvaniбєЕ rƒБkбє£asa riбєЕ himƒБdri</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕaranya nandƒЂ≈Ыvara rudradƒБsa</l>
735 <l n="c">lavan mahƒБkƒБla v…ЩkƒБvibh≈Ђti</l>
. <l n="d">paбЄНƒБбєЕ…Щmit dvƒБra pakon bhaбє≠ƒБra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">ikƒБбєЕ vat…Щk deva kabeh pva m≈Ђrka</l>
740 <l n="b">har…Щp ri vandhyƒБ samƒБdhƒЂ bhaбє≠ƒБra</l>
. <l n="c">nda tanpa maбєЕgalyani devap≈ЂjƒБ</l>
. <l n="d">na kƒБraбєЗanyƒБn panulah mamighna</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.09" n="9">
745 <l n="a">siraбєЕ vat…Щk paбєЗбЄНita sapta paбєЗбЄНya</l>
. <l n="b">paбЄНƒБmaбєЕun rakбє£aбєЗa riбєЕ ≈ЫarƒЂra</l>
. <l n="c">vrћ•haspati vruh rikanaбєЕ nimitta</l>
. <l n="d">vavaбєЕ maбєЕuccƒБraбєЗa mantra siddhi</l>
. </lg>
750 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">hilaбєЕ tikƒБбєЕ varбє£a mar…Щn g…Щr…Щhnya</l>
. <l n="b">tatas p…Щt…ЩбєЕ tan hana mƒБtra ≈Ыesan</l>
. <l n="c">katon tikƒБбєЕ rƒБkбє£asa mrћ•tyur≈Ђpa</l>
. <l n="d">paбЄНƒБбєЕag…Щm daбєЗбЄНa s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ pracaбєЗбЄНa</l>
755 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">munƒЂndra saptƒБбєЕabhivƒБda mantra</l>
. <l n="b">yathƒБgamƒБбєЕarghya sireбєЕ ≈ЫivƒБmbhƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">kaharcaбєЗanyeбєЕ lagi yeka pinrih</l>
760 <l n="d">samƒБrganiбєЕ siddha man…Щmva sƒБdhya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">t…Щlasnya kƒБkarбє£aбєЗa kƒБlih atvaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">pinivruhan denira riбєЕ svakƒБrya</l>
765 <l n="c">ri hetuniбєЕ prƒБpta rikiбєЕ vanƒБdri</l>
. <l n="d">umaбєЕguh aбєЕhayvani ≈ЫƒЂghra luбєЕhƒБ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">saharбє£a tekƒБбєЕ <app><lem type="norm">surasaбєЕgha</lem><rdg wit="#edp">surasaбєЕghya</rdg></app> tuбє£бє≠a</l>
770 <l n="b">ri sampuni vruhnya rikƒБбєЕ kinƒБrya</l>
. <l n="c">paбЄНƒБturun siddhaniбєЕ ƒБtmarakбє£a</l>
. <l n="d">adrћ•≈Ыya mrћ•tyu√±jayamantra ≈Ыakti</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.14" n="14">
775 <l n="a">p…ЩsatniraбєЕ manmatha ≈Ы≈ЂnyƒБmƒБrga</l>
. <l n="b">pratiбє£бє≠ha muбєЕgv iбєЕ ratha meghavƒБha</l>
. <l n="c">ikƒБбєЕ vat…Щk deva paбЄНƒБбєЕiriбєЕ doh</l>
. <l n="d">at…Щn manontona lavan mahƒБrбє£i</l>
. </lg>
780 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">katon ta saбєЕ hyaбєЕ hara nƒЂlakaбєЗбє≠a</l>
. <l n="b">i sornikƒБбєЕ dar≈Ыana tuбєЕgu ≈ЫaбєЕka</l>
. <l n="c">s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕnirƒБlambana s≈Ђkбє£mabuddhi</l>
. <l n="d">aбєЕan par…ЩбєЕ muбє£бє≠inirƒБtalaбєЕkup</l>
785 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.16" n="16">
. <l n="a">nda tan vavaбєЕ sƒБhasa saбєЕ masƒБdhya</l>
. <l n="b">mulat katƒЂkбє£бєЗan hati mogha matvaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">maбєЕa√±jalƒЂ pƒБda bhaбє≠ƒБra mamvit</l>
790 <l n="d">mupƒБkбє£amƒБk…Щn gatiniбєЕ ≈ЫarƒЂra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.17" n="17">
. <l n="a">bhaбє≠ƒБra s…Щmbahni patikta nƒБtha</l>
. <l n="b">si kƒБmadevƒБбєЕapakƒБra nƒЂca</l>
795 <l n="c">nda tan pan…Щmva griбєЕ upadravƒБg…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">namo harƒБyƒБstu jagaddhitƒБya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.18" n="18">
. <l n="a">t…ЩlasnirƒБmurбє£ita maprayoga</l>
800 <l n="b">samƒБdhi saбєЕsipta vi≈Ыeбє£a ≈Ыuddhi</l>
. <l n="c">larap tikƒБбєЕ sa√±jata sarvapuбє£pa</l>
. <l n="d">pasambuбєЕiбєЕ tƒБman aveh kalaбєЕvan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_07.19" n="19">
805 <l n="a">larasnirƒБg…ЩћДбєЕ ≈ЫatapatradƒБla</l>
. <l n="b">r alap lavan hr≈Ђ salagƒБdvitƒЂya</l>
. <l n="c">turƒЂ kucupnyƒБr…Щja piбєЗбЄНa danta</l>
. <l n="d">minuбє£бє≠i himp…Щr panah ardhacandra</l>
. </lg>
810 </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="kilayu man…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ" n="7" xml:id="Smaradahana_08">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">samp≈ЂrбєЗa lum…Щpas ikƒБбєЕ ardhacandrasalagƒБбєЕaraharah i hati</l>
. <l n="b">ndan vyartha kas…Щp…Щr i jaбє≠ƒБ bhaбє≠ƒБra kadi bh≈Ђбє£aбєЗanira v…Щkasan</l>
815 <l n="c">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ smara muvah amanah sireбєЕ tarahudan savarayaбєЕ apupul</l>
. <l n="d">tanpa myati ri saбєЕ asamƒБdhi mampir i kap…ЩћД sahaja kadi sadak</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">ƒБ≈ЫcƒБrya manasija tumon ikƒБбєЕ sapamanahnira paбЄНa kahilƒЂ</l>
820 <l n="b">sambut sahanahananikƒБбєЕ s…Щkar pinakasa√±jatanirasumaji</l>
. <l n="c">jrahniбєЕ kanigara kum…Щ√±ar panakranira sampun umid…Щr i taбєЕan</l>
. <l n="d">≈ЫƒЂghrƒБn m…Щsat as…Щmu payuбєЕ kuniбєЕ kahabalaбєЕ kadi vulan adulur</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.03" n="3">
825 <l n="a">cakrƒБnaravata humilƒЂ sakeбєЕ tamuduhan kusuma≈Ыara vara</l>
. <l n="b">tanpƒБбєЕkura kadi tatur …Щnd…Щp…Щnd…Щp asuluбєЕsuluбєЕ atalitali</l>
. <l n="c">ndƒБ tan vighani sira bhaбє≠ƒБra tan r…ЩбєЕ…Щr…ЩбєЕ…ЩћДn ginurumuбєЕ inirup</l>
. <l n="d">trƒБsaбєЕ kanigara sacr…Щmin tibƒБs…Щmu tareбєЕ pinakarukuhira</l>
. </lg>
830 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">kontƒБ sarasija kumucup huvus hin…Щlaran kayukanakas…Щv…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="b">moghƒБt…Щka pinakakaluбєЕkaluбєЕnira jagatpati kadi minaha</l>
. <l n="c">mvaбєЕ tomaranira kucupiбєЕ kuri√±j…Щm aluбєЕid kadi curiga siбєЕi</l>
. <l n="d">sumrƒБk t…Щka lukar asiratsirat mas…Щmu vƒЂja rumak…Щt i jaja</l>
835 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">kandarpa kadi kavigaran sirƒБmanah amet kirakira biбє£ama</l>
. <l n="b">hr≈Ђ tƒЂkбє£бєЗa rin…Щg…Щpira nƒБgapuбє£pa≈Ыara pƒБ≈Ыa rin…Щc…Щp inaбєЕit</l>
. <l n="c">c≈Ђlanya dalima kumucup sisiknya s…ЩkariбєЕ ryak aбєЕivak agalak</l>
840 <l n="d">huntunya kanirisalagƒБliбЄНah v…Щlas ar…Щp miбєЕis aбєЕaladalad</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">nƒБgƒБkrћ•ti kusuma l…Щpas ri tambaбєЕi laras manasija ≈Ыarana</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕkƒБ rodra kavil…Щt iy avak bhaбє≠ƒБra sumavit pinakasavitira</l>
845 <l n="c">sambut varayaбєЕira puбЄНak vinimba cucukiбєЕ garuda paбЄНapaбЄНa</l>
. <l n="d">sƒБrinya kumusuh aбєЕabab sumƒБr tuvi s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ maбєЕap ariбєЕiriбєЕi</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">hr≈Ђ ciбєЗбЄНaga l…Щpas i bhaбє≠ƒБra sƒБtmya kadi kuбєЗбЄНalanira tumatiбєЕ</l>
850 <l n="b">hyaбєЕ ≈ЫaбєЕkara sira kadi hinyasan kadi rak…Щt saji hiftuvusak…Щn</l>
. <l n="c">lvƒЂr arca lagi sinavuran s…Щkar kadi tulis ratu vinurivuri</l>
. <l n="d">ƒБpan sapamanahira manmathƒБmuvuhi rimbit amuhara hal…Щp</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.08" n="8">
855 <l n="a">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ kusuma≈Ыara saranta saбєЕ≈Ыaya ri tanpa бєЕani panahira</l>
. <l n="b">mvaбєЕ sa√±jatanira sal…Щpasnya tan hana bisƒБбєЕlarani daбєЕudaбєЕu</l>
. <l n="c">maбєЕke pinanahak…Щnire hyaбєЕ ƒЂ≈Ыvara tayƒБбєЕgariti hatinira</l>
. <l n="d">hƒБh nirguбєЗa takari gatiбєЕku tan sahinar…Щphar…ЩpiбєЕ a≈ЫaraбєЗa</l>
. </lg>
860 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">krodha hyaбєЕ atanu ri bhaбє≠ƒБra tan hana vikƒБranira vinulatan</l>
. <l n="b">r…Щp dhyƒБna ta sira v…Щkasan yumoga pararƒБmya бЄНat…ЩбєЕ anuluбєЕa</l>
. <l n="c">riбєЕ sakбє£aбєЗa t…Щka sumaput laбєЕ…ЩћДni l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕiбєЕ r…Щtubala maбєЕasut</l>
. <l n="d">r…Щmr…Щm dumadak aбєЕujivat kilatnya бЄНat…ЩбєЕ amraбєЕ anavat aбєЕani</l>
865 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">senƒБpati r…Щtu madhumƒБsa kartika basanta gumuruh aбєЕasut</l>
. <l n="b">salvirniбєЕ amuhara raras samƒБбєЕr…Щbahi rƒБmya samasama sumƒБr</l>
. <l n="c">kapvƒБбєЕhab…Щti s…Щmi sirirnikƒБбєЕ aбєЕin an≈Ђb s…Щkar aru√±uru√±u</l>
870 <l n="d">kƒЂrбєЗaбєЕ r…Щm…ЩбєЕ asirasiran ririsnya paбЄНa tan b…Щsur aбєЕaraharah</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">sampun t…Щka sahananikƒБбєЕ kalaбєЕvan atulumbu manitiri pat…Щr</l>
. <l n="b">hyaбєЕ manmatha ≈Ыaravara pƒБrijƒБta rin…Щg…Щpnira muvah aбєЕayat</l>
875 <l n="c">hr≈Ђ spar≈Ыaviбє£aya pamaбєЕan ya r≈Ђpa rasa gandha vacana kalima</l>
. <l n="d">sampun rinatus inabhimantra campakamayƒБluбєЕid iбєЕidiбєЕidan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_08.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">mrik taбєЕ j…Щnu viбє£anikanaбєЕ panahkusuma pa√±caviбє£aya din…Щl…ЩћД</l>
880 <l n="b">ƒБkarбє£aбєЗa hrћ•daya manoharƒБбєЕiriбєЕi bƒБyu bhujaga rin…Щg…Щp</l>
. <l n="c">muntab taбєЕ asana kalavan vuбєЕ≈Ђ ri pamal…Щsnya kadi gunuбєЕ apuy</l>
. <l n="d">≈ЫƒЂghrƒБn l…Щpasak…Щn i bhƒБбє≠ƒБra tan dva maбєЕ…Щne hatinira tuman…Щm</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
885 <div type="canto" rend="met" met="praharбє£iбєЗƒЂ" n="8" xml:id="Smaradahana_09">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ cambhu sira k…ЩneбєЕ panah kal…ЩбєЕgak</l>
. <l n="b">m≈ЂrcƒБ tanpa biбє£a sirƒБtur≈Ђ lum…ЩбєЗбЄН…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="c">sƒБkбє£ƒБt svapnanira katon girindraputri</l>
890 <l n="d">muбєЕgv iбєЕ paбєЕkvanira miбєЕiбєЕ rusak tikƒБбєЕ ken</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">saбєЕsiptƒБvuбєЕu sira saбєЕ s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ k…ЩneбєЕ tvas</l>
. <l n="b">kontƒБ riбєЕ viбє£aya haneбєЕ <app><lem wit="#edp">manah humaбєЕg…Щh</lem><rdg wit="#msL884">manƒБ humaбєЕg…Щh</rdg></app></l>
895 <l n="c">rodrƒБбєЕr…Щs dinavutireбєЕ samƒБdhirƒБja</l>
. <l n="d">pyah tƒЂbrƒБ t…Щkan i бЄНaбЄНƒБ hilƒЂnikƒБбєЕ luh</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">ƒБ≈ЫcƒБryƒБmb…Щkira bhaбє≠ƒБra nƒЂlakaбєЗбє≠a</l>
900 <l n="b">eбєЕas prokбє£aka muiiбєЕaбєЕ mulat manolih</l>
. <l n="c">ton hyaбєЕ manmatha maбєЕayat panah maбєЕinte</l>
. <l n="d">prƒБyƒБбєЕl≈Ђda kavigaran s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ sudhƒЂra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.04" n="4">
905 <l n="a">hah kƒБmƒБdhama gumave hatiбєЕku ≈ЫƒЂrбєЗa</l>
. <l n="b">ndƒБ nƒБhan ta ya rum…Щg…Щp larasnya len hr≈Ђ</l>
. <l n="c">dhik nƒЂca nya tan atakut rike g…Щl…ЩбєЕku</l>
. <l n="d">tan vriбєЕ ≈ЫƒЂla salah ulah kaбє≠uбєЕkabuddhi</l>
. </lg>
910 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">ƒБhah niбє£ phalani t…Щkapmu mapravrћ•tti</l>
. <l n="b">tan vriбєЕ tvaбєЕ kuhaka riбєЕ aбєЕg…Щg…ЩћД samƒБdhi</l>
. <l n="c">tan mityƒБn madana ya vighnaniбєЕ kamokбє£an</l>
. <l n="d">bhaбєЕgƒБpakrama katuluy kadurjananmu</l>
915 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">sampemvi ry aku kadurus dahat halanya</l>
. <l n="b">yekƒБбєЕdadya lara mag…ЩћДбєЕ m…Щne t…Щmunmva</l>
. <l n="c">saбєЕsƒБranku phalaphalamva d≈Ђra hƒБtmva</l>
920 <l n="d">liбєЕ saбєЕ hyaбєЕ t…Щka varayaбєЕniraбєЕ smarƒБбєЕl≈Ђd</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">krodha hyaбєЕ parama≈ЫivƒБбєЕad…Щg saroбє£a</l>
. <l n="b">iccƒБnantara tumuluy trivikramƒБg…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
925 <l n="c">kr≈ЂrƒБbhairava man…ЩбєЕah riбєЕ antarƒЂkбє£a</l>
. <l n="d">vvilniбєЕ vvil d…ЩбєЕ…Щn atakut mulat kag…ЩћДman</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">rudrƒБkƒБra lima ≈ЫirahnirƒБprameya</l>
930 <l n="b">bhinnƒБrambut alimunan sum…ЩћДбєЕ rum…Щmbe</l>
. <l n="c">lvir megha pralaya haturnyan ek…Щl avyaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">kƒБdbh≈ЂtƒБru√±uru√±u taбєЕ taбєЕan sahasra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.09" n="9">
935 <l n="a">candrƒБditya savaбєЕikƒБбєЕ matƒБrdha mid…Щr</l>
. <l n="b">gambhƒЂrƒБhiruбєЕ adal…Щm guhƒБ paбЄНanya</l>
. <l n="c">sƒБkбє£ƒБt mrћ•tyu tutukirƒБsalit sihuбєЕnya</l>
. <l n="d">gumrut lot amijilak…Щn g…Щlap halisyus</l>
. </lg>
940 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">himp…Щr parvata savalƒБбєЕga dƒЂrgha pƒБda</l>
. <l n="b">sandhyƒБ varбєЗani vuluniбєЕ havak pralamba</l>
. <l n="c">salvirniбєЕ bhuvana kadƒБha mogha liбєЗбЄН≈Ђ</l>
. <l n="d">mamb…Щk lvir bubula t…ЩkapnirƒБn lumampah</l>
945 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">kƒБla hyaбєЕ ≈Ыiva maбєЕad…Щg vivrћ•ddhadeha</l>
. <l n="b">yatna hyaбєЕ smara maбєЕave ri saбєЕ hyaбєЕ indra</l>
. <l n="c">doniбєЕ syaбєЕ haturak…Щne bhaбє≠ƒБra nƒБtha</l>
950 <l n="d">ƒБpan maбєЕkana paбєЕucap hyaбєЕ indra бєЕ≈Ђni</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">maбєЕke pve бЄНat…ЩбєЕi g…Щl…ЩбєЕ tri≈Ы≈ЂlapƒБti</l>
. <l n="b">sakvehniбєЕ suravara<app><lem type="norm">saбєЕgha</lem><rdg wit="#edp">saбєЕghya</rdg></app> yatna luбєЕhƒБ</l>
955 <l n="c">kapvƒБбєЕh…ЩћДt av…Щdi katona de hyaбєЕ ƒЂ≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="d">aбєЕlamp≈Ђ ta siraбєЕ anaбєЕga duhkha mƒБtya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ rudra variбєЕut…Щn ri puбє£pacƒБpa</l>
960 <l n="b">kƒБlƒБgni pramukha mijil sakeбєЕ trinetra</l>
. <l n="c">nirdh≈ЂmƒБka бєЕarabarab kabhinnabhinna</l>
. <l n="d">lvir saбєЕhƒБra lum…ЩburaбєЕ triloka<app><lem type="norm">saбєЕgha</lem><rdg wit="#edp">saбєЕghya</rdg></app></l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.14" n="14">
965 <l n="a">maбєЕkin vrћ•ddhi dilahikƒБбєЕ apuy pradƒЂpta</l>
. <l n="b">lvir digdƒБha m…Щtu sakeбєЕ tutuk bhaбє≠ƒБra</l>
. <l n="c">len saбєЕkeбєЕ iruбєЕ i sihuбєЕ sameru muntab</l>
. <l n="d">durgrahyƒБn mubur aбєЕasut g…Щr…Щhnya ghora</l>
. </lg>
970 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ kƒБma sinaput iбєЕ viбє£ƒБgni rudra</l>
. <l n="b">prodbh≈ЂtƒБ t…Щka kumutug malad riбєЕ aбєЕga</l>
. <l n="c">m…Щlkah tƒБбєЕ avak ananƒБ t…ЩkeбєЕ laras hr≈Ђ</l>
. <l n="d">utvat mƒБr jariji p…Щgat hilaбєЕ kukunya</l>
975 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.16" n="16">
. <l n="a">ndƒБ tan mƒБti tan ahurip saranta duhkha</l>
. <l n="b"><app><lem type="norm">saбєЕsƒБrƒБmalaku</lem><rdg wit="#edp">saбєЕsarƒБmalaku</rdg></app> tuluбєЕ sireбєЕ vat…Щk hyaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">aбєЕreбєЕƒБn inigitigit riбєЕ antabahni</l>
980 <l n="d">lot mƒБnaбєЕ m…Щk…Щh anaбєЕis ratih katrћ•бє£бєЗan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.17" n="17">
. <l n="a">mƒБskv induбєЕ saбєЕ ahayu kƒБri ≈Ыokacitta</l>
. <l n="b">tiбєЕhal tery aku pinatƒЂ papan vat…Щk hyaбєЕ</l>
985 <l n="c">taбєЕguhteбєЕ hulun aбєЕ…Щd…ЩћД бЄНat…ЩбєЕ phalanya</l>
. <l n="d">tan mityƒБku kag…Щs…ЩбєЕan t…Щkap bhaбє≠ƒБra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.18" n="18">
. <l n="a">dyah ndin peta rari huripku бєЕ≈Ђni p≈Ђrva</l>
990 <l n="b">tan lvir hyaбєЕ hulun ari denikƒБбєЕ viбє£ƒБgni</l>
. <l n="c">dyah tƒБsih mah aku siram g…Щs…ЩбєЕ hatiбєЕku</l>
. <l n="d">бєЕke riбєЕ parvata v…ЩkasiбєЕ hulun kapƒБpa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.19" n="19">
995 <l n="a">nƒБ sambat kusuma≈ЫarƒБnavak saбєЕ ant…Щn</l>
. <l n="b">kasyƒБsih duv…Щg inubƒБr iбєЕ uccabahni</l>
. <l n="c">iccƒБ saбєЕ hyaбєЕ i sira tan vavaбєЕ paratra</l>
. <l n="d">deni bvatni g…Щl…ЩбєЕire sumatsyaketu</l>
. </lg>
1000 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.20" n="20">
. <l n="a">himp…Щr kiбєЕkarapati saбєЕ hyaбєЕ adrirudra</l>
. <l n="b">vruh riбєЕ duбє£krћ•takara yan pareбєЕ adharma</l>
. <l n="c">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ manmatha dumilah s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ dinagdha</l>
. <l n="d">lvir pretƒБdhama tinibak…ЩniбєЕ yamƒБgni</l>
1005 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.21" n="21">
. <l n="a">k≈Ђt mƒБryƒБkuniбєЕ ahir…ЩбєЕ sayat vulunya</l>
. <l n="b">rƒБh nityom…Щtu kumitik br…Щb…Щs vuduknya</l>
. <l n="c">akr≈Ђtan taliбєЕa g…Щs…ЩбєЕ t…ЩkeбєЕ ut…Щk mvab</l>
1010 <l n="d">indrƒБniбєЕ mata cumiбє≠as sakeбєЕ kapƒБla</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.22" n="22">
. <l n="a">ndah maбєЕkƒБna ta pamal…Щs bhaбє≠ƒБra rudra</l>
. <l n="b">kesyan daбєЗбЄНavadha pamigraheбєЕ asampe</l>
1015 <l n="c">hyaбєЕ puбє£pƒБyudha tinasak maбєЕ…Щntak…Щntak</l>
. <l n="d">kaбє£бє≠ƒБtyanta dadi lin≈Ђd sireбєЕ tri≈Ы≈Ђla</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_09.23" n="23">
. <l n="a">sampun hyaбєЕ madana p…Щjah m…Щsat hyaбєЕ ƒБtmƒБ</l>
1020 <l n="b">sadyotkranti pinakamƒБrganiбєЕ pralƒЂбєЗa</l>
. <l n="c">nistr…ЩsбєЗƒБ taya hiniбЄН…Щp tayaбєЕ kapaбєЕgih</l>
. <l n="d">svaбєЕ <unclear>бєЕ</unclear>lampvƒБmb…Щkira kavalya bhƒБvacakra</l>
. </lg>
