1025 <div type="canto" rend="met" met="rajanƒЂ" n="9" xml:id="Smaradahana_10">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">atha ri t…Щlas bhaбє≠ƒБra kusumƒБyudha tanpa bisa</l>
. <l n="b">gumuruh av≈Ђ sa≈Ыoka para rƒБmya s…Щs…ЩћДk sumaput</l>
. <l n="c">rћ•tu madhumƒБsa kartika basanta t…ЩkƒБmiбЄНara</l>
1030 <l n="d">kadi kalaran pat…Щrnya kum…Щt…Щr kaharan taбєЕisa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">s…Щkar aku≈ЫƒБt…Щb…ЩбєЕ kapavanan mak…Щdalk…Щdalan</l>
. <l n="b">aбєЕalikalik mid…Щr taбЄНah asihnya masambat asih</l>
1035 <l n="c">camara mure miбєЕ…Щl kaбєЕ…Щlihan s…Щmi kapva gupe</l>
. <l n="d">riris as…Щn…Щb lumuh titisikƒБбєЕ banu lot mak…Щcap</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">prasamat…ЩkƒБбєЕlavad l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕikƒБбєЕ vukir aбєЕrurubi</l>
1040 <l n="b">pisaбєЕ alas iбєЕ juraбєЕ carunikƒБn ananƒБбєЕ hujuбєЕan</l>
. <l n="c">umuni manuk garantuбєЕika lot ta t…Щkap lumari</l>
. <l n="d">бЄНat…ЩбєЕ aбєЕuy≈Ђyva tanpa p…Щgatan panuliбєЕniбєЕ …ЩpiбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.04" n="4">
1045 <l n="a">kayuragas iбєЕ g…Щg…Щr kapanasan sumarƒЂ p…Щjaha</l>
. <l n="b">vvadi halalaбєЕnya yƒБn…Щv…Щk avaknya katon sumusuk</l>
. <l n="c">gaбЄНuбєЕ umulur lumuбєЕ kaбєЕ…Щlihan sinavatniбєЕ aбєЕin</l>
. <l n="d">l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ alabuh juraбєЕ kucupiбєЕ ertali riбєЕ paraбєЕan</l>
. </lg>
1050 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">kav…Щlasar…Щp latƒБvaluval≈Ђ kav…Щkas riбєЕ alas</l>
. <l n="b">huvus aparasparas lvahika ≈Ыuddha mabaddha limut</l>
. <l n="c">paбЄНa vanavƒБsa lampahi kidaбєЕnya mareбєЕ lvahika</l>
. <l n="d">guci t…Щka riбєЕ vula√±jar i kupit paбЄНa tanpa jalu</l>
1055 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">turunasihiбєЕ vanƒБntara nahan prasamƒБmahayu</l>
. <l n="b">ri ≈Ыava bhaбє≠ƒБra puбє£pa≈Ыara dƒЂna s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ dumilah</l>
. <l n="c">tucapa ta saбєЕ hyaбєЕ indra varapaбєЗбЄНita kapva kav…Щs</l>
1060 <l n="d">mulat i bhaбє≠ƒБra rudra kadi rƒБkбє£asa sƒБhasika</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">av…Щn…Щs al…ЩћДk ≈Ыatakratu har…Щp mulihƒБбєЕava≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="b">av…Щdi katona saбєЕ≈Ыaya ri jƒЂvanirƒБn kahavƒБ</l>
1065 <l n="c">atanu pinucca denira huripku vigesa huvus</l>
. <l n="d">tan av…Щdi s…ЩбєЕgah…Щn druhaka mitya ri ≈Ыabdanira</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">dadi bhagavƒБn vrћ•haspati mar…Щk mavuvus ri sira</l>
1070 <l n="b">umaбЄН…Щmi r…Щs hyaбєЕ indra kadi tan valuyƒБmatiha</l>
. <l n="c">suravara he sacƒЂpati haliбєЕ kuhiranta harah</l>
. <l n="d">muliha kadurya≈Ыan dahat ikƒБбєЕ…ЩnaбєЕ…Щnta dud≈Ђ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.09" n="9">
1075 <l n="a">ri patinikƒБбєЕ smarƒБmuvuhi ≈Ыoka ri buddhi mami</l>
. <l n="b">sipi vita kasyasihnya tuna vandhava tanpa kadaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">kita marikƒБ nimittani hilaбєЕnika nora vaneh</l>
. <l n="d">palakuбєЕ asihta marmani s…Щg…Щhnya kinon vipatha</l>
. </lg>
1080 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">ndya kirakiranta sƒБtmya ri patantranikƒБбєЕ madana</l>
. <l n="b">syapa kari s…ЩбєЕgah…Щn kujana durta t…ЩkapniбєЕ aji</l>
. <l n="c">бєЕhulun athavƒБ surƒБdhipa dinurjana tan hana len</l>
. <l n="d">бЄНat…ЩбєЕ upavƒБdaniбєЕ para yadin kita m≈Ђr muliha</l>
1085 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">rasani vuvus raviprasuranƒБtha ri devapati</l>
. <l n="b">patiniбєЕ anaбєЕga yogya tuluбєЕ…Щnta papak prasamƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">haturak…Щne hyaбєЕ ƒЂ≈Ыa huripanya muvah palakun</l>
1090 <l n="d">asiha bhaбє≠ƒБra ≈Ыarva patiniбєЕ smara dohak…Щna</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">tuvi kita mƒБkusƒБra riбєЕ anaбєЕga ya tan kahalƒБ</l>
. <l n="b">manahira saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ƒЂ≈Ыvara lum≈Ђda sireбєЕ turida</l>
1095 <l n="c">t…Щlasi p…Щjahnya kapva makadoбє£a pakonta riya</l>
. <l n="d">parama yadin kitƒБmativareriya tan tuluбєЕ…Щn</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">vacananiraбєЕ vrћ•haspati ri vr…Щtrajit aбєЕlarani</l>
1100 <l n="b">rћ•бє£igaбєЗa sapta nƒБrada visiбє£бє≠ha par…ЩбєЕ mavuvus</l>
. <l n="c">dadi sumahur surendra ri siraбєЕ para paбєЗбЄНya kabeh</l>
. <l n="d">sakirakira mpu saбєЕ hulun an≈Ђta pakƒЂrtyak…Щna</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.14" n="14">
1105 <l n="a">iбєЕ…ЩtiбєЕ…Щt…Щn t…Щm…Щn syapa ya vanya katona tuvi</l>
. <l n="b">umar…Щki siбєЕha sampun amatiбєЕ gaja tanpa sarik</l>
. <l n="c">duv…Щg alapƒБmaбєЕan rudhira maбєЕsanikƒБбєЕ dvirada</l>
. <l n="d">rarasana riбєЕriбєЕ…Щn variбєЕut…Щn juga jƒБtinika</l>
. </lg>
1110 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">aku mara saбєЕ munƒЂndra sapapƒБti sabhagya t…Щm…Щn</l>
. <l n="b">mapa kari lƒЂбєЕaniбєЕ hulun i saбєЕ rћ•бє£i yogya dahat</l>
. <l n="c">rinasarasan katuhvan ika saбєЕ smara dƒЂnatara</l>
. <l n="d">abalika r…Щp panasnya siha saбєЕ hyaбєЕ aveha hurip</l>
1115 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.16" n="16">
. <l n="a">i t…ЩlasirƒБбєЕucap dadi lumampah adoh adulur</l>
. <l n="b">бЄНat…ЩбєЕ i bhaбє≠ƒБra rudra sumuyug tumuluy pranata</l>
. <l n="c">rћ•бє£igaбєЗa kapva yatna manitah ≈Ыivatatvavidhi</l>
1120 <l n="d">tumihaбєЕ adeha≈Ыuddhi g…Щlar ƒБsana akбє£a huvus</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_10.17" n="17">
. <l n="a">prathamani m≈Ђrti saбєЕ hyaбєЕ apatiбєЕkah iбєЕ aбє£бє≠adala</l>
. <l n="b">gin…ЩlariбєЕ akбє£ara krama ≈ЫivƒБбєЕga sahƒБstranira</l>
1125 <l n="c">japa saha k≈Ђtamantra sinamƒБhita riбєЕ hrћ•daya</l>
. <l n="d">t…Щlas aбєЕavƒБhana stutinireki nihan vuvus…Щn</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="≈ЫƒБrd≈ЂlavikrƒЂбЄНita" n="10" xml:id="Smaradahana_11">
1130 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_11.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">uбєЕ rudraya mahƒБtmane praбєЗataniбєЕ bhaktƒЂбєЕ jagatkƒБraбєЗa</l>
. <l n="b">varбє£ƒБn uбєЕguha donikinmar…Щk ij …ЩћДбєЕ saбєЕ hyaбєЕ har…Щp sanmatan</l>
. <l n="c">saбєЕ tuбєЕgal vinuvus rva lot ginaбєЗanƒБniбєЕ paбєЗбЄНitƒБrjƒБhayu</l>
. <l n="d">brƒБhmƒБ viбє£бєЗu mahe≈ЫvarƒБnupaman iбєЕ nƒБpi kitƒБvak tiga</l>
1135 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_11.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">pƒБt varбєЗanta linakбє£aбєЗan lima liner pa√±cƒБsya pa√±cƒБkбє£ara</l>
. <l n="b">kvehniбєЕ pakбє£a kita pratiбє£бє≠ha dinud≈Ђ s≈Ђkбє£mƒБti s≈Ђkбє£mƒБganal</l>
. <l n="c">prƒБбєЗƒБpƒБna samƒБna bƒБyu riбєЕ udƒБna byƒБna sƒБkбє£ƒБt hurip</l>
1140 <l n="d">≈Ы≈ЂnyadvƒБra kasiбєЕhitanta rin…Щg…Щp saбєЕ sƒБdhakeбєЕ antaka</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="svƒБgatƒБ" n="11" xml:id="Smaradahana_12">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_12.01" n="1">
1145 <l n="a">m≈Ђlajanma kita sƒБra manr…Щбє£бє≠i</l>
. <l n="b">nƒБva vindu t…ЩkaniбєЕ nava candra</l>
. <l n="c">sapta mƒБsa dadi mƒБnuбє£agatra</l>
. <l n="d">ndƒБ kiteki sarapuбєЕ pinakƒБtma</l>
. </lg>
1150 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_12.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">tulya sƒБrathi kitƒБn hana yatna</l>
. <l n="b">ni≈ЫcalƒБбєЕad…Щg i r…ЩбєЕganiбєЕ aбєЕga</l>
. <l n="c">vruh ri duhkhahayuniбєЕ rathadeha</l>
. <l n="d">bhƒБvacakra tik…Щlanya rinakбє£a</l>
1155 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_12.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">pa√±catƒБpa paбЄНa kapva kabhukti</l>
. <l n="b">vyƒБpakeбєЕ mrћ•ta sarisr…Щp abh≈Ђta</l>
. <l n="c">бєЕhiбєЕ kiteбєЕ bhuvana kƒБraбєЗa laбєЕg…ЩбєЕ</l>
1160 <l n="d">vruh ri lƒЂnav…ЩtuniбєЕ dadi janma</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="vaбєЕ≈Ыapattrapatita" n="12" xml:id="Smaradahana_13">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.01" n="1">
1165 <l n="a">nƒБ stuti saбєЕ vat…Щk pravara paбєЗбЄНita vacanapati</l>
. <l n="b">somya bhaбє≠ƒБra rudra kadi jƒБtinira daбєЕudaбєЕu</l>
. <l n="c">lvir sphaбє≠ikƒБrca ta√± cala caturbhuja saha makuбє≠a</l>
. <l n="d">≈Ыaktini kƒБrcanƒБnira maveh suka ri hatinira</l>
. </lg>
1170 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">cabdanirƒБpa kƒБryani v…ЩkaбєЕku rћ•бє£i vahu бЄНat…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">mvaбєЕ da≈ЫalokapƒБla milu mapraбєЗata samasamap</l>
. <l n="c">liбєЕnira maбєЕkana krama vrћ•haspati sira sumahur</l>
. <l n="d">sampun aбєЕa√±jalƒЂ suku bhaбє≠ƒБra madanadahana</l>
1175 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">sƒБj√±a bhaбє≠ƒБra doni pukulun surar…Щsin umar…Щk</l>
. <l n="b">mimpunak…Щn siratsirati pƒБduka bhuvanapati</l>
. <l n="c">bhasmanikƒБбєЕ anaбєЕga dumilah s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ atunu murub</l>
1180 <l n="d">ƒБmrћ•ta devanƒБtha kƒБraбєЗanya muvaha huripa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">doбє£anipun katuhvan ahale juga hiniбєЕ…ЩtiбєЕ…Щt</l>
. <l n="b">tan ya katona de tripuranƒБtha s…Щcj…ЩбєЕ anumanan</l>
1185 <l n="c">liбєЕ bhagavƒБn vrћ•haspati bhaбє≠ƒБra masivi hum…Щn…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">tapvan alum g…Щl…ЩбєЕnira rikƒБбєЕ smara hana ri hati</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">vƒБkpati sampun apraбєЗata mastuti muvah amuvus</l>
1190 <l n="b">sƒБj√±a bhaбє≠ƒБra mƒБsiha jugƒБndakaripu mav…Щka</l>
. <l n="c">ƒБpan ikƒБбєЕ smarƒБv…ЩnaбєЕ amigraha ri saбєЕ ahulun</l>
. <l n="d">deva kabeh paбЄНƒБбєЕutus akon mamanaha capala</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.06" n="6">
1195 <l n="a">marmanikƒБn panƒЂti hana detyapati saha bala</l>
. <l n="b">≈Ыakti si nƒЂlarudraka бєЕaranya subhaga kar…ЩбєЕ…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="c">tan p…ЩjaheбєЕ raбєЗƒБбєЕga t…ЩkapiбєЕ rћ•бє£igaбєЗa vivudha</l>
. <l n="d">ƒБdinikƒБбєЕ anugraha pasuбєЕ tripuraripu riya</l>
. </lg>
1200 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">lƒБgi hin…ЩћДm surƒБpsara vat…Щk rћ•бє£igaбєЗa mapupul</l>
. <l n="b">kapva har…Щp ri pastrya parame≈Ыvara maran av…Щka</l>
. <l n="c">ƒБpan ujar bhaбє≠ƒБra mav…Щkasv…Щkas i riya t…Щm…Щn</l>
. <l n="d">yan hana putra ≈Ыukraja sake ry aku rumuraha ko</l>
1205 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">yeka parƒБrthadharma parame≈Ыvara tulusak…Щna</l>
. <l n="b">jƒЂvanikƒБбєЕ anaбєЕga hana riбєЕ sumeru tayak…Щna</l>
. <l n="c">deva kabeh jugeki makadoбє£a v…Щgig i pukulun</l>
1210 <l n="d">ƒБpan ikƒБ nimittani v…ЩnaбєЕnya vipatha kadurus</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">yan t…Щh…ЩraбєЕ smaranaputa dharmanika si kapatin</l>
. <l n="b">rƒБga lulut lavan mithuna saбєЕgama surata hilaбєЕ</l>
1215 <l n="c">tƒБ rabi tan hanaбєЕ anak apan taya karaбєЗanika</l>
. <l n="d">nismadanaбєЕjagat mulih apakrama dahat amuбЄНha</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">nƒБhan ujar vr…Щhaspati man…Щmbah amalakuбєЕ asih</l>
1220 <l n="b">lƒБvan ikƒБбєЕ vat…Щk hyaбєЕ as…ЩkuбєЕs…ЩkuбєЕ amava taбєЕis</l>
. <l n="c">mƒБr hati saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ƒЂ≈Ыvara muvah sira maбєЕaбєЕ…ЩnaбєЕ…Щn</l>
. <l n="d">бєЕkƒБn m…Щtu sarvavodhanira sakбє£aбєЗa sira sumahur</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.11" n="11">
1225 <l n="a">putra kiteбєЕ vat…Щk rћ•бє£iganƒБkirakira karuбєЗa</l>
. <l n="b">sƒБdhu vuvusta yogya pituhunkva biбє£ama dahat…Щn</l>
. <l n="c">uбєЕ valuyaбєЕ smarƒБdhipa t…Щkapku tuhun avaбєЕavaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">guhya pakƒБvakaбєЕ paramas≈Ђkбє£ma v…ЩkasikƒБбєЕ alit</l>
. </lg>
1230 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">tambayikin panƒБma kusumƒБyudha kan…Щk…Щtak…Щn</l>
. <l n="b">sarvas…Щkar pamigrahanike ry aku s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ amanah</l>
. <l n="c">yan makaradhvajƒБбєЕhab…Щti taбєЗбЄНa sinuji makara</l>
. <l n="d">ndah paribhƒБsagƒЂta savaneh бєЕaranika malulut</l>
1235 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_13.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">ndah sahananta devagaбєЗa sapta rћ•бє£i kita kabeh</l>
. <l n="b">hr≈ЂniбєЕ anaбєЕga kocapanikƒБбєЕ smara ya siбєЕ avaбєЕi</l>
. <l n="c">≈ЫrƒБvaka tanpa sumpiбєЕa h…Щl…Щm bvat as…Щmu viбє£aya</l>
1240 <l n="d">ƒБpan aku prasiddhaniбєЕ ak≈ЂбєЕ k…Щna kusuma≈Ыara</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="uddhatƒБ" n="13" xml:id="Smaradahana_14">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.01" n="1">
1245 <l n="a">nƒБhan ≈Ыabda bhaбє≠ƒБra manantva</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ vƒБkpati keraбєЕan ƒБ≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="c">yan tanpƒБvaka manmathadeha</l>
. <l n="d">ƒБj√±a hyaбєЕ parame≈Ыvara hetu</l>
. </lg>
1250 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">saбєЕsiptan gatiniбєЕ vivudhƒБmvit</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕhƒБrakrama sampun an…Щmbah</l>
. <l n="c">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ≈Ыakra k…Щta tvasirƒБsih</l>
. <l n="d">tunvan manmatha yeka tini√±jo</l>
1255 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">ton vaбєЕke hyaбєЕ anaбєЕga sumaбєЕlƒБ</l>
. <l n="b">kasyƒБsih magulaбєЕgulaбєЕ iбєЕ vƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">meh bhasmƒЂkrћ•ta dehanira syuh</l>
1260 <l n="d">kadyƒБkon mahalavva tinarka</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">ai saбєЕ hyaбєЕ suranƒБtha pahenak</l>
. <l n="b">tiбєЕhalte ry aku vƒБsvas…Щn ƒБtah</l>
1265 <l n="c">бєЕhiбєЕ maбєЕke v…ЩkasaбєЕkva katona</l>
. <l n="d">lvƒБmb…Щk hayva l…Щm…Щh kita mitra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">sampun teki pakonta kasiddha</l>
1270 <l n="b">hr≈ЂбєЕkvƒБveh turide hati saбєЕ hyaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">tanpƒБбєЕdeya viyoga patiбєЕku</l>
. <l n="d">tiбєЕkahniбєЕ vidhi duбє£krћ•ta hetu</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.06" n="6">
1275 <l n="a">riбєЕ janmƒБntara sotku kat…Щmva</l>
. <l n="b">ndah mitranta’ku hayva tan eбєЕ…Щt</l>
. <l n="c">konkonamva muvah pak…ЩnaбєЕkva</l>
. <l n="d">tan dvƒБdvƒБn makatoha huripku</l>
. </lg>
1280 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">mitrƒБбєЕhiбєЕ pav…Щkasv…ЩkasaбєЕkva</l>
. <l n="b">deviбєЕkvƒЂ pura tiбєЕhali denta</l>
. <l n="c">kasyƒБsih kav…Щkas ri patiбєЕku</l>
. <l n="d">yan tƒЂbrƒБlara taбєЕguhi matya</l>
1285 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">t alap t ampunak…Щn ri daganta</l>
. <l n="b">dƒБsƒЂbh≈Ђta gaven ya tan ƒБpa</l>
. <l n="c">бєЕ≈ЂnƒЂveh ri kat…Щnya ya≈Ыanta</l>
1290 <l n="d">pamrihkvƒЂ kita tona ta denta</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">lvir maбєЕkojara saбєЕ hyaбєЕ anaбєЕga</l>
. <l n="b">sampun mukбє£a g…Щs…ЩбєЕ dadi bhasmi</l>
1295 <l n="c">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ≈Ыakra katƒЂkбє£бєЗan asove</l>
. <l n="d">k…ЩmbaбєЕ len s…Щr…Щh iбє£бє≠a pam≈Ђja</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">mƒБntuk hyaбєЕ suranƒБtha kamantyan</l>
1300 <l n="b">muбєЕgv iбєЕ r…ЩбєЕganikƒБбєЕ rathadeha</l>
. <l n="c">saбєЕ saptƒБrбє£i nabhastalamƒБrga</l>
. <l n="d">mvaбєЕ vidyƒБdhara kinnara kƒЂrna</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_14.11" n="11">
1305 <l n="a">byƒБtƒЂtan krama saбєЕ surapaбєЗбЄНya</l>
. <l n="b">kƒБsih saбєЕ mag…Щs…ЩбєЕ vuvus…ЩбєЕkva</l>
. <l n="c">davƒЂ saбєЕ hana riбєЕ smararƒБjya</l>
. <l n="d">herher…Щn ri t…Щka hyaбєЕ anaбєЕga</l>
. </lg>
1310 </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="mrћ•tagaбєЕ≈Ыa" n="14" xml:id="Smaradahana_15">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">бєЕ≈ЂnƒЂ kƒБla bhaбє≠ƒБra manmatha mareбєЕ girivana manuk≈Ђ</l>
. <l n="b">lƒБvan saбєЕ <app><lem type="norm">surasaбєЕgha</lem><rdg wit="#edp">surasaбєЕghya</rdg></app> sapta rћ•бє£i rovaбєЕira paбЄНa tumut</l>
1315 <l n="c">tambe hyaбєЕ ratih abratƒБs…Щmu nadƒЂ ri dal…Щm abhuhaya</l>
. <l n="d">tan sor iбєЕ g…Щn…ЩpiбєЕ manis tuvi yayƒБsriбєЕ aбєЕuraбєЕuraбєЕi</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">sihsihniбєЕ paбЄНa garjitƒБбєЕayu samƒБgama r…Щs…Щp i hati</l>
1320 <l n="b">yekƒБбєЕde lara yan tiniбєЕgal agave raras amituturi</l>
. <l n="c">kiбєЕkiбєЕ doбє£a hin…ЩћДtak…Щn lulutirƒБpuhara r…ЩбєЕ…Щr…ЩбєЕ…ЩћДn</l>
. <l n="d">l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ cƒБmara sƒБlagƒБбєЕlih aбєЕure sira miбєЕ…Щl aбєЕ…Щsah</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.03" n="3">
1325 <l n="a">sakvehniбєЕ magave raras hati t…ЩkƒБбєЕlavad i laranira</l>
. <l n="b">hisniбєЕ luh manuluбєЕnuluбєЕ g…Щl…ЩбєЕirƒБmrih am…Щd…Щli suku</l>
. <l n="c">embuh nvamnvam ikƒБбєЕ g…ЩluбєЕ vruh am…Щбє≠ikm…Щбє≠iki kapatik…Щl</l>
. <l n="d">бєЕhiбєЕ tan seбєЕ…Щh anon rimaбєЕ matanirƒБ√± j…Щn…Щk anakanakan</l>
. </lg>
1330 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">milvƒБ≈ЫƒБ t…ЩkaniбєЕ taman katuvuhan prihati v…Щlas ar…Щp</l>
. <l n="b">rukбє£ƒБnon kalaran vuluh gaбЄНiбєЕikƒБбєЕr…Щs akusakasikan</l>
. <l n="c">vvainiбєЕ pa√±curan osah ardha kapiluh t…Щkapi taбєЕisira</l>
. <l n="d">tan vriбєЕ de hakukur paбЄНƒБ tan agat…Щl tel…Щsika lavaran</l>
1335 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">sore kƒБla tibƒБбєЕ laluбєЕ l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ i kƒБlaniбєЕ ahavuhavu</l>
. <l n="b">maбєЕkin tƒЂbra laбєЕ…ЩћДnirƒБn mulati saбєЕhub anav…Щli kukus</l>
. <l n="c">s…ЩћДбєЕniбєЕ vvai sumiratsirat ginuruvindaniбєЕ aruбєЗa l…Щy…Щp</l>
1340 <l n="d">meghƒБбєЕl…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ i sarvavarбєЗani kilatnya kadi minurayas</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">maбєЕkin marma manisnirƒБn kav…Щtu pahyasira karatihan</l>
. <l n="b">kumrƒБm r≈Ђmnika ka√±canƒБr…Щja maбєЗiknya dinalima saraбєЕ</l>
1345 <l n="c">bƒБбєЕniбєЕ lƒБбє≠i jugƒБбєЕr…Щs aбєЕr…Щjani k≈Ђtniran amayamaya</l>
. <l n="d">tan p endah kuniбєЕiбєЕ trika√±cu sum…Щkar kas…Щlatan amirah</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">sakvehniбєЕ vara ceбє≠ikƒБkrama paбЄНƒБmar…Щki ba√±u rahup</l>
1350 <l n="b">lƒБvan paбєЕg…Щlaran kucup vinava mesi cupucupu pulut</l>
. <l n="c">p≈ЂrбєЗanyƒБn akucupnya riбєЕ pataбЄНahan g…ЩбЄНah akarakara</l>
. <l n="d">saбєЕsiptƒБdamu saбєЕ s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ kaбєЕ…Щlihan t…Щkapi lulutira</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.08" n="8">
1355 <l n="a">prƒБptaбєЕ kinnaraputrikƒБraras avarбєЗa hamava pasilih</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ ≈ЫokƒБhyas ajƒЂvajƒЂva manulak halahalaniбєЕ avak</l>
. <l n="c">paбєЕdohkiбєЕkiбєЕikƒБh…ЩnƒЂ vinava riбєЕ kuvakuva pakuku</l>
. <l n="d">ƒБtmƒБniбєЕ k…Щna rƒБga himp…Щriki yan rak…Щti kukunira</l>
. </lg>
1360 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">prƒБptaбєЕ ratri huvus taбЄНah damar aneka kum…Щ√±ar asinaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">devƒЂ saбєЕ kat…ЩkƒБn prapa√±ca hana riбєЕ ≈Ыayana pakasutan</l>
. <l n="c">tanpƒБmr…Щm t…Щka k≈ЂбєЕnira бЄНat…ЩбєЕa saбєЕ s…Щn…ЩбєЕ aparaparan</l>
. <l n="d">moghƒБt…Щn mulatiбєЕ h…Щn≈Ђ kadi hanƒБбєЕgyata nataba lavaбєЕ</l>
1365 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">akveh yan caritan vilƒБ≈Ыaniran on…ЩбєЕ aбєЕuvahi laбєЕ…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="b">luбєЕhƒБбєЕ kƒБla бЄНavuh rva saбєЕ≈Ыaya rur≈Ђ kumuniбєЕ aбєЕala≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="c">k…ЩmbaбєЕniбєЕ m…ЩбєЗur iбєЕ natar kadi jamur nasi m…Щkar aputih</l>
1370 <l n="d">sumrƒБk lvir vaбєЕiniбєЕ tapih linukaran paбЄНa pinidudutan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_15.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">ndan saбєЕ ≈ЫrƒЂ smaraghƒБriбєЗƒЂ sabhaya tan pr…Щm aбєЕaraбєЕ ahuyaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">nƒБhan hetunirƒБn vijil prihatin osah amulati tavaбєЕ</l>
1375 <l n="c">l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ deniбєЕ urut p…Щgatp…Щgat areh asavaбєЕ ikay ike</l>
. <l n="d">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ lek sasisih k…Щ√±arnira katon mas…Щmu patirisan</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="caбєЗбЄНƒЂ" n="15" xml:id="Smaradahana_16">
1380 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_16.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">smarabhavana kasuluhan ≈Ыa≈Ыira≈Ыmi</l>
. <l n="b">makapuratuk i vuvuбєЕanya mineru</l>
. <l n="c">kanaka tin…Щpa vinayaбєЕvayaбєЕ abhra</l>
. <l n="d">pinakapucakika murub kadi bahni</l>
1385 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_16.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">kusumanasa≈Ыaravadh≈Ђ kataman k≈ЂбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">ha√±ar as…Щpi turida tan tahu kƒБri</l>
. <l n="c">karaбєЗaniбєЕ ahuyaбєЕ agatgat ikƒБбєЕ luh</l>
1390 <l n="d">turida vinuni lagi saбєЕgaya riбєЕ tvas</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_16.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">hana taman i v…ЩlahaniбєЕ pura ri jro</l>
. <l n="b">alalayan agupura hƒЂra kinoryan</l>
1395 <l n="c">pinaranira l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ aбєЕimbuhi kiбєЕkiбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">t…Щka huva maбєЕuluri ≈ЫokaniбєЕ amb…Щk</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_16.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">surabhi tinan…Щm i natarnya cumaбєЗбЄНi</l>
1400 <l n="b">pinatiga kayunika ta√±juбєЕ ak…ЩmbaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">cala magigu t…ЩkapikƒБбєЕ aбєЕin edi</l>
. <l n="d">ham…ЩбєЕani s…Щkarika nitya tibƒБkveh</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_16.05" n="5">
1405 <l n="a">marakata pinakah…ЩnƒЂni h…Щn≈Ђnya</l>
. <l n="b">sphaбє≠ika karaбєЕika sinƒБmaja vrћ•nda</l>
. <l n="c">bahuvidha kum…Щ√±ar apiбєЗбЄНa vinarбєЗa</l>
. <l n="d">asiбєЕ umar…Щki sira somya rum…ЩбєЕga</l>
. </lg>
1410 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_16.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">s…Щkar avil…Щt agaбєЗitƒБlasalasnya</l>
. <l n="b">paбЄНali kaбєЗigara kuri√±j…Щm a≈Ыoka</l>
. <l n="c">karavaka m…ЩбєЗur asahƒБya kuranta</l>
. <l n="d">gaбЄНuбєЕ aбєЕulili maбєЕun…ЩбєЕnya rumaбєЕk…Щp</l>
1415 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_16.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">paratusi vaбєЕini sekarnika sumrƒБk</l>
. <l n="b">sumavur as…Щmu hima sƒБrinikƒБбєЕr…Щs</l>
. <l n="c">sahanahananika gave turide tvas</l>
1420 <l n="d">alaбєЕ…Щ kahiбЄН…Щpanike hati devƒЂ</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="citraturida" n="16" xml:id="Smaradahana_17">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_17.01" n="1">
1425 <l n="a">prƒБsƒБda ri t…ЩбєЕahiбєЕ pa√±curan alaбєЕ…ЩћД l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ i pajaбєЕiбєЕ lek</l>
. <l n="b">hyaбєЕhyaбєЕnya mas…Щpi tƒЂstƒЂs kadi minahƒБk…Щn lumut i susunya</l>
. <l n="c">somyƒБs…Щmu guyu r≈Ђpanyan ar…Щja himp…Щr mid…Щm akaбє≠akбє£a</l>
. <l n="d">kadyƒБnaбєЕisi hayunyƒБn hana hana tan rƒБgakƒБraбєЗa heman</l>
. </lg>
1430 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_17.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">vvainyƒБr…ЩбєЕur…ЩбєЕu varбєЗƒБnik…Щli halis lvir calacala kombak</l>
. <l n="b">lagyƒБmas…Щhi s…Щv…ЩћДniбєЕ pakis aбєЕurambat ri t…Щpit…Щpinya</l>
. <l n="c">kƒЂrбєЗaбєЕ panupanu k…ЩmbaбєЕniбєЕ asana lumrƒБn…Щlati pasirnya</l>
. <l n="d">lvir mutya sumavur ƒБkr…Щp v…Щr…Щhi banunyƒБбєЕjrah i t…ЩбЄНunanya</l>
1435 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_17.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">бєЕkƒБ hyaбєЕ ratih amudƒБ riбєЕ karaбєЕ asalah si√±jaбєЕ ar…Щja kumrƒБm</l>
. <l n="b">himp…Щr pamayaбєЕaniбєЕ vvah gaбЄНiбєЕ abuбєЕah vƒБhu hilaбєЕ upihnya</l>
. <l n="c">≈ЫokƒБhuyaбєЕ asib≈Ђ saбєЕ k…Щna turidƒБnƒЂsak…Щn ikaбєЕ amb…Щk</l>
1440 <l n="d">harбє£ƒБбєЕlavani kucurniбєЕ makara tan eбєЕ…Щh susunira kegu</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_17.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">hƒЂsniбєЕ ba√±u rum…Щs…Щp tanpa marasi kiбєЕkiбєЕ ri hati saбєЕ on…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">sƒБkбє£ƒБt alabuh apuy" liбєЕnira ri k…Щ√±…ЩpniбєЕ vvay apanas iбєЕ tvas</l>
1445 <l n="c">nƒБhan pinal…ЩhirƒБn muбєЕgah atapih aбєЕher i t…Щpi lum…ЩбєЕhe</l>
. <l n="d">himp…Щr vulan umijil saбєЕka ri t…Щl…ЩбєЕiбєЕ sƒБgara pinut…Щr s…ЩћДk</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_17.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">mƒБntuk l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ ak…Щmul citrajalada siбєЕh…Щlnika tinulis mƒБs</l>
1450 <l n="b">≈ЫokƒБraras iniriбєЕniбєЕ lulut inat…ЩrniбєЕ turida manuntun</l>
. <l n="c">himp…ЩrбєЕ kavi kat…Щkan bhasmaran amaбєЕan vvaida jamur amandi</l>
. <l n="d">lvirnyƒБn kasarik i r≈ЂmniбєЕ madana≈ЫarƒБ≈ЫƒБh…Щli rarabiбєЕ luh</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
1455 <div type="canto" rend="met" met="navahaбє£a" n="17" xml:id="Smaradahana_18">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_18.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">sakul…Щm sira tan vruhiбєЕ ulaha saranta t…ЩkapniбєЕ un…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">kadi m≈Ђra tum≈Ђtak…Щna hatinirƒБn bhramitƒБbayaбєЕan</l>
. <l n="c">damar ol…Щm a√±ampaka kumucup urubnya din…Щmvanira</l>
1460 <l n="d">atutur v…Щkasan ri luбєЕidi varayaбєЕ saбєЕ aveh turida</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="mrћ•tatodaka" n="18" xml:id="Smaradahana_19">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.01" n="1">
1465 <l n="a">luбєЕhƒБбєЕ kƒБla davuh pitu kar…ЩбєЕ…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ lek mav…Щn…Щs kadi sin…Щp…Щt</l>
. <l n="c">saбєЕhubniбєЕ hima sakбє£aбєЗa mahƒБvuk</l>
. <l n="d">roniбєЕ ny≈ЂgaбЄНiбєЕ iбєЕ natar um…Щl…Щs</l>
. </lg>
1470 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ ≈ЫokƒБбєЕaraбєЕiбєЕ ≈Ыayana gaбЄНiбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">nƒЂdrƒБбєЕlih sira tƒЂbra kaval…Щsan</l>
. <l n="c">s…ЩbniбєЕ duhkha t…ЩkƒБбєЕipi gurnuyu</l>
. <l n="d">keбєЕis dantanirƒБбєЕ…ЩбЄНapi laбє≠i</l>
1475 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">meh saбєЕ hyaбєЕ rahinƒБnatasi lamur</l>
. <l n="b">bƒБбєЕ veta√± jaladanya бєЕaniviluбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">kumrƒБm piбєЗбЄНa kasumba piniturun</l>
1480 <l n="d">megha lvir sinusur hir…ЩбєЕ amirah</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">jriбєЕ бєЕkƒБneбєЕ parahasyan aбєЕiбЄНukus</l>
. <l n="b">sinvamnyƒБбєЕg…Щg…Щs amrih atalaбєЕkup</l>
1485 <l n="c">akrabkrab sinirirniбєЕ aбєЕin alon</l>
. <l n="d">paбєЕnyƒБбєЕulyat aghƒБsa kadi m…Щk…Щh</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">tu√±juбєЕniбєЕ talagƒБvuбєЕu dum…ЩliбєЕ</l>
1490 <l n="b">kumbaбєЕnyƒБбєЕlilir ardha varurut…Щn</l>
. <l n="c">vahvavvai makuyapkuyap ap…ЩбЄНe</l>
. <l n="d">kosap riбєЕ v…Щr…Щh ardha ta dadaran</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.06" n="6">
1495 <l n="a">mrƒБk muбєЕgv iбєЕ kayu cƒБmara lakibi</l>
. <l n="b">tanvaбєЕnyƒБбєЕuhuhiбєЕ manuk amijah</l>
. <l n="c">бєЕek haбєЕ≈ЫƒБбєЕaraбєЕin lagi kar…ЩбєЕ…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="d">riбєЕ gaбєЕgƒБбєЕalakƒБlal…Щh asisik</l>
. </lg>
1500 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">e√±jiбєЕ sakбє£aбєЗa kƒБlaniбєЕ adamu</l>
. <l n="b">ceбє≠ƒЂ kapva matimpuh apatikah</l>
. <l n="c">prƒБptaбєЕ mƒБgadha ≈ЫƒЂghra kapalay≈Ђ</l>
. <l n="d">konkonan suranƒБtha rumuhuna</l>
1505 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">ta√± jambat pavarahnya dugaduga</l>
. <l n="b">mƒБjar yan hyaбєЕ anaбєЕga sira p…Щjah</l>
. <l n="c">bhasmƒЂbh≈Ђta samasta dadi havu</l>
1510 <l n="d">de saбєЕ hyaбєЕ tripurƒБntaka ≈Ыarana</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">makrƒБk taбєЕ vanitƒБ prasama humuбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">kapvƒБ≈ЫƒБ sakaбЄНatvan avurahan</l>
1515 <l n="c">devi saбєЕ kav…Щkas dadi vinuбєЕu</l>
. <l n="d">kagyatgyat s…ЩmuniбєЕ mata dum…ЩliбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">saбєЕsiptƒБn vinarah sira tum…ЩбЄНun</l>
1520 <l n="b">saбєЕkeбєЕ pa√±capaturvanira daбєЕ≈Ђ</l>
. <l n="c">si√±jaбєЕ kesis inƒЂr n…Щh…Щr umijil</l>
. <l n="d">luh tapvan v…Щtu yan vavaбєЕ aku≈Ыa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.11" n="11">
1525 <l n="a">vuntuбєЕ rƒБt bhuvanƒБбєЗбЄНa kadi p…Щt…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">deniбєЕ priбєЕganikƒБбєЕ prihati mag…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">r…Щ√±c…Щm tvasnira tan vruh iбєЕ ulaha</l>
. <l n="d">pin tƒЂgƒБn tinibƒБk…Щn ikƒБбєЕ avak</l>
. </lg>
1530 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">siбєЕgih tƒЂbranikƒБбєЕ lara ri sira</l>
. <l n="b">vahvƒБpaбєЕgih asih par…ЩбєЕ alulut</l>
. <l n="c">duбє£бє≠a pvaбєЕ vidhi vƒБhu sinapihan</l>
. <l n="d">toh ndyaбєЕ duhkha sake riya l…Щviha</l>
1535 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">sakveh saбєЕ <app><lem type="norm">surasaбєЕgha</lem><rdg wit="#edp">surasaбєЕghya</rdg></app> t…Щka huvus</l>
. <l n="b">mvaбєЕ saбєЕ paбєЗбЄНita sapta vahu бЄНat…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">luh saбєЕ ≈Ыoka maramb…Щhan um…Щtu</l>
1540 <l n="d">yan ton saбєЕ vivudhƒБбєЕga paбЄНa t…Щka</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_19.14" n="14">
. <l n="a">rambut vibhrama tan gin…ЩluбєЕak…Щn</l>
. <l n="b">tan vriбєЕ de mak…Щdalk…Щdalan av≈Ђ</l>
1545 <l n="c">j…ЩћДбєЕ saбєЕ vipra vrћ•haspati pin…Щkul</l>
. <l n="d">de saбєЕ ≈Ыoka mar…Щk t…Щka manaбєЕis</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="aupacchandasika" n="19" xml:id="Smaradahana_20">
1550 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">bhagavan kaki he munindra tiбєЕhal</l>
. <l n="b">ndi paran hyaбєЕ madana <unclear>pva</unclear> de munƒЂndra</l>
. <l n="c">madulur mara saбєЕ hadan lumampah</l>
. <l n="d">mara riбєЕ meru lavan hyaбєЕ indra бєЕ≈Ђni</l>
1555 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">kalalu pva бЄНat…ЩбєЕ maharбє£i maбєЕke</l>
. <l n="b">suka lƒБvan suranƒБtha labdhajƒЂva</l>
. <l n="c">i rikƒБбєЕ smara denta dƒЂna kƒБri</l>
1560 <l n="d">ri dilahniбєЕ surabahni tan hinƒБt:hƒБt</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">aparan kari doбє£aniбєЕ smarƒБg…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">i mahƒБpandya mataбєЕnya yan minaбєЕkƒБ</l>
1565 <l n="c">drћ•бЄНha bhakti ri j…ЩћДбєЕni saбєЕ munƒЂndra</l>
. <l n="d">alalis pvƒБramareбєЗa sojar …Щmpu</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">kusumeбє£u l…Щv…Щs pva kƒБsyasihta</l>
1570 <l n="b">inutusniбєЕ bhaya denikƒБбєЕ vat…Щk hyaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">ham…ЩбєЕanta p…Щjah kinƒБlade≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="d">t…ЩkapiбєЕ deva kabeh suke laraбєЕku</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.05" n="5">
1575 <l n="a">ndi paran kusumƒБstra de hyaбєЕ indra</l>
. <l n="b">lalu tan sihta mamitra hƒЂna dƒЂna</l>
. <l n="c">ri p…ЩjahniбєЕ anaбєЕgade bhaбє≠ƒБra</l>
. <l n="d">t≈ЂluбєЕ…Щn yogyanikƒБn kabehananta</l>
. </lg>
1580 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">panahaбєЕku hade bhaбє≠ƒБra rudra</l>
. <l n="b">umatiбєЕ manmatha riбєЕ vukir sumeru</l>
. <l n="c">hal…Щpa pva p…Щjah binandha pƒБ≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="d">tinibƒБk…Щn riбєЕ apuy kinƒБrya matya</l>
1585 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">nda huvus ta dadi prayojananta</l>
. <l n="b">ri tayƒБniбєЕ smarayan huvus paratra</l>
. <l n="c">tulusƒБk…Щn atah lalista riбєЕvaбєЕ</l>
1590 <l n="d">p…Щjahi pvƒБku huvus misanmisan vƒБs</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">apa tan hana deva taбєЕg…Щl…Щnta</l>
. <l n="b">kadi tan vyƒБpaka riбєЕ sarƒБt narendra</l>
1595 <l n="c">ri huvusku p…Щjah muvah t…Щkapta</l>
. <l n="d">tuluyƒЂkaбєЕ smaradr…Щvya rampas…Щnta</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">phalaniбєЕ gumavay ri pƒБtiniбєЕ len</l>
1600 <l n="b">suka yan ton laraniбєЕ vaneh tan eбєЕ…Щh</l>
. <l n="c">ya ta kapva kadevatan бєЕaranya</l>
. <l n="d">mamatiбєЕ mitra dineya tanpa doбє£a</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.10" n="10">
1605 <l n="a">panaбєЕis smaraghƒБriбєЗƒЂ masambat</l>
. <l n="b">an…Щs…Щl deva t…ЩkapnikƒБбєЕ larƒБg…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">mara vipra vr…Щhaspati prayatna</l>
. <l n="d">umutƒБk…Щn ri katuhvaniбєЕ carƒЂra</l>
. </lg>
1610 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">ibu mƒБsku katon panaбєЕguhanta</l>
. <l n="b">tumahƒБ saбєЕ hulun iбєЕ pravrћ•tti durta</l>
. <l n="c">hana pƒБpa mag…ЩћДбєЕ m…Щne t…ЩmuбєЕkva</l>
. <l n="d">ri s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕnyƒБn kat…ЩkƒБna nƒЂcabuddhi</l>
1615 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">ri p…Щjahniy anakmamƒЂбєЕ vanƒБdri</l>
. <l n="b">gin…Щs…ЩбєЕniбєЕ cadu≈Ыakti de bhaбє≠ƒБra</l>
. <l n="c">rasa milva hilaбєЕ hatiбєЕku ≈ЫƒЂrna</l>
1620 <l n="d">t…ЩkapiбєЕ duhkha mulat rikƒБбєЕ anaбєЕga</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">aбєЕ…Щn…Щs t…Щka saбєЕ hulun paбЄНƒБsraбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">humaras pƒБбЄНa bhatara nƒЂlakaбєЗбє≠a</l>
1625 <l n="c">huripiбєЕ smara yeki kƒБrya tan len</l>
. <l n="d">maluyeбєЕ svarga pinintaniбєЕ hulun dyah</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.14" n="14">
. <l n="a">kun…ЩбєЕ ƒБpan ikƒБбєЕ vidhƒЂ v…ЩkaбєЕku</l>
1630 <l n="b">makatatvƒБ hana riбєЕ manah pralƒЂбєЗa</l>
. <l n="c">kita kƒБliha teki s≈Ђkбє£ma rakva</l>
. <l n="d">pav…Щkas hyaбєЕ guru saбєЕ haneбєЕ sumeru</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.15" n="15">
1635 <l n="a">ya mataбєЕnya harebu hayva ≈Ыoka</l>
. <l n="b">purihiбєЕ janma k…ЩtƒБ nirƒБvasƒБna</l>
. <l n="c">si hurip kadi megha kƒБla lahru</l>
. <l n="d">rinarahniбєЕ pati kƒБvakan samƒЂra</l>
. </lg>
1640 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.16" n="16">
. <l n="a">taya m≈ЂlanikiбєЕ haneбєЕ triloka</l>
. <l n="b">sakar…ЩбєЕ bhƒБva muvah mareбєЕ abhƒБva</l>
. <l n="c">ndya ta mƒБrganikiбєЕ hurip katr…Щбє£бєЗan</l>
. <l n="d">tuhu yƒБvat kr…ЩtakƒБn katon anitya</l>
1645 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_20.17" n="17">
. <l n="a">panitah tripurƒБntake v…ЩkaбєЕku</l>
. <l n="b">ratih iбєЕ strƒЂ smara riбєЕ lanaбєЕ paбЄНƒБyu</l>
. <l n="c">kita rƒБga lulut riбєЕ indriyƒБmor</l>
1650 <l n="d">v…ЩtuniбєЕ spar≈Ыana ≈Ыukra≈ЫoбєЗitƒБбєЕhis</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="indravajrƒБ" n="20" xml:id="Smaradahana_21">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.01" n="1">
1655 <l n="a">na cabda vƒБgƒЂ≈Ыvara viprajƒБti</l>
. <l n="b">melƒБk…Щn ƒБj√±ƒБ pav…Щkas bhaбє≠ƒБra</l>
. <l n="c">devƒЂ ratih movus ujarnirƒБsr…Щt</l>
. <l n="d">luh nitya yƒБramb…Щhan iбєЕ matƒБdr…Щs</l>
. </lg>
1660 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ paбєЗбЄНya ≈ЫakrƒБdi samƒБk…ЩnƒБtah</l>
. <l n="b">potukniбєЕ edan t…ЩkapiбєЕ larƒБg…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">maбєЕkƒБ pva de hyaбєЕ parame≈ЫvarƒБveh</l>
. <l n="d">janmƒБgamoбєЕan samaniбєЕ kamokбє£an</l>
1665 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">tan laбєЕghyanƒБpakбє£a marƒБбєЗa k ampu</l>
. <l n="b">yan vyƒБpakeбєЕ s≈Ђkбє£ma makƒБvakƒБnis</l>
. <l n="c">ndan veh…Щn aбєЕjanma h…Щl…Щm katona</l>
1670 <l n="d">kƒБlih lavan saбєЕ p…ЩjahiбєЕ vanƒБdri</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">mƒБskvƒЂbu saбєЕ satya r…ЩбєЕ…ЩћДn vuvusku</l>
. <l n="b">siddhƒБstu kahyunta kat…Щmva denta</l>
1675 <l n="c">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ sirƒБveha kabhƒБvacakran</l>
. <l n="d">ri dlƒБhaniбєЕ dlƒБha h…Щl…Щm tan advƒБ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">eбєЕgal t…Щm…Щn yan mamituhva mƒБsku</l>
1680 <l n="b">ndah t≈Ђtak…Щn ≈ЫƒБpa bhaбє≠ƒБra nƒБtha</l>
. <l n="c">paбєЕheranantƒБlavasiбєЕ haneбєЕ rƒБt</l>
. <l n="d">svƒБmƒЂnta maбєЕjanma kat…Щmva denta</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.06" n="6">
1685 <l n="a">sampun vuvus бЄНaбєЕ hyaбєЕ an≈Ђti tatva</l>
. <l n="b">paбєЕlƒБlane saбєЕ kat…Щkan prapa√±ca</l>
. <l n="c">≈ЫrƒЂ kƒБmapatnƒЂ sumuyug man…Щmbah</l>
. <l n="d">mam vit mam≈ЂjƒБ ri maharбє£i mƒБsih</l>
. </lg>
1690 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">ai bh≈Ђmi devƒБdi vulat kamuбєЕ hyaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">rƒБnak mahƒБpaбєЗбЄНita m≈Ђra mƒБtya</l>
. <l n="c">бєЕkƒБne mahƒБmeru parƒБna tan len</l>
. <l n="d">belƒБ saбєЕ ƒБrya smara puбє£pacƒБpa</l>
1695 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">nƒБ liбєЕniraбєЕ ≈Ыoka man…Щmbah agya</l>
. <l n="b">dƒБnƒБdi p≈ЂjƒБ ginave kamantyan</l>
. <l n="c">sakvehnikƒБбєЕ dr…Щvya haneбєЕ kaбЄНatvan</l>
1700 <l n="d">pƒБdakбє£iбєЗe saбєЕ viku siddha paбєЗбЄНya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">vvant…Щn sakƒЂ kƒБsih inuttameбєЕ r≈Ђm</l>
. <l n="b">nandƒБ sunandƒБdhika tan hanoli</l>
1705 <l n="c">sƒБnak l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ riбєЕ hayu ≈Ыuddha≈ЫƒЂla</l>
. <l n="d">tovin vidagdhƒБnulus iбєЕgitaj√±ƒБ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">yekƒЂ tum≈Ђt bhakti ri puбє£pitƒБбєЕ≈Ыa</l>
1710 <l n="b">tuбєЕgal hum…Щmban vara vastra devƒЂ</l>
. <l n="c">nandƒБ tan imbƒБmava pavvahan mƒБs</l>
. <l n="d">katrƒЂбєЗi devƒЂ smaradhƒБra tansah</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.11" n="11">
1715 <l n="a">ryaбєЕkatniraбєЕ manmathadevabhƒБryƒБ</l>
. <l n="b">pakraknikƒБбєЕ sasmararƒБjya ≈Ыoka</l>
. <l n="c">sakvehnikƒБбєЕ kƒБri vijah makiбєЕkiбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">kapvƒБnaбєЕis mahyun umilva matya</l>
. </lg>
1720 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">tan varбєЗan…Щn lvirnika saбєЕ kavuntat</l>
. <l n="b">devƒЂ ratih kastanirojar…Щnta</l>
. <l n="c">luh nitya k…Щmb…ЩбєЕnya haneбєЕ matƒБdr…Щs</l>
. <l n="d">lampahnirƒБlon kasasar salakvan</l>
1725 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_21.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">j…ЩћДбєЕniбєЕ mahƒБmeru t…Щgalnya kulvan</l>
. <l n="b">de≈ЫottamelƒБvrћ•ta ≈Ыuddha kƒБmbah</l>
. <l n="c">≈ЫobhƒБratƒБrƒБmya lurahlurahnya</l>
1730 <l n="d">duhniбєЕ vvahiбєЕ dar≈Ыana mekalanya</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="≈ЫƒБrd≈ЂlavikrƒЂбЄНita" n="21" xml:id="Smaradahana_22">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.01" n="1">
1735 <l n="a">e√±jiбєЕ kalaniran lumampah adulur t≈Ђt lvah pasirniбєЕ nadƒЂ</l>
. <l n="b">l…Щmba lumbu kucurkucur pacar alas muбєЕgv iбєЕ t…Щpinyar…Щn…Щb</l>
. <l n="c">lvir tu√±juбєЕ kasasar katon aбєЕalayan t≈ЂdiбєЕ pisaбєЕ sa≈Ыriya</l>
. <l n="d">sarinyag…Щlar aбєЕhirib kuku tik…Щl kaбєЕg…Щk t…ЩkapniбєЕ susu</l>
. </lg>
1740 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">saбєЕ ≈Ыokamrih aбєЕiбєЕkin ol…Щm ak…Щmul rajadhirajanipis</l>
. <l n="b">amvas deni titisni luhnira tiba tan pantaraбєЕertali</l>
. <l n="c">j…ЩћДбєЕ lvir laka s…Щmunya deni gar…Щg…ЩsniбєЕ vuбєЕkal aбєЕlud siбєЕi</l>
. <l n="d">timpaбєЕtimpaбєЕ aбєЕindikindik at…Щk…Щn luhyan pag…Щgvan paras</l>
1745 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ lvir tinaluntalun ya humiriбєЕ kambah vatunyal…Щy…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="b">kadyaбєЕlƒЂбєЕa valikkaбЄН…Щpnya kum…ЩбЄНap himp…Щr vulatniбєЕ vukir</l>
. <l n="c">k…ЩmbaбєЕ siбєЕgugu kesisan sumarasah taбєЕ puбє£pa lemboбєЕ m…Щkar</l>
1750 <l n="d">tanpendah kucupiбєЕ s…Щkartaji tibƒБ de saбєЕ lumakvƒБnusup</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">r…ЩmbaбєЕr…ЩmbaбєЕ apantaran kalihib…Щn pƒБбєЕ puбєЕ pakis paбєЕgaga</l>
. <l n="b">r…Щmbat nampu kajarkajar kamumu lensuбєЕsuбєЕ guyunyƒБnaбєЕis</l>
1755 <l n="c">бєЕkƒБne d≈Ђnya savah kapaбєЕgih alaбєЕ…ЩћД lvah guбєЕ guбєЕ akveh pakis</l>
. <l n="d">sarvecchƒБbikuбє≠ak taluktak akiбє≠uk syok syok dhvaninyƒБбєЕ…Щбє≠…Щk</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">de≈Ыa pveki kun…ЩбєЕ kasimpar as…Щn…Щt muбєЕgvƒЂ luvukniбєЕ juraбєЕ</l>
1760 <l n="b">up…Щk piбєЗбЄНani pomahanya mahƒБvuk deniбєЕ himƒБrantayan</l>
. <l n="c">ny≈Ђ suбєЗбЄНanya sumƒБlaбєЕ…ЩћД lagi tin≈ЂbniбєЕ nƒЂradƒБnambayaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">vvahnyƒБnuбєЕgal agantuбєЕan kap…Щl…Щy…ЩћД v≈ЂtnyƒБmarƒБba√±juran</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.06" n="6">
1765 <l n="a">ev…Щh tan kat…ЩбєЕ…Щr h…Щn≈Ђnya sirarƒБmant…Щn tilasnyƒБsamun</l>
. <l n="b">deniбєЕ vƒБh gunuбєЕ aбєЕdavut jah…Щli s…ЩћДk len kayvan akveh r…Щbah</l>
. <l n="c">tƒЂstƒЂs tan hana ≈ЫabdaniбєЕ vvaбєЕ amaduбєЕ t…ЩбєЕg…ЩћД kat…ЩmveбєЕ alas</l>
. <l n="d">aбєЕhiбєЕ paбєЕhriki sundarinya tinaбЄНeбєЕ deniбєЕ manuk c…Щb luput</l>
. </lg>
1770 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">lor vetan hana pƒБjaran kalimutan muбєЕgv iбєЕ luvukniбєЕ gunuбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">tambiryan paraбєЕan sivak lavaбєЕikƒБmƒБpaбєЕgumant…Щn mahƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">vvainyƒБdoh ah…Щl…Щt juraбєЕ tinalaбєЕan vinvat hin…Щnvan p…ЩtuбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">saбєЕ muбєЕgvƒЂriya tuбєЕgatuбєЕgal amudƒБ meh mƒБntukeбєЕ ≈Ы≈ЂnyatƒБ</l>
1775 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">s…ЩбєЕkan durga vatunya lƒБgi tinatƒБt≈Ђt lƒБmbuбєЕiбєЕ parvata</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕhiбєЕ g…Щgvan hri varak nimittani v…ЩnaбєЕ saбєЕ satya tƒЂbrƒБn laku</l>
. <l n="c">kepvan deni l…Щy…ЩћДnikƒБбєЕ paraбєЕ ar…Щs meh r…ЩmbihƒБriбєЕguбєЕan</l>
1780 <l n="d">eбєЕgi mƒБrganikƒБбєЕuбєЕaбєЕ tasik anak guntur tr…Щbis durgama</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">tan pendah vukiriбєЕ tulis linihatan sa≈ЫrƒЂ hat…ЩpnyƒБhijo</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕkƒБne sor hana nƒЂlaku√±cita lumuбєЕ muбєЕviбєЕ l…Щmah bƒБбєЕ m…Щl…Щs</l>
1785 <l n="c">lotnyƒБghƒБбє£a lavan limut t…Щkan i himbaбєЕnyƒБn pakaskas putih</l>
. <l n="d">siбєЕgaбєЕniбєЕ mura maбєЕsi h…Щnti kacucuk deniбєЕ may≈ЂrƒБn…Щt…Щs</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">tiбєЕkah liбєЕga haneбєЕ praбєЗƒБla pak…Щk…ЩsniбєЕ meru≈ЫailƒБr…Щh…Щr</l>
1790 <l n="b">m≈Ђkбє£ƒБpiбєЗбЄНa lavan laбєЕit pucakikƒБnuбєЕgul p…Щt…ЩбєЕ tan katon</l>
. <l n="c">hyaбєЕ ve tumraбєЕ aбєЕekade≈Ыa sum…Щn…ЩћД riбєЕ par≈Ыvade≈ЫƒБnisih</l>
. <l n="d">kalrƒБn ratri paбЄНƒБturun l…Щy…ЩpikƒБбєЕ rondon kahƒЂsan h…Щbun</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.11" n="11">
1795 <l n="a">lvahnyƒБt≈Ђban amaбєЕkavƒБ hilinikƒБ ghorƒБn tumƒЂbeбєЕ l…Щmah</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕkeбєЕ agra kavantusiбєЕ vatu ridaбєЕ lvir nƒБgarƒБjƒБбєЕlayaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">vvainyƒБg…Щnturan aбєЕluraklurak ar…Щs himp…Щr sus≈ЂniбєЕ laбєЕit</l>
. <l n="d">vahvamvatt i limutnya sumraбєЕ amaбєЕun saбєЕke kukusniбєЕ ba√±u</l>
. </lg>
1800 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">t…Щkvan jroni juraбєЕ suk…Щt limut ar…Щs tanpa pramƒБбєЗƒБdal…Щm</l>
. <l n="b">kapvƒБnyƒБ≈Ыa guhƒБбєЕ…Щm≈Ђ vatu putih yƒБбєЕk…Щn tutukniбєЕ gunuбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">ton tekƒБ kahanan bhaбє≠ƒБra ri s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ hyaбєЕ kƒБma bhasmƒЂkrћ•ta</l>
. <l n="d">tunvan mƒБtra kukusnya himp…Щr avarah ya бєЕke v…Щkas hyaбєЕ smara</l>
1805 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_22.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">devƒЂ saбєЕ tumutur vavaбєЕ kapalay≈Ђ lƒБvan sunandƒБdulur</l>
. <l n="b">akrƒБk tan katah…Щn taбєЕisnira tumon tunvan smarƒБveh s…Щk…Щl</l>
. <l n="c">lƒБvan k…ЩmbaбєЕ ar≈Ђm sumamburat alum hr≈Ђ saбєЕ s…Щn…ЩбєЕ tan hilaбєЕ</l>
1810 <l n="d">maбєЕkin r…Щ√±c…Щm aramb…Щhan titis i luh devƒЂ mulat kapyuhan</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="mrћ•dukomala" n="22" xml:id="Smaradahana_23">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.01" n="1">
1815 <l n="a">hƒБh maбєЕke pva parƒБna saбєЕ prabhu l…Щv…Щs laraбєЕku ri kita</l>
. <l n="b">tan trћ•бє£бєЗanta ri jƒЂvitanta pinatujvak…Щn бєЕaraniki</l>
. <l n="c">aбєЕlamp≈Ђ kahalƒБmaбєЕun ya≈Ыa marƒБn sukƒБбєЕ sabhuvana</l>
. <l n="d">toh ndyƒБnuбєЕ phala ga√±jaranta pamal…ЩsnikƒБбєЕ sura kabeh</l>
. </lg>
1820 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">sis tan lƒЂбєЗa kitƒБn pituhva pituturku бєЕ≈Ђni ri hayu</l>
. <l n="b">taбєЕguhniбєЕvaбєЕ i nƒБtha tanpa manahe bhaбє≠ƒБra karana</l>
. <l n="c">buddhintaбєЕakusara yogyani pakon hyaбєЕ indra ri kita</l>
. <l n="d">sƒБkбє£ƒБt deva kabeh nimittani patinta tan vruh i bhaya</l>
1825 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">hƒБh vƒБliбєЕku kat…Щmva sƒБtmyan i huripta riбєЕ giri vana</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕhelkvƒБmet ri kitƒБnusup mid…Щr ikƒБбєЕ anakniбєЕ acala</l>
. <l n="c">aбєЕlih tanpa valƒЂ hritiбєЕ juraбєЕ ar…Щs tr…Щbis lvah adal…Щm</l>
1830 <l n="d">kuбєЕkaбєЕnyƒБбєЕaruhi prapa√±ca kadi medi moyutiбєЕ ak≈ЂбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">ndan kapvƒБvul i kƒБrya himbaбєЕika tan hanƒБvara-varah</l>
. <l n="b">kayvanyƒБn vin…Щgilv…ЩgilniбєЕ alarƒБpi tan vruh at…ЩбєЕ…Щt</l>
1835 <l n="c">priбєЕ nirvƒБmata posikiбєЕ vuluh a≈Ыabda tan hana mulat</l>
. <l n="d">aбєЕhiбєЕ luбєЕgahikƒБбєЕ vanƒБjar i v…Щkasta mƒБsih atuduh</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">prƒБpta pva бєЕhulun iбєЕ ≈ЫilƒБgra kahananta durgama t…Щm…Щn</l>
1840 <l n="b">tan suбєЕsuбєЕ hulun iбєЕ h…Щn≈Ђ tuvi rapuh sum…ЩбєЕka tumurun</l>
. <l n="c">tanpƒБбєЕliбєЕ hum…Щn…ЩбєЕ kitƒБбєЕdadak ulah diбєЕaryan akaбЄНat</l>
. <l n="d">ardhƒБsah takarƒЂбєЕ paratra kadurus pujinta pinaran</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.06" n="6">
1845 <l n="a">lvƒБmb…Щk svƒБmi tayƒБntukantuk i man…Щhta yogya cacar…Щn</l>
. <l n="b">deniбєЕ doh avakiбєЕ hulun vulati nƒБtha yan t…Щka huvus</l>
. <l n="c">aбєЕhiбєЕ vvah duluriбєЕ s…Щpah virasa hantusƒБk…Щna lunut</l>
. <l n="d">hayvƒБbvat paбєЕinaбєЕ marƒБn hana s…Щpah pagantyan i vaja</l>
. </lg>
1850 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">ndƒБ mah ta prabhu ragraganyaku suji srananta lumurug</l>
. <l n="b">ruбєЕsyankuбєЕ hapakan raras hati saduk lavan lulut un…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">mapus truh pinij…Щtpij…Щt ri larapiбєЕ kilat sanasini</l>
. <l n="d">taбєЕgap tiбєЕhali soбєЕa saбєЕ prabhu lumampah iбєЕ suruvayan</l>
1855 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">toh ndyƒБnuбєЕ calaniбєЕ hulun tiniбЄНa pucca tan tinuridan</l>
. <l n="b">doбє£aбєЕkun asuk…Щr s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ kavava rukбє£a kƒБnd…Щhan iraбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">ƒБpan denta tumiбєЗбЄНih ƒБбєЕr…Щs i payodharƒБprih arisi</l>
1860 <l n="d">mƒБr kadyƒБj…Щnu rakta piбєЗбЄНani jajanta marma k akuku</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">бєЕkƒБkun mintar aбєЕuбєЗбЄН…ЩбєЕ iбєЕ dagan ar…Щs tumuбєЕkul anaбєЕis</l>
. <l n="b">hevƒБn ton tapihiбєЕ hulun kadi rinantag amyas amirah</l>
1865 <l n="c">hetuбєЕkun matukuptukup tak ahar…Щp masi√±jaбєЕ um…Щl…Щs</l>
. <l n="d">kƒБlihniбєЕ basahan putih mara salinku denta v…Щkasan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">kinkin rƒБga sidikбє£idik pat…ЩmuniбєЕ vaбєЕ ardha tan avas</l>
1870 <l n="b">marmƒБtƒЂs tuhun aбєЕlimuбєЗбЄНut i lulutku sumrah i hati</l>
. <l n="c">vruhkviбєЕ kƒБrya hitƒБvasƒБna karaбєЗaбєЕku yan r…Щp…Щh anut</l>
. <l n="d">riбєЕ turvan maбєЕidammidam tahu laranya yƒБбєЕh…Щli raras</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.11" n="11">
1875 <l n="a">maбєЕkinmaбєЕkin avor lulut turida tiбєЕkahiбєЕ vaбєЕ akur…Щn</l>
. <l n="b">amr…Щm riбєЕ rahineбєЕ taman hana gagƒБ kakulvan alaбєЕ…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="c">bvat hƒЂkƒБn ri samƒЂpaniбєЕ raбєЗu kin≈ЂsaniбєЕ kayu puriбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">jriбєЕ jrƒБh mvaбєЕ tirisan katon alasalasnya sarvakusuma</l>
. </lg>
1880 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">бєЕelkvƒБmet g…Щl…ЩбєЕanta yan t…Щka kitƒБбєЕgam…Щl susu mas…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="b">tan vruh riбєЕ lara cumbucumbu sahajav…Щr…ЩћД katal…Щhan</l>
. <l n="c">tanpetƒБ tinulak lanƒБ tinik…Щlan halis tan ar…Щs…Щh</l>
. <l n="d">tan dharmeбє£бє≠a taбєЕantan aбєЕlukari puбєЗбЄНutan tan av…ЩliбєЕ</l>
1885 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">hevaбєЕkvƒЂ kita yan paminta vijiliбєЕ tapih kavijila</l>
. <l n="b">dentƒБreh i v…Щtis kadi tvaбєЕiбєЕ amaбєЕkvak…Щn puбЄНak ar≈Ђm</l>
. <l n="c">piбєЗбЄНƒБnambut a≈Ыoka denta kumayuh t…ЩбєЕahku maбєЕam…Щr</l>
1890 <l n="d">siбєЗбЄНyan ceбєЕni g…ЩlaбєЕku yamilaбєЕi saбєЕgamasriбєЕ umuni</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.14" n="14">
. <l n="a">tan laбєЕg…ЩбєЕ pvaбєЕ ajoбєЕ kuniбєЕ t…Щlas abh≈Ђбє£anahyas as…Щkar</l>
. <l n="b">kƒБlantƒБt dinulurnikƒБбєЕ vivudha бєЕ≈Ђni yan pamanaha</l>
1895 <l n="c">maбєЕke pvan p…Щjah iбєЕ sumeru taya devataбєЕlavadana</l>
. <l n="d">kasyƒБsih ta paratra tan hana miriбєЕ kiteбєЕ paraparan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">ndƒЂkiбєЕ de≈Ыa pametanaбєЕkva ri huripta tanpa gam…Щlan</l>
1900 <l n="b">aбєЕh…ЩћДt riбєЕ ≈Ыa≈Ыira≈Ыmi vƒБhu suminƒБбєЕuбєЕaбєЕ jalanidhi</l>
. <l n="c">riбєЕ ny≈Ђdanta lum…ЩбєЕhay iбєЕ juraбєЕ aбєЕuбєЕkuluбєЕkuli tavaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">riбєЕ paбєЗбЄНan ta kun…ЩбєЕ kitƒБn lihatanaбєЕkva karva l…Щpihan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.16" n="16">
1905 <l n="a">kiбєЕkiбєЕkvƒЂ kita yan l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ t…Щkapi saбєЕhubiбєЕ himagiri</l>
. <l n="b">vahvƒБgatra sake r…ЩбєЕatr…ЩбєЕatiбєЕ agrajambaбєЕan adoh</l>
. <l n="c">lolyƒБpiбєЗбЄНa lavan kukusni valiraбєЕnya mƒБr amarayaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">mukбє£ƒБniбєЗбЄНir i jƒЂvitantan avasƒБna tanpa t…Щmahan</l>
. </lg>
1910 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.17" n="17">
. <l n="a">l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕ tan vulatiбєЕ tah…Щn ragas i hantuniбєЕ divakara</l>
. <l n="b">m…Щltik pƒБбєЕnya har…Щphar…Щp lavad…Щn iбєЕ r…Щr…Щb rumaraba</l>
. <l n="c">vƒБhvƒБreh as…Щv…ЩћД puбЄНak hinab…ЩtiбєЕ p…ЩtuбєЕ kapavanan</l>
. <l n="d">maбєЕkƒБ teku gatinta puбєЕg…Щl inatƒЂta tapvan an√™бЄН…ЩбєЕ</l>
1915 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.18" n="18">
. <l n="a">nƒБhan sambatirƒБn prapa√±ca sumavak s…Щn…ЩбєЕnira hilaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">bhƒБsma hyaбєЕ smara tanpa gatra sinukatsukat linihatan</l>
. <l n="c">ton tekaбєЕ tahulan kapala maputih s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ kumalaka</l>
1920 <l n="d">kadyƒБбєЕlƒЂбєЕa ri saбєЕ бЄНat…ЩбєЕ mavarahe panas hatinira</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.19" n="19">
. <l n="a">dyah tonton ta kahƒЂnapuбєЗyani tuvuhku tan sipisipi</l>
. <l n="b">bhasmƒЂbh≈Ђta vineh upadrava t…Щkap bhaбє≠ƒБra kƒБraбєЗa</l>
1925 <l n="c">ƒБpan svaбєЕ har…ЩpiбєЕ hulun mahuripƒБбєЗ бЄНat…ЩбєЕ kita bibi</l>
. <l n="d">ndin tambƒБ ndi pametanƒБmrћ•ta panƒЂsa rakryan iбєЕ ak≈ЂбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.20" n="20">
. <l n="a">t aбєЕs…ЩћД tebu nihan si manmatha kanirguбєЗanya tariman</l>
1930 <l n="b">sugyan masku tan eбєЕ…ЩteбєЕ hulun apan g…Щs…ЩбєЕ dadi havu</l>
. <l n="c">tiбєЕhal her…Щna tƒБku mƒБsku ri t…Щkanta riбєЕ vaбєЕ alara</l>
. <l n="d">tanpƒБvak vinuvus tuhun hana lulutku laбєЕg…ЩбєЕ i kita</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_23.21" n="21">
1935 <l n="a">lvir maбєЕkojara kƒБmadeva rinasan vinarna ri hati</l>
. <l n="b">devi maбєЕkin aramb…Щhan taбєЕisiralupan tumutura</l>
. <l n="c">mvaбєЕ ceбє≠ƒЂnira kƒБlih aбєЕlugas umilva mƒБtya ri sira</l>
. <l n="d">maбєЕkƒБ lvirniбєЕ aбєЕƒБ≈ЫrayƒБn taha larƒБmb…Щkanya p…Щjaha</l>
. </lg>
1940 </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="praharбє£iбєЗƒЂ" n="23" xml:id="Smaradahana_24">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">kƒБla hyaбєЕ ratih anaбєЕis bhramanta citta</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ rudra sira mulat ri puбє£pitƒБбєЕ≈Ыa</l>
1945 <l n="c">vruh yan matya madanaghƒБriбєЗƒЂ tan imbƒБ</l>
. <l n="d">icchƒБ saбєЕ hyaбєЕ i sira lantaran subaddha</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">tunvan manmatha dumilah vineh pradƒЂpta</l>
1950 <l n="b">sƒБkбє£ƒБt hasta manasijƒБбєЕave saharбє£a</l>
. <l n="c">donyƒБбєЕambila ri siraбєЕ susatya devƒЂ</l>
. <l n="d">agyƒБбєЕayva turida rƒБga harбє£a ri tvas</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.03" n="3">
1955 <l n="a">saбєЕ satyƒБgiraбєЕ umulat marin sa≈Ыoka</l>
. <l n="b">yan ton r≈ЂpanikƒБбєЕ apuy katon sameru</l>
. <l n="c">svamiбєЕkvƒЂki бЄНateбєЕ aveh kalƒЂбєЗamƒБrgan</l>
. <l n="d">liбєЕ devƒЂ ri hatinirƒБdan aбєЕkasaбєЕkas</l>
. </lg>
1960 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">maбєЕkat saбєЕ p…Щjaha lavan sakƒЂnirƒБgya</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕkƒБneбєЕ lantaran adulur manek riбєЕ agra</l>
. <l n="c">kƒБбєЕk…Щn matya lumabuheбєЕ apuy praбєЗƒБnta</l>
. <l n="d">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ manmatha sinavaknirƒБn pasambat</l>
1965 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">ai nƒБtha smara lihatiбєЕhulun t…Щkapta</l>
. <l n="b">suбєЕsuбєЕ teki laki man…Щhta mƒБtya donya</l>
. <l n="c">tan dadyƒБrusuha tum≈Ђt abhavƒБcakra</l>
1970 <l n="d">riбєЕ janmƒБntara hulunanta riбєЕ paratra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">pƒБбєЕniбєЕ mƒБrga vilut ikƒБбєЕ havan yan ev…Щh</l>
. <l n="b">her…Щn riбєЕ vvat ugalagil havan kar…Щsr…Щs</l>
1975 <l n="c">anti pva бєЕhulun i rikƒБбєЕ p…Щk…Щn tuna vvaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">uбєЕgvan saбєЕ guru pitarƒБ sirƒБn kat…Щmva</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">nƒБhan liбєЕ smaradayitƒБmuhun mam≈ЂjƒБ</l>
1980 <l n="b">yogaj√±ƒБnanira nirƒБ≈ЫrayƒБmb…Щk ahniбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">sampun maбєЕkana tum…ЩбЄНun sire hyaбєЕ agni</l>
. <l n="d">katrƒЂбєЗi priya paricƒБrikƒБ paбЄНƒБsraбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.08" n="8">
1985 <l n="a">akrƒБk lvir salahasa sunбЄНarƒЂбєЕ alas g…ЩћДбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">yan ton saбєЕ tum…ЩбЄНun avƒБs ya bhasmibh≈ЂtƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">truhniбєЕ saбєЕhub alimunan lumuh lum…ЩбєЕhay</l>
. <l n="d">len k…ЩmbaбєЕ j…Щnu sumavur paniбєЕs…ЩtiбєЕ hyaбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
1990 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_24.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">saбєЕsiptan kapatiniraбєЕ patibratƒБk≈ЂбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕkƒБn paбєЕgih manasija tanpa r≈Ђpa mƒБvƒБs</l>
. <l n="c">kƒБlih tan v…ЩnaбєЕ asamƒБgamƒБrddha kepvan</l>
. <l n="d">lvir vƒБhyendriya taya sƒБdhaneбєЕ pat…Щmva</l>
1995 </lg>

. <l n="a">hetunyƒБn sumurup i citta nƒЂlakaбєЗбє≠a</l>

. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="rƒБgakusuma" n="24" xml:id="Smaradahana_25">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.01" n="1">
2005 <l n="a">byƒБtƒЂtan sira saбєЕ rva sampun alilaбєЕ h…Щn…ЩбєЕak…Щna bhatara varбєЗan…Щn</l>
. <l n="b">tan ryamban vagug…Щn rimaбєЕ t…ЩkapikƒБбєЕ smara≈Ыara sumusuk t…Щke hati</l>
. <l n="c">tan vriбєЕ dƒБya kar…ЩбєЕr…ЩбєЕan turida maбєЕran…ЩhiбєЕapitu vƒБhnikƒБбєЕ lulut</l>
. <l n="d">maбєЕgƒБбєЕh…ЩћДba mareбєЕ hul…ЩsniбєЕ aбєЕaraбєЕ mar…Щka ri haбєЕ…ЩtiбєЕ payodhara</l>
. </lg>
2010 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">t…Щkvan d≈ЂtanikƒБбєЕ kapƒБt vahu t…ЩkƒБбєЕat…Щrak…Щn iбєЕ akƒБrya l…ЩбєЕl…ЩбєЕa</l>
. <l n="b">meghƒБnyƒБraбєЕ arantayan lumaris aija kadikadi taraбєЕtaбєЕiбєЕ jamaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">mavvan tan hat…ЩбєЕ…ЩћД g…Щr…Щhnika rin…ЩбєЕvak…Щn apilad alon tuka kap…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="d">saбєЕke r≈Ђmni r…ЩбєЕihniбєЕ aбєЕd…Щha kapaбєЕgih i laranira yan kapiбєЕ rvana</l>
2015 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">milvƒБбєЕamb…Щki kiбєЕkiбєЕ ƒБ≈Ыrama bhaбє≠ƒБra kadi daradaran kag…Щnt…Щran</l>
. <l n="b">tapvan siбєЕhit as…Щvva taбєЕguli vavaбєЕ karuhun apatajugtajug s…Щkar</l>

2020 <l n="d">saбєЕgƒБkƒБ≈Ыa girahyas…Щn pati p…Щkulp…Щkul i tan ulahiбєЕ sakaбєЗбє≠aka</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">maбєЕkin marma tan…ЩmnikƒБбєЕ turida rƒБga ri hati madarƒБga tan lipur</l>
. <l n="b">maryƒБyoga samƒБdhi tan kahuniбєЕƒБ pij…Щr aбєЕaraбєЕ apiбєЗбЄНa bhasmaran</l>
2025 <l n="c">aбєЕk…Щn tiбєЕhal i k…ЩmbaбєЕiбєЕ vuбєЕa t…Щl…ЩбєЕjuga kupinanirƒБn salah baбєЕun</l>
. <l n="d">moghƒБnu√±jul aбєЕuntabuntab ak…Щdut kadi muбє£ika kataбєЕk…Щban hul…Щs</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">бєЕkƒБne dar≈Ыana rƒБmaбєЗƒЂya hana raбєЕkaбєЕ agaja paбЄНa hƒЂra maбєЗбЄНala</l>
2030 <l n="b">nƒБgasvƒБsa gunuбєЕgunuбєЕnya kinaraбєЕkaraбєЕ inukir ulƒБsirat ba√±u</l>
. <l n="c">бєЕkƒБna sthƒБna bhaбє≠ƒБra kƒБsr…Щpan amaбєЕkuk amaбєЕumaбєЕu m…ЩћДr manahnira</l>
. <l n="d">varбєЗan sambatireбєЕ бє≠ikƒБkutukutuk sum…Щs…Щl avakirƒБn k…ЩneбєЕ lulut</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.06" n="6">
2035 <l n="a">ai koбєЕ hƒЂna ≈ЫarƒЂra kƒБ≈Ыmala har…Щp kaviбє£ayana kapƒБ≈Ыa riбєЕ smara</l>
. <l n="b">sinvaбєЕ yan guruniбєЕ sarƒБt huvus a≈Ыiбє£ya tuvin atuha riбєЕ ≈ЫivƒБgama</l>
. <l n="c">maбєЕkin buddhinire tan eбєЕ…Щt i patiбєЕkahiбєЕ ulah anibƒБk…ЩnƒБhuti</l>
. <l n="d">nirvƒБkuбєЗбЄНala tan kagiбєЗбЄНalana vulvaбєЕ alupa ri panikбє£aniбєЕ viku</l>
. </lg>
2040 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">maбєЕg…Щh demu makolahaбєЕ tan at…ЩбєЕ…ЩћД tan ulahiбєЕ inucap jagat guru</l>
. <l n="b">takram riбєЕ tinuvƒБk…ЩniбєЕ bhuvana sampun aguduha macihna kul putih</l>
. <l n="c">dikбє£ƒБtantravidhi mvaбєЕ agnijananƒБkrama tama tamanƒБmrћ•tƒБn tama</l>

2045 </lg>

. <l n="a">ƒБyay ko puruбє£ƒБpa ko vavil akas vinaravarah amaбєЕk…Щl and…Щl…Щg</l>

. <l n="a">nƒБhan ≈Ыabda bhaбє≠ƒБra caбєЕkara kararva mumanuman avaknire hati</l>
. <l n="b">бєЕkƒБn sarveбє£бє≠a sakƒБmakƒБma sira sarvagata sakahar…ЩpnirƒБn dadi</l>
2055 <l n="c">nƒБ sambandhanirƒБn lumakvak…Щn un…ЩбєЕnira t…Щlas amuhun riбєЕ ƒБ≈Ыrama</l>
. <l n="d">t…Щkvan ≈ЫaktinikƒБбєЕ smare hatinirƒБбєЕulahulah aбєЕutus lumampaha</l>

. <l n="a">tan varбєЗan t…ЩkapiбєЕ maбєЕ…ЩћД laku bhaбє≠ƒБra dinudut i samƒБdhi pƒБrvatƒЂ</l>
2060 <l n="b">eбєЕgal prƒБpta par…ЩбєЕ lavan manahirƒБn t…Щka pamat…ЩkikƒБбєЕ kadevatƒБn</l>

2065 <l n="a">vvant…Щn bvat s…ЩpaбєЕ iбє£бє≠a candana taviбєЕnya cinaraбєЗa hat…Щpnya vidruma</l>

. <l n="a">e√±jiбєЕ kƒБla t…Щv…ЩknirƒБбєЕlabuhana brata l…ЩбєЕ…ЩбєЕ av…Щn…Щs kakiбєЕkiбєЕan</l>
. <l n="b">adyus luhya kum…ЩћДlak…Щn бєЕ…ЩlihikƒБбєЕ hati sinuruyaniбєЕ kakƒБбєЕhyasi</l>

2075 </lg>

. <l n="a">t…Щkvan yan hana vrћ•tta mƒБtra kar…ЩбєЕ…ЩћД tripuravijaya kokalan panah</l>

2080 <l n="d">kiбєЕkiбєЕ piбєЗбЄНa hatur par…ЩћДniбєЕ anan…Щk marin agigu hanan har…Щphar…Щp</l>

. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.14" n="14">
. <l n="a">g…ЩбєЕg…ЩћДбєЕ…Щn kat…ЩkƒБn lulut muvah i jƒБtiniran ahayu tanpa bh≈Ђбє£aбєЗa</l>
. <l n="b">endah r≈ЂpanirƒБn katon aбєЕaraбєЕ iбєЕ ≈Ыayana tumiliбєЕ iбєЕ laбєЕit l…ЩбєЕit</l>
2085 <l n="c">siбєЕhitniбєЕ madhuka trivikraman ar…Щs tumitisa rum…ЩpƒБ manisnira</l>
. <l n="d">lƒБvan t…ЩћДbni g…ЩluбєЕ nirƒБvilavilƒБsalita vinil…ЩtiбєЕ s…Щkar gaбЄНuбєЕ</l>

. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_25.15" n="15">
. <l n="a">mant…Щn krodha t…Щkapni kiбєЕkiбєЕira somya lumiyaбєЕi бє≠ikƒБnireбєЕ karas</l>

. </lg>

2095 </div>

. <l n="a">s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ alaбєЕ…ЩћД girijƒБбєЕaraбєЕ on…ЩбєЕ</l>

. <l n="d">karaбєЗaniran vijil ok…Щr adandan</l>
2120 </lg>

. <l n="c">amava pucaбєЕ rumuhun makajaбєЕ mrƒБk</l>

. <l n="a">sat…ЩkanirƒБmrih an…Щmbah umamb…Щt</l>
. <l n="b">kadi p…Щp…ЩsaбєЕ luбєЕayan din…ЩhƒБk…Щn</l>
2130 <l n="c">hati parame≈Ыvara marma saharбє£a</l>
. <l n="d">g…Щm…Щg…Щm…Щn ojar aveh lara rƒБga</l>

. <l n="a">uduh ibu mƒБsku hatiбєЕku kita dyah</l>

2150 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_26.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">tuvi g…ЩluбєЕanta kasep бєЕvaбєЕ i t…ЩћДbnya</l>
. <l n="b">taya macikƒБri s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕku layat r≈Ђm</l>

2155 <l n="d">vin…Щkasak…Щnku turuбєЕ vruh iбєЕ ƒЂraбєЕ</l>
. </lg>

. <l n="a">anakanakanku pavehku ri kƒБna</l>

2160 <l n="c">t…Щlas inukirku rikƒБ ya sur≈Ђpa</l>
. <l n="d">hana karikƒБpi hilaбєЕ ta kun…ЩбєЕ dyah</l>

. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_26.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">vacana bhaбє≠ƒБra ri parvataputri</l>

. <l n="c">tan agigu tiбєЕhal ikƒБбєЕ liriбєЕ esi</l>

. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_26.13" n="13">
2170 <l n="a">avicaritan paбєЕu√±capnira kƒБlih</l>
. <l n="b">krama t…Щka taбєЕ taбЄНah ƒБdbhutar≈Ђpa</l>

2175 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_26.14" n="14">
. <l n="a">ri t…ЩlasirƒБnaбЄНah ƒБmrћ•tabhoga</l>

. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="rajanƒЂ" n="26" xml:id="Smaradahana_27">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">atha ri s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕ bhaбє≠ƒБra madanƒБri haneбєЕ himavƒБn</l>

. <l n="c">dumadak akƒБlade≈Ыa gati saбєЕ pinaran pinar…Щk</l>
. <l n="d">pujin apanamyaбєЕ e√±jiбєЕ amaj…ЩбєЕ laбє≠i tan sah iner</l>

. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.02" n="2">
2190 <l n="a">muvah i rikƒБбєЕ kul…Щm ghaбє≠ita piбєЕ rva p…Щt…ЩбєЕ kum…Щl…Щm</l>
. <l n="b">rinadinaniбєЕ ≈Ыa≈ЫƒЂ pabukakuбєЗбЄНur iбєЕ astagiri</l>
. <l n="c">pat…Щr aбєЕalap rarasni r…ЩбєЕihiбєЕ kin…Щd…ЩћД kinayuh</l>

2195 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">hati parame≈ЫvƒБraбєЕr…Щs at…Щ√±uh t…ЩkapiбєЕ griбєЕ iraбєЕ</l>

. <l n="d">lara kabalik sirƒБn hyaбєЕ asakit sinarikniбєЕ un…ЩбєЕ</l>
2200 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">manahira kepvan iбєЕ gati hanƒБn paбєЕucap ri hati</l>
. <l n="b">mapa t…Щkapamva koбєЕ avak aбєЕiбє£бє≠ya parƒБna kun…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">athaca marƒБn…ЩkƒБk…Щna lulut muvahƒБm…Щkula</l>
2205 <l n="d">iraбєЕiraбєЕamva yan humuбєЕa kagyata yƒБririsa</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">apa ta kun…ЩбєЕ paбєЕavruha rikiбєЕ turidƒБбєЕkvi riya</l>
. <l n="b">ndya jarumanamva mƒБjara lulutmu maran kat…ЩбєЕ…Щr</l>
2210 <l n="c">tulisak…ЩneбєЕ vilƒБpa maparanti puбЄНak sinuv…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">rasa laraniбєЕ kum…ЩћДlak…Щn un…ЩбєЕnika tan kat…Щka</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">yadin atitih bvatƒБku tumamƒБ mapa lƒЂбєЕanika</l>
2215 <l n="b">niyata pan…ЩбєЕgahanya kuhakery aku duбє£бє≠a t…Щm…Щn</l>
. <l n="c">aku tuvi kevalƒБl…Щh isanƒБkata piбєЗбЄНa hurip</l>
. <l n="d">vadisanikin pag…Щr turus arakбє£a kalƒЂбєЕanika</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.07" n="7">
2220 <l n="a">hana karikƒБmb…Щkanya kadi k≈ЂбєЕmu riyƒБmal…Щsa</l>
. <l n="b">turida mavanvavanvan anuk…Щl tiki yan tulusa</l>
. <l n="c">laralara kƒБmalolya kav…ЩnaбєЕ pinar…Щk vina≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="d">aбєЕulihak…Щn karƒБsikan aбєЕ…ЩћДmi karasnya carik</l>
. </lg>
2225 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">narah apa k≈ЂбєЕnya tan tumarimƒБku yadin бЄНat…ЩбєЕa</l>
. <l n="b">aku ratuniбєЕ triloka tuvi ≈Ыakti tuvin prajurit</l>
. <l n="c">syapa kari deva tan vruh i lagaбєЕku lavan tripura</l>
. <l n="d">hana haliman si handaka p…Щjah pinij…Щtku juga</l>
2230 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">panahanahƒБ bhaбє≠ƒБra ri tan ahyuna ≈ЫailasutƒБ</l>
. <l n="b">gumuбєЗita lƒЂбєЕa saбєЕ ki√±…Щn…ЩpiбєЕ hati r≈Ђpanira</l>
. <l n="c">turida ginopanƒЂya pinarƒБk…ЩnireбєЕ kavikun</l>
2235 <l n="d">kupinanirƒБtah…Щn juga ma≈Ыabda lanƒБбєЕukulan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">v…Щkasan uvƒБni parcaya ri k≈ЂбєЕa girƒЂndrasutƒБ</l>
. <l n="b">karaбєЗanirƒБn lumakvak…Щn un…ЩбєЕnira marma sum…ЩћДk</l>
2240 <l n="c">t…Щlas amasaбєЕ sipat suduk anindyaguбєЗep…Щtip…Щt</l>
. <l n="d">maбєЕalapalap rarasraras apeda guбєЗanya t…Щm…Щn</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">ri laku bhaбє≠ƒБra ≈ЫaбєЕkara tum≈Ђtak…Щn amb…Щkira</l>
2245 <l n="b">amucuбєЕ am…ЩћДбєЕak…Щn k…Щj…ЩpikƒБбєЕ ak…Щmit ri yava</l>
. <l n="c">sahananiбєЕ apsarƒЂ paбЄНa mak…Щg matur≈Ђ bilala</l>
. <l n="d">t…Щkap i m…ЩnuбєЕ bhaбє≠ƒБra hana bhasma hanƒБji sir…Щp</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_27.12" n="12">
2250 <l n="a">hana grћ•ha danta ≈Ыuddha mahijo tinaviбєЕ tinulis</l>
. <l n="b">ya ta kahanan girƒЂndraduhitƒБmr…Щm aбєЕiбєЕkis ap…Щm</l>
. <l n="c">dadi dumunuбєЕ bhaбє≠ƒБra ri paranti girƒЂndrasutƒБ</l>
. <l n="d">t…Щkani s…Щn…ЩћДnikƒБбєЕ damar aveh mulatƒБnuluhi</l>
. </lg>
2255 </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="≈ЫikhariбєЗƒЂ" n="27" xml:id="Smaradahana_28">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">byatƒЂtan saбєЕ hyaбєЕ manmatharipu haneбєЕ mandira gaбЄНiбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">k…Щn…Щp ri jro laбєЕse tan ucapucap…Щn lvirnira huvus</l>
2260 <l n="c">ikƒБбєЕ ceбє≠ƒЂ muбєЕgv iбєЕ taraban i yavƒБtaбєЕhi v…Щkasan</l>
. <l n="d">avor harбє£ƒБmb…ЩknyƒБn pagu√±…Щpan agupyan paбЄНa mid…Щm</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">nda tan varбєЗan tiбєЕkahni pat…ЩmunireбєЕ jro pakasutan</l>
2265 <l n="b">bhaбє≠ƒБrƒЂ tƒЂbrƒБбєЕel matapa gumave k≈ЂбєЕa purajit</l>
. <l n="c">ulihniбєЕ prih devƒЂ karaбєЗani бЄНat…ЩбєЕ saбєЕ katuridan</l>
. <l n="d">amaбєЕgih met veveni manisira solahniбєЕ alulut</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.03" n="3">
2270 <l n="a">samaбєЕkƒБ hƒЂsniбєЕ kƒБmaratih apupul spar≈Ыanarasa</l>
. <l n="b">arok saбєЕke saбєЕ rvƒБt…Щmu silih iriбєЕ kapva kasukan</l>
. <l n="c">ikƒБбєЕ indrƒБnƒЂ≈ЫƒБstra kinatuturan ≈ЫrƒЂ girisutƒБ</l>
. <l n="d">satiбєЕkahniбєЕ pradyumna pinakahiбЄН…Щp hyaбєЕ ≈Ыiva l…Щy…Щp</l>
. </lg>
2275 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">atƒЂtan k≈ЂбєЕ saбєЕ mrƒБkrћ•ta lulutirƒБmr…Щm karahinan</l>
. <l n="b">abƒБбєЕ vetan s…ЩћДбєЕs…ЩћДбєЕniбєЕ aruбєЗa kum…ЩmbaбєЕ vuбєЕavari</l>
. <l n="c">siratniбєЕ vai m…Щlkah ri l…Щbaki pucakniбєЕ himagiri</l>
. <l n="d">vinƒБsvƒБs mƒБs muбєЕgv iбєЕ muбє£a vahu mid…Щr kesisan apuy</l>
2280 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">avƒБ saбєЕ hyaбєЕ kapvƒБvuбєЕu saбєЕ amaбєЕun saбєЕgamarasa</l>
. <l n="b">mijil saбєЕke laбєЕse g…ЩluбєЕ akusut avrƒБ pinahayu</l>
. <l n="c">miбєЕiбєЕ bvat kendran kenira minata haбєЕseбєЕ tatur areh</l>
2285 <l n="d">m…ЩбєЕƒБmiбєЕkus ken gis lagi kapavanan lvir kupukupu</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">ikƒБбєЕ ceбє≠ƒЂ kapvƒБmar…Щki ba√±u muбєЕgv iбєЕ ghaбє≠a maбєЗi</l>
. <l n="b">umƒБdevƒЂ luhyƒБ ta sira tuhun ahyas pinahayu</l>
2290 <l n="c">bhaбє≠ƒБrƒБ luбєЕguh sampun arahup abhasmƒБбєЕumikumik</l>
. <l n="d">anamb…Щ trus pƒБtƒБla ginugutirƒБveh kapuruбє£an</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">hanan lƒЂlalƒЂlƒБm…ЩбєЕam…ЩбєЕ adulur lƒБlana mahƒБs</l>
2295 <l n="b">hana nyƒБsƒБrumbut rava ri t…ЩбєЕahiбєЕ mƒБnasasara</l>
. <l n="c">karaбєЕ pa√±jaбєЕnyƒБgantuka pinag…ЩriбєЕ paбєЗбЄНan apuбЄНak</l>
. <l n="d">mirahnƒЂбєЕ andvaбєЕ luбєЕsir aniriбєЕi si√±jaбєЕ karudhiran</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.08" n="8">
2300 <l n="a">j…Щn…Щk saбєЕ tan pendah mithuna saparan selvan adulur</l>
. <l n="b">tumiбєЕhaltiбєЕhal riбєЕ talaga kadi moyutt iбєЕ adulur</l>
. <l n="c">ulah lvirniбєЕ tu√±juбєЕ kumucup anab…Щh vvai kapavanan</l>
. <l n="d">par…ЩбєЕ lƒБvan haбєЕsƒБбєЕirak…Щn avaknyƒБбєЕ…Щp…Щk…Щp…Щk</l>
. </lg>
2305 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">laluбєЕ mƒБsƒБ tamb…Щh tiga v…ЩбєЕi vulan saбєЕ hyaбєЕ akur…Щn</l>
. <l n="b">makaprƒБбєЗaбєЕ krƒЂбЄНƒБ rahinav…ЩбєЕi sandhyƒБ tan ar…Щs…Щh</l>
. <l n="c">akr…Щmkr…Щm taбєЕ ≈ЫukrƒБdhika pin…ЩkuliбєЕ sonita mar…Щk</l>
. <l n="d">haneбєЕ jroniбєЕ бє£aбЄНkroбє£a rapuh aбєЕiбЄНam ≈ЫrƒЂ girisutƒБ</l>
2310 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">rimaбєЕ tan ryamban saбєЕ kadi nasi s…ЩбЄН…ЩбєЕniбєЕ hilan al…Щk</l>
. <l n="b">ndan elik ryamb…ЩћДniбєЕ tinaбЄНah aбєЕ…Щlih tvasnira gupuy</l>
. <l n="c">avak milvƒБpendah tumihaбєЕ ahijo lvir madhu vuluh</l>
2315 <l n="d">i tuбєЕtuбєЕniбєЕ sant…Щn samirahi pucaбєЕniбєЕ kayu b…Щsar</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_28.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">lum…ЩбєЕhe tanpƒБtmƒБ kahiбЄН…ЩpanirƒБn mƒБmb…Щt aбєЕ…Щlih</l>
. <l n="b">tiliбєЕniбєЕ vvai moghƒБhiduhidu manahnyƒБn huvahuva</l>
2320 <l n="c">bhaбє≠ƒБrƒБtah yatnƒБбєЕisapu ri bhaбє≠ƒБrƒЂ katan…Щhan</l>
. <l n="d">apet bhƒБvƒБn pojar bisa бєЕisapu harбє£ƒБбєЕudaбєЕudaбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="mƒБlinƒЂ" n="28" xml:id="Smaradahana_29">
2325 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">h…Щn…ЩбєЕak…Щna bhaбє≠ƒБrƒЂ ≈ЫailaputrƒЂn kavoran</l>
. <l n="b">tucapa sahananiбєЕ hyaбєЕ pƒБбЄНa yatnƒБn panƒЂti</l>
. <l n="c">t…ЩkapaniбєЕ amikƒБre garbha saбєЕ vƒБhu kesyan</l>
. <l n="d">maran av…Щtu salah lvir yeka <app><lem wit="#edp" type="norm">pinrih hin…ЩћДmh…ЩћДm</lem><rdg wit="#msL884">pinrƒЂ hin…ЩћДmh…ЩћДm</rdg></app></l>
2330 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">atutur i samayƒБniбєЕ daitya nƒЂlƒБбєЕga dhƒЂran</l>
. <l n="b">paбЄНa miv…Щh i vara hyaбєЕ rudra бєЕ≈ЂnƒЂбєЕ atƒЂta</l>
. <l n="c">svaбєЕ amalaku basƒБ riбєЕ bhur bhuvah svah surƒБdi</l>
2335 <l n="d">tan atakuta riбєЕ indra brƒБhma viбє£бєЗviбєЕ raбєЗƒБбєЕga</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">kun…ЩбєЕ ujarira saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ≈ЫaбєЕkarƒБkon prayatnƒБ</l>
. <l n="b">yan anaku makam≈ЂlaбєЕ kƒБma kon hƒЂna≈Ыaktya</l>
2340 <l n="c">krama sumahur ikƒБбєЕ vvil m≈Ђrka masvƒЂ hyaбєЕ ƒЂ≈Ыa</l>
. <l n="d">yadin anaka bhaбє≠ƒБrƒБ≈Ыa≈ЫvatƒБ tanpa mandya</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">karaбєЗani papupulniбєЕ deva hƒБroharƒБh…ЩћДm</l>
2345 <l n="b">yama baruбєЗa kuvera mvaбєЕ surendrƒБdi sƒБkбє£ƒЂ</l>
. <l n="c">humaj…ЩбєЕi naya saбєЕ hyaбєЕ vƒБkpati prƒБgivƒБka</l>
. <l n="d">uma kari sira devƒЂ donaniбєЕ nƒЂti s≈Ђkбє£ma</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.05" n="5">
2350 <l n="a">t…Щlas ar…Щja dinƒБhan vƒБhana hyaбєЕ surendra</l>
. <l n="b">dvirada sira mavak hyaбєЕ ndan mahƒБba√±caneki</l>
. <l n="c">kagirigiri tinonton kr≈Ђra tan somyar≈Ђpa</l>
. <l n="d">avilavila kar…Щsr…Щs bhinna himp…Щr kagendra</l>
. </lg>
2355 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">krama lumaku tan imbƒБ saбєЕ vat…Щk lokapƒБla</l>
. <l n="b">saha pahula phalƒБkveh sesiniбєЕ svargaloka</l>
. <l n="c">an…Щmu dalihaniбєЕ tvas mƒБrganiбєЕ nƒЂti dadya</l>
. <l n="d">lumavada sira saбєЕ hyaбєЕ ≈ЫaбєЕkarƒБvahvavahvan</l>
2360 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">tutumuluya manambah saбєЕ mare joбєЕ bhaбє≠ƒБra</l>
. <l n="b">marahak…Щn i luluyniбєЕ daitya maбєЕkin pragalba</l>
. <l n="c">nda tucapa giriputrƒЂ mogha kƒБvit masaбєЗбЄНiбєЕ</l>
2365 <l n="d">mar…Щk amatuni jaбєЕgut saбєЕ hyaбєЕ uбєЕgvƒЂ kisapvan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">savulatira katon taбєЕ vƒБhana kr≈Ђrar≈Ђpa</l>
. <l n="b">agila sahaja kagyat citta devƒЂ tumon ya</l>
2370 <l n="c">muririбєЕ ariris elik tvasnirƒБnon ap≈Ђrva</l>
. <l n="d">mar…Щk i jaja bhaбє≠ƒБrƒБбєЕol sumant…Щn kav…Щsv…Щs</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">surapati sira yatnƒБn…Щmbah amvit ri saбєЕ hyaбєЕ</l>
2375 <l n="b">lumaris av…Щdi ≈ЫƒБpan de bhaбє≠ƒБrƒЂ saroбє£a</l>
. <l n="c">milu sahananikƒБбєЕ hyaбєЕ kapva mantuk byatƒЂtan</l>
. <l n="d">mag…Щm inaki manahnyƒБбєЕdadyak…Щn ba√±canƒБsvƒЂ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.10" n="10">
2380 <l n="a">tripuraripu kap≈Ђhan vruh sire karyaniбєЕ hyaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">kav…Щkas a≈Ыila muбєЕgv iбєЕ tƒЂraniбєЕ pƒБrijƒБta</l>
. <l n="c">j…Щn…Щk i hayu bhaбє≠ƒБrƒЂ hetuniбєЕ saбєЕgamƒБsriбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">sin…ЩlaбєЕanira pƒБna prƒЂyaniбєЕ sarvabhoga</l>
. </lg>
2385 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">avicaritan ulah saбєЕ mrƒБkrћ•taбєЕ rƒБga ri tvas</l>
. <l n="b">girivaraduhitƒБбєЕr…Щs taбєЕ v…Щt…ЩбєЕ mogha molah</l>
. <l n="c">atutur i samaya hyaбєЕ reka yan sƒБбєЕg…Щpan lek</l>
. <l n="d">krama m…Щtu ta bhaбє≠ƒБra hyaбєЕ gana kr≈Ђrar≈Ђpa</l>
2390 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">saha javuh aбєЕin ƒБdr…Щs gh≈ЂrбєЗitƒБbƒБyubajra</l>
. <l n="b">g…Щlap a≈Ыani halisyus varбє£a tanpa pramƒБбєЗa</l>
. <l n="c">savijilira gum…Щnt…Щr yeka pakrƒБk bhaбє≠ƒБrƒЂ</l>
2395 <l n="d">mulat i v…ЩkanirƒБvak deva m…ЩбєЕg…Щp gajendra</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.13" n="13">
. <l n="a">smararipu sira yatnƒБn ton bhaбє≠ƒБrƒЂ kag…ЩћДman</l>
. <l n="b">umarihara saбєЕ elik yan mihat riбєЕ svaputra</l>
2400 <l n="c">ibu phalani giriste vƒБhana hyaбєЕ surendra</l>
. <l n="d">hana dinuluran icchƒБ deбєЕku <app><lem type="emn">vighnƒБntatatva</lem><rdg wit="#msL884">vighnƒБrthatatva</rdg><note>Poerbatjaraka, who proposed this emendation, noted that two other manuscripts he consulted had the same reading as L884.</note></app></l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.14" n="14">
. <l n="a">gaбєЗagaбєЗani vuvustƒБm…Щtvak…Щn bhinna≈Ыabda</l>
2405 <l n="b">t…Щh…Щr…Щn atiki deniбєЕ loka saбєЕ hyaбєЕ gaбєЗƒБstu</l>
. <l n="c">guбєЗagaбєЗaniki ≈ЫuddheбєЕ svarga siddhyeбєЕ raбєЗƒБбєЕga</l>
. <l n="d">am…Щjahana musuhniбєЕ deva tekin v…ЩkƒБбєЕku</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_29.15" n="15">
2410 <l n="a">paбєЕucapira bhaбє≠ƒБre≈ЫƒБna sarvaj√±atatva</l>
. <l n="b">krama pinahayu saбєЕ hyaбєЕ vighnakartƒБ kamantyan</l>
. <l n="c">ibupuyaбєЕ uva devƒЂ prasvalƒЂ svargaloka</l>
. <l n="d">kakakakanira sa≈ЫrƒЂ somya nƒБ triбєЕ≈Ыa kanya</l>
. </lg>
2415 </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="bhramaravilasita" n="29" xml:id="Smaradahana_30">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_30.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">kƒБla hyaбєЕ durmukha ha√±ar umijil</l>
. <l n="b">vvant…Щn d≈Ђta dvaya maбєЕiбєЕ…Щtak…Щn</l>
2420 <l n="c">konkonan dƒБnavapati pinatih</l>
. <l n="d">mƒБya lvir deva purihiбєЕ asura</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_30.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">liбєЕ saбєЕ senƒБpurapati mav…Щkas</l>
2425 <l n="b">yan v…ЩtvƒБnak girivaraduhitƒБ</l>
. <l n="c">sƒБkбє£ƒБt ≈ЫatruбєЕku kirakiranikiбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">devƒБd…ЩбєЕki ry aku man…Щmu suka</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_30.03" n="3">
2430 <l n="a">sampun byakta pva girijatanaya</l>
. <l n="b">yatnaбєЕ bh≈ЂtƒБn mulih avaravarah</l>
. <l n="c">tan varбєЗan lvirnya t…Щka kapalay≈Ђ</l>
. <l n="d">prƒБptƒБn…Щmbah ri saбєЕ asurapati</l>
. </lg>
2435 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_30.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">liбєЕ saбєЕ daityƒБdhipa par…ЩбєЕ umijil</l>
. <l n="b">u≈ЫvƒБsƒБdr…Щs bhrukuбє≠inira tik…Щl</l>
. <l n="c">muntab taбєЕ krodha ri hati dumilah</l>
. <l n="d">≈ЫƒЂghrƒБn <app><lem wit="#edp" type="norm">mojar ri</lem><rdg wit="#msL884">mojƒБ ri</rdg></app> balanira kabeh</l>
2440 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_30.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">sakvehniбєЕ daityabala paбЄНa mas…ЩћД</l>
. <l n="b">vadvƒБ ri jro kuбє≠a par…ЩбєЕ inatag</l>
. <l n="c">hyunhyun kapvƒБruharuhan umijil</l>
2445 <l n="d">gutg≈Ђt…Щn gh≈ЂrбєЗita par…ЩбєЕ agalak</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_30.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">sampun tekaбєЕ kirakira pinapak</l>
. <l n="b">sep…Щn sakvehnikƒБбєЕ amara sura</l>
2450 <l n="c">riбєЕ kendran svarga saphala dunuбєЕ…Щn</l>
. <l n="d">ƒБpan yƒБmet kirakira biбє£ama</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_30.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">osik taбєЕ sa√±jata sagala p…Щp…Щk</l>
2455 <l n="b">t≈Ђt s…ЩбєЕk…ЩrniбєЕ l…Щbuh iбєЕ alunalun</l>
. <l n="c">vvilniбєЕ vvil rƒБkбє£asa v…Щki kadi vƒБh</l>
. <l n="d">mantrƒЂniбєЕ mrћ•tyu puhuniбєЕ asura</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_30.08" n="8">
2460 <l n="a">g…ЩбєЗбЄНiбєЕ daityƒБdhipa ya ta tinab…Щh</l>
. <l n="b">k…ЩбєЗбЄНaбєЕ goбєЕ gaбєЕsa gubar asahuran</l>
. <l n="c">syokбє£yokniбєЕ kaбєЕsi kumisik apagut</l>
. <l n="d">бєЕekбєЕekniбєЕ ≈ЫaбєЕka ta ra ra ra ra rat</l>
. </lg>
2465 </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="suvaбєЕ≈Ыapattra" n="30" xml:id="Smaradahana_31">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">krama m…Щtu saбєЕka riбєЕ nagara dƒБnavapati gumuruh</l>
. <l n="b">i punuki r…ЩбєЕganiбєЕ dviradarƒБkбє£asa kahananira</l>
2470 <l n="c">dhanuhi dilahnikƒБбєЕ kavaca mapratihata sumirat</l>
. <l n="d">ravi sum…Щn…ЩћД haneбєЕ udayapar≈Ыva paбє£anira murub</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">bala pinakƒБdi mrћ•tyu sakalƒБruharuhan arasuk</l>
2475 <l n="b">dhvajanira nƒБgacarma vinal…ЩћДlvan aбєЕad…Щg aruhur</l>
. <l n="c">maбєЕavik ar…Щs maladmalad ap≈Ђrva siniririбєЕ aбєЕin</l>
. <l n="d">limaбєЕ atus ƒБdbhutƒБpaбЄНapaбЄНƒБбєЕak…Щpak…Щp adulur</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.03" n="3">
2480 <l n="a">papan arasuk lutuбєЕlutuбєЕ asaбєЕkya kadi p…Щt…ЩбєЕ ah…ЩћДm</l>
. <l n="b">aбєЕunaбєЕunaбєЕ sipiбєЕsipiбєЕ ikƒБбєЕ…ЩбЄНap…ЩбЄНap ahulap</l>
. <l n="c">tab…Щtab…Щhan humuбєЕ pinakadoknya kutupukutupuk</l>
. <l n="d">dilahi curiknya handaru mid…Щr pracalita gumulak</l>
. </lg>
2485 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">pamaja sakoбє≠i rƒБkбє£asa surakбє£aka kagirigiri</l>
. <l n="b">muruбєЕut abhairavƒБmava lipuбєЕ mulat avuraбєЕutan</l>
. <l n="c">surati papanya siбєЕha maбєЕavil gajapati maбєЕuliбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">vat…Щk agalah salakбє£aбєЕ akasirkasir ajaran ar…Щs</l>
2490 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">i vuri tum≈Ђt hiraбєЗyakasipuh mvaбєЕ asura vinuruk</l>
. <l n="b">v…Щkav…Щka kƒБlakeya danamƒБna vikaбє≠a kuhaka</l>
. <l n="c">da≈Ыakaravaktra bhƒЂmakrћ•ta kapva ya salayamukha</l>
2495 <l n="d">saбєЕ akalakarбєЗikiбєЕ tinuha riбєЕ raбєЗa tuvi pinatih</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">prasama par…ЩбєЕ lumampah ahavan ratha maбєЗisalaga</l>
. <l n="b">agaбєЗita piбєЗбЄНaniбєЕ bala padƒБti turaga rinasuk</l>
2500 <l n="c">dhvaja ri har…ЩpnirƒБjina t…ЩkeбєЕ mukhanira sinasat</l>
. <l n="d">pracalita kƒБka vibhrama tulisnya ri t…Щpi kumaluбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">taruбєЗanikƒБcaran tahu tatuбєЕgalan akudakudan</l>
2505 <l n="b">pituбєЕ ivu ≈Ы≈Ђra sƒБra ≈ЫarapuбєЕniбєЕ asura piruhun</l>
. <l n="c">mrћ•gapati darpa la√±canani pƒБlaganika minaбєЗi</l>
. <l n="d">apapatihan ravisnya pin…Щp…Щs biбєЕuбєЕ usus avil…Щt</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.08" n="8">
2510 <l n="a">miluбєЕ agajah sahasra≈Ыata piбєЗбЄНanika sanasini</l>
. <l n="b">rinasuk iбєЕ indranƒЂla kadi kƒЂrбєЗagiri karivutan</l>
. <l n="c">t…Щlas akaluбєЕkaluбєЕ tatu mukhanya ginaruбЄНa maбєЕaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">kum…ЩбЄНap aбєЕ…ЩnбЄН…Щp…Щnd…Щp ahulap kadi latulatu m…ЩћДr</l>
. </lg>
2515 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">sinahaja padb…Щlas ya taбєЕ ajantra saбєЕaбєЕ ivu juru</l>
. <l n="b">arur…Щk arampak aбєЕriv…Щg i lampah amuvuhi s…Щs…Щk</l>
. <l n="c">vijah akasirkasir vulu may≈Ђra sagala rinavis</l>
. <l n="d">kadi k…ЩбЄНapiбєЕ tasik mata jugƒБбєЕalunalun ahijo</l>
2520 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">paбЄНa m…Щsat iбєЕ nabhastala t…ЩkeбєЕ ratha gaja turaga</l>
. <l n="b">v…Щki kadi megha riбєЕ pralaya riбєЕ da≈Ыadi≈Ыi sumaput</l>
. <l n="c">hyaбєЕ aruбєЗa tan k…Щ√±ar kasahaban bhuvana kadi p…Щt…ЩбєЕ</l>
2525 <l n="d">kavaca rukuh prabhƒБsvara gumanti manuluhi jagat</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">iniбєЕ…ЩtiбєЕ…Щt hanan kadi tasik malih aбєЕavaбєЕavaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">papupuli sa√±cayƒБ≈Ыara kadƒЂ karaбєЕ ariбєЕiriбєЕi</l>
2530 <l n="c">sag…Щr…ЩhiбєЕ ampuhan dhvaninikƒБбєЕ bala sabala humuбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">kadi sihuбєЕiбєЕ mahƒБgila curiknika kagirigiri</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.12" n="12">
. <l n="a">ri lakunikƒБбєЕ balƒБsura samƒБsama n…Щs…Щki laбєЕit</l>
2535 <l n="b">prasama turuбєЕ p…Щgat saka rikaбєЕ kuбє≠a gupura saбєЕa</l>
. <l n="c">gaбєЗagaбєЗa bh≈Ђta jaбєЕgama pi≈ЫƒБca paбЄНa kap…Щl…ЩбєЕ…Щn</l>
. <l n="d">t…Щkapi kupaknikƒБбєЕ dhanuh abhairava par…ЩбєЕ inayat</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_31.13" n="13">
2540 <l n="a">avicaritaбєЕ havan gagana sakбє£aбєЗa kuluvut adoh</l>
. <l n="b">≈Ыa≈Ыiraviloka tƒБra ya l…ЩбєЕit paбЄНa kahalivatan</l>
. <l n="c">krama бЄНat…ЩбєЕiбєЕ suralaya layat lakunikƒБбєЕ asura</l>
. <l n="d">t…Щkapi gubarnya gh≈ЂrбєЗita humuбєЕ kadi g…Щlap ataruбєЕ</l>
. </lg>
2545 </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="mrћ•tatodaka" n="31" xml:id="Smaradahana_32">
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">prƒБptaбєЕ rƒБkбє£asa gh≈ЂrбєЗita gumuruh</l>
. <l n="b">kapvƒБбєЕrampas anunvani sumahur</l>
2550 <l n="c">akveh deva p…Щjah kapar…Щp…Щkan</l>
. <l n="d">strƒЂniбєЕ hyaбєЕ hina√±aбєЕ pinar…Щbutan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">avr…Щg taбєЕ sura saptar…Щбє£igaбєЗa</l>
2555 <l n="b">kepvan tan vruh i rƒБtnya girigirin</l>
. <l n="c">tan sƒБrƒБmrih anakrabi tinuluбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">tyakteбєЕ sa√±jata nora vinulatan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.03" n="3">
2560 <l n="a">sasvargƒБt ri titirnya masahuran</l>
. <l n="b">yan prƒБptaбєЕ graha rƒБkбє£asa sumaput</l>
. <l n="c">devƒБcumbana duhkha kap…Щgatan</l>
. <l n="d">sabsab ≈Ыatru dumeh ya girivilan</l>
. </lg>
2565 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">riбєЕ kendran tucapaбєЕ suraduhitƒБ</l>
. <l n="b">vahvahyas maparas rarasi halis</l>
. <l n="c">sampun tuбєЕgal ikƒБбєЕ saviji turuбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">sah kenyƒБn patukuptukup alay≈Ђ</l>
2570 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.05" n="5">
. <l n="a">sakveh saбєЕ da≈Ыarudra masasaran</l>
. <l n="b">s…ЩћДk luбєЕhƒБбєЕili t≈Ђt gaganatala</l>
. <l n="c">mvaбєЕ saбєЕ hyaбєЕ maranak makaburayut</l>
2575 <l n="d">taбєЕguбєЕ putra salakбє£a kaki t…Щguh</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">kƒБlanyƒБn pralayƒБ sasurapada</l>
. <l n="b">svarga bhraбє£бє≠a g…Щs…ЩбєЕ kapat…ЩбєЕahan</l>
2580 <l n="c">maбєЕkin taбєЕ vivudhƒБvr…Щg alaradan</l>
. <l n="d">devƒЂ deva salakбє£a silih id…Щk</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">hetunyƒБn pakirih luyuk alay≈Ђ</l>
2585 <l n="b">muбєЕsir pƒБбЄНa bhaбє≠ƒБra suragaбєЗa</l>
. <l n="c">tan varбєЗan tumuluy t…Щka kapaluh</l>
. <l n="d">u≈ЫvƒБsƒБdr…Щs an…Щmbah ak…Щsutan</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.08" n="8">
2590 <l n="a">kagyat citta bhaбє≠ƒБra t…Щkap ikƒБбєЕ</l>
. <l n="b">devƒБn…Щmbah i pƒБdanira бЄНat…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">mƒБjar yan kat…Щkan musuh ikanaбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">svarga dhvƒБsta tinunvan iбєЕ asura</l>
. </lg>
2595 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.09" n="9">
. <l n="a">mƒБsih saбєЕ hyaбєЕ aveh vara karuбєЗa</l>
. <l n="b">ai sakvehta surƒБpsara humatur</l>
. <l n="c">putraбєЕkvƒЂki <app><lem wit="#edp">vavan</lem><rdg wit="#msL884">v…Щv…ЩћД</rdg></app> tuli vulati</l>
. <l n="d">astu bhraбє£бє≠a musuhta t…Щkap ike</l>
2600 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.10" n="10">
. <l n="a">liбєЕ saбєЕ hyaбєЕ tripurƒБntaka tumuluy</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ hyaбєЕ durmukha vƒБla pinituha</l>
. <l n="c">kr≈ЂrƒБg…ЩћДбєЕ inusapnira din…Щl…ЩћД</l>
2605 <l n="d">riбєЕ mantrƒБkбє£ara yoga yinugapat</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_32.11" n="11">
. <l n="a">sampun hyaбєЕ gaбєЗa labdhatuha mad…Щg</l>
. <l n="b">taбєЕgap taбєЕ cadu≈Ыakti piniturun</l>
2610 <l n="c">≈ЫƒЂghrƒБvimba kuбє≠ƒБra kadi kilat</l>
. <l n="d">donyƒБmƒБtyana ≈Ыatru surapati</l>
. </lg>
. </div>
. <div type="canto" rend="met" met="vaбєЕ≈Ыapattrapatita" n="32" xml:id="Smaradahana_33">
2615 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_33.01" n="1">
. <l n="a">sampunikƒБбєЕ anugraha mareбєЕ girisutatanaya</l>
. <l n="b">len aбєЗimƒБdi devaguбєЗa kapva kava≈Ыa kar…Щg…Щp</l>
. <l n="c">r…Щp mabaбєЕun tikƒБбєЕ hyaбєЕ umuvah prakupita sumaput</l>
. <l n="d">kapva dhrћ•tƒБyudhƒБn…Щmu parƒБ≈ЫrayaбєЗaniбєЕ ajurit</l>
2620 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_33.02" n="2">
. <l n="a">hetu surendra yatna maбєЕutus maбєЕataga mid…Щra</l>
. <l n="b">saбєЕ huvus ƒБбєЕ…Щlih prathamaniбєЕ kuduran amaluya</l>
. <l n="c">≈ЫƒЂghratarƒБhavan turaga citraratha kapalay≈Ђ</l>
2625 <l n="d">maбєЕg…Щh akon raбєЗapriya tumaбєЕgalaбєЕ asurapati</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_33.03" n="3">
. <l n="a">sesinikƒБбєЕ sakendran avaj≈Ђvaju kavaca rukuh</l>
. <l n="b">mvaбєЕ <app><lem type="norm">surasaбєЕgha</lem><rdg wit="#edp">surasaбєЕghya</rdg></app> yatna t…Щka tan pal…Щpal…Щh inatag</l>
2630 <l n="c">sakбє£aбєЗa s…Щk s…Щs…Щk v…Щki tikƒБбєЕ gaja turaga бЄНat…ЩбєЕ</l>
. <l n="d">r…ЩбєЕganikƒБбєЕ gajƒБ≈Ыva ratha kƒБdbhuta makagurilap</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_33.04" n="4">
. <l n="a">g…Щnt…ЩrikƒБбєЕ mrћ•daбєЕga kala ≈ЫaбєЕka tinulup aбєЕuhuh</l>
2635 <l n="b">gh≈ЂrбєЗita ghora gh…ЩбєЗбє≠ani limanya dumadak aбєЕuliбєЕ</l>
. <l n="c">paбєЕhriki patriniбєЕ turaga tulya g…Щr…Щh asahuran</l>
. <l n="d">lvir garuбЄНƒБp…Щtak dhvaninikƒБбєЕ gubar inatusatus</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_33.05" n="5">
2640 <l n="a">piбєЗбЄНa salakбє£aбєЕ apsara vanƒЂбєЕ samara sumarasah</l>
. <l n="b">tanpa s…Щlat raбєЕinya tinapis cinaraбєЗa kum…Щ√±ar</l>
. <l n="c">aбєЕ≈Ыuka rakta varбєЗani ravisnya tinulisiбєЕ …ЩmƒБs</l>
. <l n="d">bhƒБsvara sƒБluniбєЕ tasik apuy kasiratan aruбєЗa</l>
. </lg>
2645 <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_33.06" n="6">
. <l n="a">hyaбєЕ suranƒБtha maбєЕkat ahavan gajapati rinasuk</l>
. <l n="b">lƒБvan ikƒБбєЕ balƒБpsara tum≈Ђt v…Щki p…Щnuh arur…Щk</l>
. <l n="c">kƒЂrбєЗa vinaбєЕkava dhvajanirƒБr…Щja linayulayu</l>
. <l n="d">ca√±cala mrћ•tyuhasta juga yan k…Щlab aбєЕavayavay</l>
2650 </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_33.07" n="7">
. <l n="a">≈ЫƒЂghra tum≈Ђt bhaбє≠ƒБra yama бЄНaбєЗбЄНa vinugarinira</l>
. <l n="b">bh≈Ђta pina√±cade≈Ыa vidhiniбєЕ bhuvana dulurika</l>
. <l n="c">kapva t…ЩluбєЕpuluh rva vilaбєЕiбєЕ sajuru paбЄНa g…Щn…Щp</l>
2655 <l n="d">sƒБtus arok n…ЩmaбєЕpuluh ikƒБбєЕ bala d…ЩбєЕ…Щn asarik</l>
. </lg>
. <lg xml:id="Smaradahana_33.08" n="8">
. <l n="a">t…ЩбєЕranirƒБdulur paбЄНa ladiбєЕladiбєЕ aбєЕubarabir</l>
